name: A O
description: A O is an infamous New World pirate and captain of the A O Pirates . He and his crew were subordinates to Whitebeard .

name: Abdullah
description: Abdullah is a criminal and a former bounty hunter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , along with his partner Jeet . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc . After the battle with the Donquixote Pirates at Dressrosa, he joined the XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, which later converted to a pirate crew called the Ideo Pirates .

name: Absalom
role: Reporter Soldier Zombies and General Zombies Commander
description: Absalom of the Graveyard was the commander of the Soldier Zombies and General Zombies of Thriller Bark prior to its collapse. He was one of the Mysterious Four of the Thriller Bark Pirates and one of the major antagonists of the Thriller Bark Saga .

name: Acilia
description: Acilia is a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum who participated in a tournament for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Adele
description: Adele is a spotted knifejaw mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Aegir
description: Aegir is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Ageha Woman
description: Ageha Woman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Aggie 68
description: Aggie 68 is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Agotogi
description: Agotogi was the leader of the Agotogi Sand Merchants ( 砂商団アゴトギ , Suna Shōdan Agotogi ) , a gang of thugs who tried to kidnap Vivi about 11 years before the princess 's return to Arabasta .

name: Agsilly
description: Agsilly is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Agyo
description: Agyo is a fighting lion ( 闘獅子 , Tōjishi ) and a gladiator competing at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Ahho Desunen IX
description: Ahho Desunen IX is a noble from the Goa Kingdom and the father of Ahho Zurako .

name: Ahho Zurako
description: Ahho Zurako is a noble from the Goa Kingdom and the daughter of Ahho Desunen IX .

name: Ahiru
description: Ahiru is the deputy commander of the East Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Belo Betty .

name: Aisa
description: Aisa is a young Shandia girl who used to sneak onto Upper Yard frequently to collect Vearth . She is Isa 's daughter. After the timeskip, she works in the Wagomuland theme park and sells Cloud Balloons.

name: Akehende
description: Akehende is a solidly built man with tan skin. He has a thin mustache and a small expanding beard on his face. He wears what appear to be either headphones or some kind of protective covering over his ears that seem to hold his thick but wavy brown hair in place. He wears a blue jacket under his Marine coat with a light blue pinstripe shirt and a striped tie.

name: Akudai Kanzaburo
description: Akudai Kanzaburo is an arms dealer who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country .

name: Akumai
description: Akumai was a Billions agent who followed Mr. 2 Bon Kurei everywhere before he was captured by Hina when Mr. 2 and his crew sacrificed themselves to save the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Aladine
description: Aladine is a goatsbeard brotula merman . He was originally a Ryugu Kingdom soldier who was then enslaved , but then became a pirate as the doctor and later first mate of the Sun Pirates . He is the husband of Charlotte Praline , serving as the bond between the Sun Pirates and the Charlotte Family .

name: Albion
description: "Gashed" Albion is one of the rookie pirates who joined the Fake Straw Hat Crew . He has a bounty of 92,000,000.

name: Alice
description: Alice is the current secretary of the Galley-La Company in Water 7 .

name: Ally
description: Ally is a little girl who was being held captive in the Biscuits Room , on Punk Hazard . She was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Alpacaman
description: Alpacaman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mines of the Udon Region of Wano Country .

name: Alpha
description: Alpha is a member of the CP8 branch of Cipher Pol . She is the daughter of Laskey and the younger sister of CP0 agent Kalifa .

name: Alvida
description: "Iron Mace" Alvida is the former captain of the Alvida Pirates , and the first enemy pirate Monkey D. Luffy encountered in his own pirate career.

name: Amadob
description: Amadob is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Amazon
description: Amazon is an elderly resident of Skypiea who was previously the inspector of the Heaven's Gate . She let people into Skypiea even if they could not pay her extol toll, but purposely failed to tell those who did not pay about the consequences for entering the city.

name: An Zengaiina
description: An Zengaiina is a prisoner on Level 2 of Impel Down .

name: Anba
description: Anba is a man living in the Wano Country and a supporter of the Kouzuki Family .

name: Baskerville
description: Three-Headed Baskerville is the Chief Justice of Enies Lobby , in service of the World Government . Ostensibly a three-headed man, "he" is actually three men— Bas , And , and Kerville —who are such close friends that they prefer acting as one body.

name: Andre
description: Andre is a New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates , before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard . He is the twin brother of the Marine officer Candre .

name: Ange
description: Ange is a giant from Elbaph . She works as a language teacher at the Walrus School , as an assistant for Jaguar D. Saul and as a librarian of the Owl Library .

name: Anjo
description: Anjo is a pirate admirer who witnessed Gol D. Roger 's execution.

name: Ankoro
description: Ankoro is a gigantic anglerfish formerly under the command of captain Vander Decken IX , residing in the Underworld of the Sea , seven thousand meters underneath the ocean surface. Wadatsumi seems to regard Ankoro as a pet, as apparently Ankoro was told "not to eat ships " before.

name: Antonio
description: Antonio is the owner of " Antonio's Graman " in Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Aphelandra
description: Aphelandra is a member of the tribe of Kuja living on the island of Amazon Lily . During the timeskip, she became a member of the Kuja Pirates .

name: Aramaki
description: Aramaki , better known by his alias Ryokugyu , is an Admiral in the Marines . A former policeman from the Taya Kingdom , he was part of the World Military Draft that filled the two Admiral vacancies (along with Fujitora ), caused by Kuzan 's resignation and Sakazuki 's promotion.

name: Aremo Ganmi
description: Aremo Ganmi is a spectator at the Corrida Colosseum . She lives in Primula , a town in the west of Dressrosa .

name: Arlong
description: Arlong the Saw is a sawshark fish-man . He was the captain of the all fish-man crew (excluding Nami ), the Arlong Pirates , a former member of the Sun Pirates , and the older half-brother of Madam Shyarly . He is also a major inspirational figure for the New Fish-Man Pirates .

name: Tsumegeri Guards
description: The Tsumegeri Guards were four of the most powerful soldiers in the Arabasta Kingdom Guard Squad . They drank the Hero Water and attempted to take down Crocodile , but failed and died from the water's side effects shortly after Crocodile refused to even fight them to give them an honorable death.

name: Arthur
description: Arthur is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Aruyutayan V
description: Aruyutayan V was the king of the Lvneel Kingdom roughly 400 years ago when Mont Blanc Noland discovered Shandora .

name: Asahija
description: Asahija is a Marine Chief Petty Officer whose shadow was once stolen by Gecko Moria .

name: Asashichi
description: Asashichi is a resident of the Flower Capital who ran a soba shop with his wife.

name: Ashura Doji
description: Ashura Doji was a bandit , samurai from Wano Country and a retainer of the Kouzuki Family , serving as one of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . After Oden's death, he returned to being a criminal under the name Shutenmaru , assuming leadership of the Mt. Atama Thieves . He initially severed his ties with the Kouzuki Family in the present but rejoined after witnessing Yasuie 's death.

name: Asla
description: Asla , known as the "Horse of Fortune" , was the royal steed of Elbaph . It passed away 63 years ago, believed to have been slain by Loki , shortly after the prince's birth.

name: Aswa
description: Aswa is Koza 's mother and Toto 's wife.

name: Atagoyama
description: Atagoyama is a sumo wrestler in Wano Country 's Bakura Town.

name: Vegapunk/Atlas
description: Atlas , also designated as Punk-05 ( PUNK-05 , Panku-Faibu ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his emotions of frustrations and stress which was relieved through "violence".

name: Atmos
description: "Water Buffalo" Atmos is the former 13th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Attach
description: Attach , commonly nicknamed Attachan ( アタっちゃん , Atatchan , VIZ: "Atacchan") , is a photojournalist employed by "Big News" Morgans for the World Economy News Paper . Having previously headed the Marines' Photography Department , he supplied images of many prominent outlaws—including most of the Straw Hat Pirates —for the Marines' wanted posters , but was eventually dismissed for his frequent blunders.

name: Avalo Pizarro
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Fourth Ship)
description: Avalo Pizarro , also known as the "Corrupt King" , is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the fourth ship of the fleet . Prior to his life of crime, he was once a king of a North Blue kingdom that eventually overthrew him for his despotic ways.

name: Axel
description: Axel is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Ayesé Mar
description: Ayesé Mar is an okaki artisan from the western part of South Blue .

name: Azuki
description: Azuki is an old woman who lives in Ebisu Town .

name: Babanuki
description: Babanuki is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who serves as the warden of the Prisoner Mine in Udon , a region of Wano Country . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Babe
description: "Catcher-Killing" Babe , better known by his alias Mr. 4 , is a former officer agent of the Baroque Works and partner of Miss Merry Christmas . He is also Miss Thursday 's older brother, and Lassoo 's owner. After the group's dissolution, he became a delivery boy for the New Spiders Cafe .

name: Baburu
description: Baburu is the grandmother of the late Gaburu . She is a major supporting character in the Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World cover story.

name: Baby 5
description: Baby 5 is a pirate and the wife of Sai , the Happo Navy 's 13th leader. She is a former servant and assassin of the Donquixote Pirates , serving as an officer in the Pica Army. Her real name has not been revealed, as "Baby 5" is a codename given to her upon joining the Donquixote Pirates.

name: Bacura
description: Bacura is a black panther owned by the Kuja Pirates under Boa Hancock .

name: Baggaley
description: Baggaley is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Bakezo
description: Bakezo is a member of the G-5 branch of the Marines .

name: Ban Dedessinée
description: Ban Dedessinée is the queen of the Frauce Kingdom ( フラウス王国 , Furausu Ōkoku ) in the East Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Banchi
description: Banchi is a giant "all-terrain" turtle used by Baroque Works —particularly Miss All-Sunday —for transportation. He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly".

name: Banchina
description: Banchina was Usopp 's mother and Yasopp 's wife. She died of a sickness in Syrup Village when Usopp was still young.

name: Bankuro
description: Bankuro was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Banshee
description: Banshee is a mermaid and was the only female member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Banzaburo
description: Banzaburo was a samurai of Wano Country who worked as a servant to the Kouzuki Family until their fall 20 years ago.

name: Gyoro, Nin, and Bao
description: Gyoro , Nin , and Bao were a trio of oddly shaped Soldier Zombies that were first seen reporting to Moria about the Straw Hats ' arrival.

name: Bao Huang
description: Bao Huang is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates , being part of the crew's surveillance division, the " Marys ". She appears to have the duty of keeping and presenting daily schedules for the crew and their captain Kaidou .

name: Barbel
description: Barbel is a catfish fish-man and former member of the Rocks Pirates .

name: Bariete
description: Bariete is a monkey mink who is a member of the Recon Squad ( 偵察隊 , Teisatsu-tai ) , and the one in charge of guarding the gates of the Mokomo Dukedom .

name: Barry
description: Barry is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Bartholomew Kuma
role: Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Bartholomew Kuma is a former Warlord of the Sea , the former king of the Sorbet Kingdom , and most notably an officer , as well as founding member of the Revolutionary Army with a bounty of 296,000,000. He is also the adoptive father of Jewelry Bonney , daughter of his late friend and fellow revolutionary Ginny . Kuma is a member of the near-extinct special race known as the Buccaneers , inherited from his late father Clapp .

name: Bartolomeo
devil_fruit: Barrier-Barrier Fruit (VIZ and Funimation subs); Bari-Bari Fruit (Funimation dub)
role: Captain of the Second Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: Bartolomeo the Cannibal is a Super Rookie , the captain of the Barto Club and the captain of the second ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Basil Hawkins
description: Basil Hawkins is an infamous pirate from North Blue known as the "Magician" and the captain of the Hawkins Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". Hawkins attempted to create a Pirate Alliance with Eustass Kid and Scratchmen Apoo but he was betrayed by the latter who had secretly become a subordinate of the Emperor Kaidou . Defeated by Kaidou, Hawkins joined the Beasts Pirates and became one of the crew's Shinuchi .

name: Basilisk
description: The Basilisk is the second-in-command of Impel Down 's Level 2: Beast Hell, under the Sphinx . It is a snake born from a chicken as a result of a rare mutation.

name: Bastille
description: "Shark Cutter" Bastille is a Marine Vice Admiral who took part in the Summit War of Marineford . He later appeared in Dressrosa under the command of Admiral Fujitora .

name: Batchee
description: Batchee is a fly that Fullbody put in his soup to try to humiliate Sanji .

name: Batman
description: Batman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Battaman
description: Battaman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Baxcon
description: Baxcon is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field .

name: Beak Remark
description: Beak Remark is a fishmonger and fisherman who runs on a store on Grove 42 of Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Beegirl
description: Beegirl is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , she became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Beer VI
description: Beer VI is the king of the Roshwan Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Beetleman
description: Beetleman is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates .

name: Bekori
description: Bekori is the former king of the Sorbet Kingdom .

name: Belo Betty
role: East Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Belo Betty is the commander of the East Army in the Revolutionary Army . She succeeded the previous commander, Ginny , eight years after her death.

name: Belladonna
description: Belladonna is one of the Kuja of Amazon Lily , and the doctor of the island.

name: Bellamy
description: Bellamy "the Hyena" is a dyer and retired pirate hailing from the North Blue .

name: Bellett
description: Bellett was the prince of an unnamed kingdom who became a pirate and was consequently imprisoned in Impel Down , and whose gender was unwillingly inverted .

name: Bell-mère
description: Bell-mère was a former Marine , the owner of a mikan farm in Cocoyasi Village , and the adoptive mother of Nami and Nojiko . She raised the two girls in her hometown for approximately nine years until she was murdered by Arlong .

name: Benn Beckman
description: Benn Beckman is the first mate of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Bent
description: Bent is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Bentham
description: Bentham of the Wild , alias Mr. 2 Bon Kurei , is a newkama and former Baroque Works officer agent . He was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc , and (along with his fellow Officer Agents) one of the central characters in Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" .

name: Bepo
description: Bepo is a polar bear mink and the navigator of the Heart Pirates . He is the younger brother of the late Nox Pirate Zepo .

name: Bian
description: Bian is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who serves as the leader of the Pink Bee Squad and a member of the Tontatta Pirates .

name: Biblo
description: Biblo is a very old, giant owl and the chief librarian of the Owl Library , overseeing everything inside and keeping its books giant-sized.

name: Big Pan
description: Big Pan is the largest former member of the Foxy Pirates and a combatant of the Groggy Monsters. He is a wotan , being half loach fish-man and half giant .

name: Billy (Pirate)
description: Billy the Orca Killer is the captain of the Yes Pirates .

name: Billy the Yabuki
description: Billy the Yabuki is a joke character featured in SBS Volume 114 . Billy was created by a reader with the pen name Koedo-kun ( コエドくん ) as an explanation for why wanted posters sold as merchandise sometimes have the bounty amounts torn off. Eiichiro Oda played along and noted that Billy is a mysterious figure who tears wanted posters when revealing the bounty amount would be inconvenient for the story or when the author has not decided the bounty yet.

name: Bimine
description: Bimine is the mayor of Pucci , "The Gourmet Town". He was first mentioned when the town of Pucci was brought up by Kalifa .

name: Bingo
description: Bingo is a former priest and cooper who currently lives in Ebisu Town in Wano Country . He formerly lived in the Flower Capital before losing all his money and being exiled.

name: Birdy
description: Birdy is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon .

name: Bishamon
description: Bishamon is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Bishonure-Onna
description: Bishonure-Onna is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria .

name: Bisley
description: Bisley is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Biyo
description: Biyo is a child who was held captive on Punk Hazard by Caesar Clown . He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Bizarre
description: Bizarre is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Bjorn (Pirate)
description: Bjorn is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc .

name: Bjorn
description: Bjorn is the younger brother of Road and a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Black Maria
description: Black Maria is one of the Tobiroppo , the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates . She owned her own brothel on Onigashima near Kaidou 's castle.

name: Blackback
description: Blackback , also known by his initials BB , is a gorilla mink and a Guardian of the Whale Forest .

name: Blade
description: Blade is a giant from Elbaph who works as math teacher at the Walrus School .

name: Blakey
description: Blakey is a longnose lancetfish fish-man and a drummer in a swing jazz orchestra from Fish-Man Island .

name: Blamenco
description: Blamenco is the former 6th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Blenheim
description: Blenheim is the former 9th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Blondie
description: Blondie is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Blue Fan
description: Blue Fan is a member of the Kuja Pirates .

name: Blue Gilly
description: Blue Gilly is a martial artist from the Longleg Tribe . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc . After the battle with the Donquixote Pirates at Dressrosa , he became part of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet when he joined the XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, which later converted to a pirate crew called the Ideo Pirates .

name: Bluegrass
description: Bluegrass is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Bluejam
description: Bluejam was the captain of the Bluejam Pirates , and an infamous pirate of the East Blue . He was the main antagonist of the Post-War Arc during Luffy 's flashback sequence.

name: Blueno
description: Blueno is an agent of CP0 . Before the time skip, he was previously an agent of CP9; operating undercover as the bartender of a bar in Water 7 .

name: Blumarine
description: Blumarine was the shipwright of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Boa Hancock
description: "Pirate Empress" Boa Hancock is the current captain of the Kuja Pirates and was the only female Warlord of the Sea before the organization's disbandment. She is the current empress of Amazon Lily , also known as the "Snake Princess" . As the current empress she succeeds former empresses Tritoma , Shakuyaku , and Gloriosa . She rules over the Kuja tribe with her two younger sisters, Boa Sandersonia and Boa Marigold .

name: Boa Marigold
devil_fruit: Snake-Snake Fruit King Cobra Model (VIZ); Snake-Snake Fruit: Model King Cobra (Funimation)
description: Boa Marigold is the younger sister of Boa Hancock , the ruler of Amazon Lily . She is also one of the second-in commands of the Kuja Pirates and the younger sister of Boa Sandersonia . She and her sisters are referred to by the Kuja as the Gorgon Sisters .

name: Boa Sandersonia
devil_fruit: Snake-Snake Fruit Anaconda Model (VIZ) Snake-Snake Fruit: Model Anaconda (Funimation)
description: Boa Sandersonia is the younger sister of Boa Hancock , the ruler of Amazon Lily . She is also one of the second-in commands of the Kuja Pirates and the older sister of Boa Marigold . She and her sisters are referred to by the Kuja as the Gorgon Sisters .

name: Bobbin
description: "Sweeper" Bobbin is a bishop-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Bobby Funk
description: Bobby Funk is an assassin from the Mogaro Kingdom and Kelly Funk 's younger brother. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Bobomba
description: Bobomba is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom and the younger brother of Bomba .

name: Bogard
description: Bogard is a Marine Headquarters Marine officer and the right hand man of Vice Admiral Monkey D. Garp .

name: Bomba (Marine)
description: Bomba is a member of the Marines G-5 Branch Unit 01. He is a subordinate of Smoker and Tashigi .

name: Bomba
description: Bomba is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom . He is one of the two vice chiefs of the Tonta Corps along with Rampo , under Gancho and Leo , and serves under Leo in the Tontatta Pirates . He is the elder brother of Bobomba .

name: Bongo
description: Bongo is a former lumber dealer who currently lives in Ebisu Town in Wano Country . He formerly lived in the Flower Capital , but was exiled after being swindled by Komurasaki .

name: Bonk Punch
description: Bonk Punch is one of the Senior Officers and musicians of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Boo
role: First Mate of the Happo Navy
description: Boo is a member of the Chinjao Family and the vice-leader of the Happo Navy . He is a martial artist who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . He is the brother of Sai and grandson of Chinjao . Additionally, he acted as an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Boodle
description: Boodle is the mayor of Orange Town . He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Orange Town Arc .

name: Boogie
description: Boogie is a man with wide shoulders and long arms in comparison to his legs. He also sports a prominent, jutting jawline, parted light hair that covers his right eye and dark lipstick. His attire consists of a leather vest adorned with small spikes over the shoulders and worn over a horizontally striped shirt.

name: Borsalino
description: Borsalino , more commonly known by his alias Kizaru , is an Admiral in the Marines . After Kuzan resigned from the Marines and Sakazuki was promoted to Fleet Admiral, Kizaru is now the only remaining Admiral from the previous trio.

name: Bourbon Jr.
description: Bourbon Jr. is a member of the Arabasta Kingdom 's Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Braham
description: Braham is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel . After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper .

name: Brannew
description: Commodore Brannew is a Marine officer stationed at Marine Headquarters who assigns bounties to criminals. He was first introduced as a lieutenant commander during the Loguetown Arc , but was promoted to commodore during the timeskip .

name: Brew
description: Brew is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Briscola
description: Briscola is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Brocca
description: Brocca is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Brogy
description: Brogy the Red Ogre is a giant from Elbaph and one of the two captains of the Giant Warrior Pirates alongside Dorry .

name: Brontosaurus
description: Brontosaurus was a dinosaur who lived on Little Garden .

name: Brook
description: "Soul King" Brook is the musician of the Straw Hat Pirates , one of their two swordsmen , and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is the ninth member of the crew and the eighth to join, doing so at the end of the Thriller Bark Arc .

name: Bubblegum
description: Bubblegum is a member of the Kid Pirates .

name: Buche
description: Buche is a member of the WCI 31 , serving as the head chef of the first kitchen.

name: Buchi
description: Buchi is an officer of the Black Cat Pirates . Along with his partner Sham , he is also the protector of the crew's ship, the Bezan Black , and together they are known as the Nyaban Brothers ( ニャーバン・ 兄弟 , Nyāban Burazāzu ) .

name: Buckingham Stussy
description: Miss Buckingham Stussy, also known by her alias Miss Buckin , is a former member of both the Rocks Pirates and the illegal science institute MADS . She is the self-proclaimed lover of the deceased Emperor Edward Newgate and the mother of Edward Weevil , a former Warlord of the Sea .

name: Buffalo
description: Buffalo is a combatant and an assassin of the Donquixote Pirates and an officer of the Pica Army. His real name is yet to be revealed, as "Buffalo" is a codename given to him upon joining the Donquixote Pirates.

name: Buggy
description: Buggy the Star Clown is the nominal president of Cross Guild , and one of the current Four Emperors dominating the New World .

name: Buhichuck
description: Buhichuck was the boss of the " Surprise Zombies " in the dining room.

name: Building Snake
description: Building Snake is one of the Senior Officers and the navigator of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Bulldog
description: Bulldog is the son of Conney and the king of the Sorbet Kingdom . He held the throne one generation before Bekori ’s reign, and reclaimed his position after Bekori's successor Bartholomew Kuma became a fugitive.

name: Bunbuku
description: Bunbuku is a teapot owned by Tenguyama Hitetsu that was given life by "eating" the Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Tanuki .

name: Bungo
description: Bungo is an arsonist in Wano Country who currently lives in Ebisu Town . He formerly lived in the Flower Capital , but was exiled after being swindled by Komurasaki .

name: Bunny Joe
description: Bunny Joe is a member of the Revolutionary Army and the leader of the group tasked with freeing the slaves on Tequila Wolf , including Nico Robin .

name: Bushon
description: Bushon is one of the Sea Train organizers in Water 7 , along with Stevie .

name: Busshiri
description: Busshiri was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Byron
description: Byron is one of the slaves who was sold at the Human Auctioning House and was the first in the queue for sale. He is a pirate and musician .

name: Cabaji
description: Cabaji the Acrobat is the Buggy Pirates chief of staff , as well as an acrobat swordsman . He was a member of Buggy's Delivery , and is currently a member of Cross Guild .

name: Caesar Clown
description: Caesar Clown , who was referred to as " Master " by his subordinates, is a scientist , the leading expert on chemical weapons of mass destruction, and one of the co-founders of NEO MADS .

name: Caimanlady
description: Caimanlady is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates , being part of the surveillance division called the " Marys ".

name: Camie
role: Fashion designing apprentice Takoyaki seller Waitress at Mermaid Cafe
description: Camie is a kissing gourami mermaid that first appeared in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll cover story. She first appeared in the main series after being spat out of a large sea boar that was saved by Hatchan , along with her starfish pet and master, Pappag . While dreaming of becoming a designer, she worked on Hatchan's Takoyaki 8 when she first met the Straw Hat Pirates . After the timeskip, she is a waitress at the Mermaid Cafe on Fish-Man Island .

name: Camel
description: Camel is Kuzan 's former super penguin traveling companion.

name: Cancer
description: Cancer is a middle-aged man with slicked-back hair, sunglasses, and is often seen with a cigar in his mouth. He has a scar running straight down from his left eye. His hair has been shown to be blonde in the anime, but it has been shown in a variety of colors, ranging from blonde to gray, in the digitally colored manga. Cancer also wears a suit and tie under his Marine coat.

name: Candelle
description: Candelle was the queen of Esperia , the wife of King Reuven , and the mother of princess Shuri . Before, she served as captain of the kingdom's Battle Convoy .

name: Candre
description: Candre is Andre 's twin brother and an officer within the Marines .

name: Cands
description: Cands is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . He only appears in the manga.

name: Candy
description: Candy is the captain of the Candy Pirates .

name: Capone Bege
description: Capone "Gang" Bege is a mafia don -turned- pirate and the captain of the Fire Tank Pirates . He is also one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". He and his crew came from West Blue , where Bege was one of the heads of the Five Families of the West . During the timeskip, he became a subordinate of Charlotte Linlin and married Charlotte Chiffon . The two have a son named Capone Pez . While working under the Big Mom Pirates , he held a position of a rook-ranked combatant .

name: Capone Pez
description: Capone "Gang" Pez is the infant son of Capone Bege and Charlotte Chiffon , as well as the grandson of Charlotte Linlin and Pound .

name: Capote
description: Capote is a billfish fish-man and a former combatant of the Foxy Pirates .

name: Caribou
description: "Wet-Haired Caribou" is an infamous rookie pirate who was at the Sabaody Archipelago around the time of the Straw Hat Pirates ' reunion. He has earned a bounty of 210,000,000, making him part of the new generation of rookie pirates with bounties over 100,000,000. A fierce admirer of the Emperor Marshall D. Teach , Caribou dreams of becoming part of the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Carmel
description: Mother Carmel was a child trafficker dealing in orphans, that operated in the Underworld several decades ago, under the code name of "Mountain Witch" . Running an orphanage known as the " Sheep's House ", her seemingly benevolent nature caused her to be known as the "Holy Mother" .

name: Carne
description: Carne is one of the main cooks at the Baratie , currently serving as the restaurant's head charcutier .

name: Carrot
description: Carrot is a rabbit mink , the current ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom , and a former member of the Kingsbirds and Inuarashi Musketeer Squad . She was trained by Pedro , whose will she carries on.

name: Catacombo
description: Rear Admiral Catacombo is a Marine officer who led a team to capture the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Catarina Devon
devil_fruit: Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Nine Tailed Fox
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Sixth Ship)
description: Catarina Devon , known as the "Crescent Moon Hunter" , is one of Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as captain of the sixth ship of the fleet . She is regarded as the worst female pirate in history and was one of the most dangerous criminals ever to be imprisoned within Impel Down until she was freed and recruited by Marshall D. Teach .

name: Caucasusman
description: Caucasusman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates ' Armored Division. After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Cavendish
role: Captain of the First Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: Cavendish of the White Horse , also known as the " Pirate Prince ", is a famous Super Rookie and the captain of the Beautiful Pirates . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . After the final battle against Donquixote Doflamingo , Cavendish decided to pledge his loyalty to Monkey D. Luffy and became the captain of the first ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: CB Gallant
description: CB Gallant was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Cerberus
description: Cerberus was a Wild Zombie who served under Gecko Moria .

name: Cerberus (Sword)
description: Cerberus is Figarland Shamrock 's sword , which has been animated by a Mythical Zoan -type Devil Fruit , allowing it to take the form of a monstrous, three-headed dog.

name: Cezar
description: Cezar is the recently-crowned king of the Ilisia Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Chabo
description: Chabo is a young boy from Gosa Village . He works for Nojiko on her mikan farm.

name: Chadros Higelyges
role: Leader of the Centaur Patrol Unit (former)
description: Chadros Higelyges , better known as Brownbeard , is a former New World pirate . As captain of the Brownbeard Pirates , he was one of many opportunists to attack the Whitebeard Pirates ' protected territories in wake of Whitebeard 's death, conquering Foodvalten in particular.

name: Chaka
devil_fruit: Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Jackal (Funimation); Mutt Mutt Fruit: Jackal Mode (Viz); Mutt-Mutt Fruit: Jackal Strike (4Kids)
description: Chaka the Jackal is one of two head guards in the Arabasta kingdom who serves under Igaram , alongside Pell . Chaka was the acting captain of the royal guard in Igaram's absence.

name: Chao
description: Chao is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom who was enslaved in the SMILE Factory .

name: Chap
description: Chap is the king of the Deul Kingdom ( ドイル王国 , Doiru Ōkoku ) in the North Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Chappe
description: "Rope-Tugging" Chappe is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He was first seen fighting against the Marines of G-5 on Punk Hazard .

name: Charlotte Akimeg
description: Charlotte Akimeg is the 31st daughter and 71st child of the Charlotte Family and the seventh of the Charlotte Decuplets to be born. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Allmeg
description: Charlotte Allmeg is the 32nd daughter and 72nd child of the Charlotte Family and the eighth of the Charlotte Decuplets to be born. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Amande
description: "Demon Lady" Charlotte Amande is the third daughter and seventh child of the Charlotte Family , the second quadruplet sister to Mondée , Hachée , and Effilée , and a snakeneck - human hybrid .

name: Charlotte Anana
description: Charlotte Anana is the 39th daughter of the Charlotte Family , as well as the 85th and youngest overall child, and is a member of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Angel
description: Charlotte Angel is the seventh daughter and 17th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet sister of Cracker and Custard . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Anglais
description: Charlotte Anglais is the 42nd son and 78th child of the Charlotte Family and a member of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Basans
description: Charlotte Basans is the 23rd son and 39th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of Saint-Marc . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Basskarte
description: Charlotte Basskarte is the 13th son and 22nd child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Nusstorte and Dosmarche . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Bavarois
description: Charlotte Bavarois is the 26th son and 45th child of the Charlotte Family , as well as an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He is the younger twin brother of Snack .

name: Charlotte Brownie
description: Charlotte Brownie is the 32nd son and 58th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He joined Charlotte Oven 's army to intercept the Straw Hat Pirates on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Broyé
description: Charlotte Broyé is the ninth daughter and 20th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin sister of Brûlée . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Meringue ( メレンゲ大臣 , Merenge Daijin ) , governing over Milenge Island .

name: Charlotte Brûlée
description: Charlotte Brûlée is the eighth daughter and 19th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin sister of Broyé . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Cabaletta
description: Charlotte Cabaletta is the eighth son and the 13th child of the Charlotte Family and the fourth quintuplet brother of Opera , Counter , Cadenza , and Gala . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Cadenza
description: Charlotte Cadenza is the seventh son and the twelfth child of the Charlotte Family and the third quintuplet brother of Opera , Counter , Cabaletta , and Gala . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Chiboust
description: Charlotte Chiboust is the 30th son and 51st child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Mix ( ミックス大臣 , Mikkusu Daijin ) , governing over Sanshoku Island . He was a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to ambush Luffy on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Chiffon
description: Charlotte Chiffon is the 22nd daughter and the 52nd child of the Charlotte Family and Totto Land 's former Minister of Puff ( ふんわり大臣 , Funwari Daijin , Viz: "Minister of Fluff") having governed over Funwari Island until her defection. She is Capone Bege 's wife and the mother of Capone Pez , as well as a member of Bege's Fire Tank Pirates .

name: Charlotte Cinnamon
description: Charlotte Cinnamon is the 16th daughter and 37th child of the Charlotte Family , the younger triplet sister of Smoothie and Citron , and a longleg - human hybrid . She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Citron
description: Charlotte Citron is the 15th daughter and 36th child of the Charlotte Family , the middle triplet sister of Smoothie and Cinnamon , and a longleg - human hybrid . She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Eggs ( エッグ大臣 , Eggu Daijin ) , governing over Kimi Island .

name: Charlotte Compo
description: Charlotte Compo is the 17th son and 28th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin brother of Laurin . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Pie ( パイ大臣 , Pai Daijin ) , governing over Piepie Island .

name: Charlotte Compote
description: Charlotte Compote is the eldest daughter and second child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . She also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Fruits ( フルーツ大臣 , Furūtsu Daijin ) , governing over Fruits Island .

name: Charlotte Cornstarch
description: Charlotte Cornstarch is the 11th daughter and 27th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet sister of Moscato and Mash . She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Love ( 愛情大臣 , Aijō Daijin ) , governing over Loving Island .

name: Charlotte Counter
description: Charlotte Counter is the sixth son and the 11th child of the Charlotte Family and the second quintuplet brother of Opera , Cadenza , Cabaletta , and Gala . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Cracker
description: "Thousand Arms" Charlotte Cracker is the tenth son and 15th child of the Charlotte Family and the oldest triplet brother of Custard and Angel . He is also one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Biscuits ( ビスケット大臣 , Bisuketto Daijin ) , governing Biscuits Island .

name: Charlotte Custard
description: Charlotte Custard is the sixth daughter and 16th child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet sister of Cracker and Angel . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Dacquoise
description: Charlotte Dacquoise is the 24th son and 41st child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Jam ( ジャム大臣 , Jamu Daijin ) , governing over Jam Island .

name: Charlotte Daifuku
description: Charlotte Daifuku is the third son and fourth child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Katakuri and Oven . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Beans ( 豆大臣 , Mame Daijin ) , governing over Poripori Island .

name: Charlotte De-Chat
description: Charlotte De-Chat is the 44th son and the 81st child of the Charlotte Family . He is a hybrid between a human and a fish-man .

name: Charlotte Dolce and Dragée
description: Charlotte Dolce and Charlotte Dragée are the 45th and 46th sons and the 83rd and 84th children of the Charlotte Family , being the two youngest sons of Charlotte Linlin , and are members of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Dosmarche
description: Charlotte Dosmarche is the 14th son and 23rd child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet brother of Nusstorte and Basskarte . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Tea ( お茶大臣 , Ocha Daijin ) , governing over Black Island .

name: Charlotte Effilée
description: Charlotte Effilée is the fifth daughter and ninth child of the Charlotte Family , the youngest quadruplet sister of Mondée , Amande , and Hachée , and a snakeneck - human hybrid . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Flampe
description: Charlotte Flampe is the 36th daughter and 77th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates , serving as the Captain of the Special Attack Unit ( 特攻隊長 , Tokkō-taichō , Viz: "Kamikaze Captain") . She is also Totto Land 's Minister of Honey ( はちみつ大臣 , Hachimitsu Daijin ) , governing over Rokumitsu Island , and the President of the Katakuri Fan Club ( カタクリファンクラブ会長 , Katakuri Fan Kurabu Kaichō ) .

name: Charlotte Fuyumeg
description: Charlotte Fuyumeg is the 34th daughter and 74th child of the Charlotte Family and the tenth of the Charlotte Decuplets to be born. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Gala
description: Charlotte Gala is the ninth son and the 14th child of the Charlotte Family and the youngest quintuplet brother of Opera , Counter , Cadenza , and Cabaletta .

name: Charlotte Galette
description: Charlotte Galette is the 18th daughter and the 42nd child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin sister of Poire . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Butter ( バター大臣 , Batā Daijin ) , governing over Margarine Island .

name: Charlotte Hachée
description: Charlotte Hachée is the fourth daughter and eighth child of the Charlotte Family , the third quadruplet sister to Mondée , Amande , and Effilée , and a snakeneck - human hybrid . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Harumeg
description: Charlotte Harumeg is the 33rd daughter and 73rd child of the Charlotte Family and the ninth of the Charlotte Decuplets to be born. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte High-Fat
description: Charlotte High-Fat is the 20th son and 33rd child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin brother of Tablet . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Joconde
description: Charlotte Joconde is the 27th daughter and 59th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . She was also a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to intercept the Straw Hat Pirates on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Joscarpone
description: Charlotte Joscarpone is the 29th daughter and 63rd child of the Charlotte Family , the younger twin sister of Charlotte Mascarpone , and a Snakeneck - human hybrid . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Kanten
description: Charlotte Kanten is the 27th son and 48th child of the Charlotte Family and the eldest triplet brother of Kato and Montb . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Agar ( 寒天大臣 , Kanten Daijin ) , governing over Jelly Island .

name: Charlotte Katakuri
description: Charlotte Katakuri is the second son and third child of the Charlotte Family and the elder triplet brother of Daifuku and Oven . He is also one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Flour ( 粉大臣 , Kona Daijin ) , governing over Komugi Island .

name: Charlotte Kato
description: Charlotte Kato is the 28th son and 49th child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Kanten and Montb . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Seeds ( シード大臣 , Shīdo Daijin ) , governing over Tanega Island .

name: Charlotte Laurin
description: Charlotte Laurin is the 18th son and 29th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of Compo . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Linlin
description: Charlotte Linlin , better known as "Big Mom" , is the captain of the Big Mom Pirates and was formerly one of the Four Emperors ruling over the New World , as the only female member of the group. She is the queen of the archipelago nation Totto Land , a place she seeks to form into a utopia where all the world 's races can live together in peace without discrimination or segregation. She is also the matriarch of the Charlotte Family , whose children make up the ministers of her nation and the core infrastructure of her crew.

name: Charlotte Lola
description: Charlotte Lola is the captain of the Rolling Pirates and the 23rd daughter and 53rd child of the Charlotte Family . Her mother is the former Emperor Charlotte Linlin and her father is Linlin's 25th husband, Pound . She is the younger twin sister of Chiffon and Gotti 's wife.

name: Charlotte Maple
description: Charlotte Maple is the 26th daughter and 57th child of the Charlotte Family , the youngest quadruplet sister of Mobile , Marble , and Myukuru , and a Longarm - human hybrid . She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . She was a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to ambush Monkey D. Luffy on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Marble
description: Charlotte Marble is the 24th daughter and 55th child of the Charlotte Family , the second quadruplet sister of Mobile , Myukuru , and Maple , and a Longarm - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Marnier
description: Charlotte Marnier is the 13th daughter and 32nd child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin sister of Mozart . She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Yeast ( 酵母大臣 , Kōbo Daijin ) , governing over Kibo Island .

name: Charlotte Mascarpone
description: Charlotte Mascarpone is the 34th son and 62nd child of the Charlotte Family , the older twin brother of Joscarpone , and a Snakeneck - human hybrid . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Tableware ( 食器大臣 , Shokki Daijin ) , governing over Cutlery Island .

name: Charlotte Mash
description: Charlotte Mash is the tenth daughter and 26th child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet sister of Moscato and Cornstarch . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Melise
description: Charlotte Melise is the 17th daughter and 40th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Mobile
description: Charlotte Mobile is the 31st son and 54th child of the Charlotte Family , the elder quadruplet brother of Marble , Myukuru , and Maple , and a Longarm - human hybrid . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Tasting ( 味見大臣 , Ajimi Daijin ) , governing over Futoru Island .

name: Charlotte Mondée
description: Charlotte Mondée is the second daughter and sixth child of the Charlotte Family , the eldest quadruplet sister of Amande , Hachée , and Effilée , and a snakeneck - human hybrid . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Mont-d'Or
description: "Scribe" Charlotte Mont-d'Or is the 19th son and 30th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Cheese ( チーズ大臣 , Chīzu Daijin ) , governing over Cheese Island .

name: Charlotte Montb
description: Charlotte Montb is the 29th son and 50th child of the Charlotte Family and the youngest triplet brother of Kanten and Kato . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Moscato
description: Charlotte Moscato is the 16th son and 25th child of the Charlotte Family and the eldest triplet brother of Mash and Cornstarch . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Gelato ( ジェラート大臣 , Jerāto Daijin ) , governing over Ice Island .

name: Charlotte Mozart
description: Charlotte Mozart is the 12th daughter and 31st child of the Charlotte Family and the elder twin sister of Marnier . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Myukuru
description: Charlotte Myukuru is the 25th daughter and 56th child of the Charlotte Family , the third quadruplet sister of Mobile , Marble , and Maple , and a longarm - human hybrid . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Decuplets
description: The Charlotte Decuplets are the 36-40th sons and 30-34th daughters of the Charlotte Family , making up the 65-74th children in the family, and are all officers of the Big Mom Pirates . They are the largest group of Big Mom 's children born in a single birth.

name: Charlotte Newshi
description: Charlotte Newshi is the 39th son and 68th child of the Charlotte Family and the fourth of the Charlotte Decuplets to be born. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Noisette
description: Charlotte Noisette is the 15th son and 24th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Finance ( 大蔵大臣 , Ōkura Daijin ) , governing over Kinko Island .

name: Charlotte Normande
description: Charlotte Normande is the 38th daughter and the 82nd child of the Charlotte Family . She is a dosundada , a hybrid between a human and a dwarf .

name: Charlotte Nougat
description: Charlotte Nougat is the 41st son and 75th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Nusstorte
description: Charlotte Nusstorte is the 12th son and 21st child of the Charlotte Family and the eldest triplet brother of Basskarte and Dosmarche . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Transport ( 運輸大臣 , Un'yu Daijin ) , governing over Package Island .

name: Charlotte Nutmeg
description: Charlotte Nutmeg is the 30th daughter and 70th child of the Charlotte Family and the sixth of the Charlotte Decuplets to be born. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Opera
description: Charlotte Opera is the fifth son and the tenth child of the Charlotte Family and is the eldest quintuplet brother of Counter , Cadenza , Cabaletta , and Gala . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and served as Totto Land 's Minister of Whipped Cream ( 生クリーム大臣 , Nama Kurīmu Daijin , Viz: "Minister of Cream") , governing over Noko Island . His current status is unknown after having his lifespan removed by a rampaging Big Mom.

name: Charlotte Oven
description: Charlotte Oven is the fourth son and fifth child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet brother of Katakuri and Daifuku . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Browned Food ( こんがり大臣 , Kongari Daijin , Viz: "Minister of Baking") , governing over Yakigashi Island .

name: Charlotte Panna
description: Charlotte Panna is the 28th daughter and 61st child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . She was a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to ambush Monkey D. Luffy on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Perospero
description: Charlotte Perospero is the eldest child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Candy ( キャンディ大臣 , Kyandi Daijin ) , governing over Candy Island .

name: Charlotte Poire
description: Charlotte Poire is the 19th daughter and the 43rd child of the Charlotte Family , the younger twin sister of Galette , and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Praline
description: Charlotte Praline is a half - human and half- hammerhead shark mermaid , the 21st daughter and 47th child of the Charlotte Family , and the younger twin sister of Prim . She was also Totto Land 's former Minister of Design ( デザイン大臣 , Dezain Daijin ) , having governed over Unique Island until her defection.

name: Charlotte Prim
description: Charlotte Prim is the 20th daughter and 46th child of the Charlotte Family , the older twin sister of Praline , and an octopus mermaid - human hybrid . She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Charlotte Pudding
description: Charlotte Pudding is the 35th daughter and the 76th child of the Charlotte Family , an officer of the Big Mom Pirates , and a hybrid between a human and a member of the Three-Eye Tribe . She also works as a chocolatier and the owner of cafe "Caramel" on Cacao Island , as the candidate for the vacant position of Minister of Chocolate ( チョコレート大臣 , Chokorēto Daijin ) . She was once Sanji 's arranged fiancée, per the political agreement between their families. She is currently held captive by the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Charlotte Raisin
description: Charlotte Raisin is the 33rd son and 60th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He was a member of Big Mom 's enraged army sent to fight Monkey D. Luffy , and later joined Charlotte Oven 's army to ambush Luffy on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Saint-Marc
description: Charlotte Saint-Marc is the 22nd son and the 38th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Essence ( エッセンス大臣 , Essensu Daijin ) , governing over Flavor Island . He is the older twin brother of Basans .

name: Charlotte Smoothie
description: Charlotte Smoothie is the 14th daughter and 35th child of the Charlotte Family , the older triplet sister of Citron and Cinnamon , and a longleg - human hybrid . She serves as one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and as Totto Land 's Minister of Juice ( ジュース大臣 , Jūsu Daijin ) , governing over 100% Island .

name: Charlotte Snack
description: Charlotte Snack is the 25th son and 44th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin brother of Bavarois . He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Fries ( フライ大臣 , Furai Daijin ) , governing over Potato Island .

name: Charlotte Tablet
description: Charlotte Tablet is the 21st son and 34th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of High-Fat . He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Toppings ( トッピング大臣 , Toppingu Daijin ) , governing over Topping Island .

name: Charlotte Wafers
description: Charlotte Wafers is the 37th daughter and the 79th child of the Charlotte Family .

name: Charlotte Wiro
description: Charlotte Wiro is the 43rd son and the 80th child of the Charlotte Family . He is a Human - Snakeneck hybrid.

name: Charlotte Yuen
description: Charlotte Yuen is the 35th son and 64th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He was a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to ambush Monkey D. Luffy on Cacao Island .

name: Charlotte Zuccotto
description: Charlotte Zuccotto is the 11th son and the 18th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Alcohol ( 酒大臣 , Sake Daijin ) , governing over Liqueur Island .

name: Chess
role: Evil Chief of Staff (Chief of Staff)
description: Chess is a former evil chief of staff ( 悪参謀 , waru sanbō ) serving under Wapol . After the attack of Blackbeard , he became a pirate alongside his king, until their subsequent return to Drum Island .

name: Chesskippa
description: Chesskippa the Hanger-on is a pirate captain from Robin 's past.

name: Chessmarimo
description: Chessmarimo is a fusion of Chess and Kuromarimo , created by Wapol 's Baku Baku Factory .

name: Chew
description: Chew is a smelt-whiting fish-man and an officer of the Arlong Pirates . He is also a former member of the Sun Pirates . He is one of the major antagonists of the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Chichilisia
description: Chichilisia is the leader of the Niho Navy and the father of Uholisia .

name: Chicken
description: Chicken is the wife of Gyoru and a fishmonger of Foosha Village .

name: Chicory
description: Chicory is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and a member of the Tontatta Pirates .

name: Chief (Tequila Wolf)
description: The Chief is the leader of the soldiers stationed at Tequila Wolf .

name: Chimney
role: Sunday stationmaster of the Shift Station
description: Chimney is the granddaughter of Sea Train conductor Kokoro , her only mermaid grandparent, making Chimney 1/4 mermaid. She is the owner of a rabbit named Gonbe (whom Chimney thinks is a cat).

name: Chinjao
description: Chinjao , formerly known as "Don Chinjao" and "Chinjao the Drill" , is a former pirate , the leader of the Chinjao Family , and the retired 12th leader of the Happo Navy . He also joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . He is the grandfather of Sai and Boo .

name: Chihaya
description: Chihaya is a child who lives in the Flower Capital and attended Sarahebi 's classes during Kaidou 's reign.

name: Chiya
description: Chiya was the Shandia Pantri that lived over 400 years ago, who died of Tree Fever .

name: Cho
description: "Moonflower" O-Cho is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Ringo region in Wano Country . She was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Chochinman
description: Chochinman is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates and a member of the Marys , the crew's surveillance division.

name: Chocho
origin: Wano Country (Okobore Town; formerly Bakura Town )
description: O-Chocho is a woman who lives in Okobore Town in Wano Country .

name: Choco Police
origin: Chocolat Town, Cacao Island , Totto Land
description: Choco Police is a police officer in charge of watching over Chocolat Town on Cacao Island .

name: Chocolat
description: Chocolat is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who masqueraded as Nami .

name: Choi
description: Choi is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Chokyumei-no Chosuke
description: Chokyumei-no Chosuke is a young boy from the Hakumai region of the Wano Country . He is the brother of Jugemu Jugemuko .

name: Chome
description: Chome is a kunoichi and a member of the Beasts Pirates . She previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Chouchou
description: Chouchou is a dog from Orange Town , famed for his unceasing vigil over the pet-food shop founded by his deceased owner . He is classified as a Type B creature, "Small Friendly".

name: Chuchun
description: Chuchun is a Super Sparrow ridden by Itomimizu . He and Itomimizu witnessed all the Davy Back Fight games between the Foxy Pirates and the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Chuji
description: Chuji is the pet rat of the geisha Some .

name: Clapp
description: Clapp was the father of Bartholomew Kuma and a member of the Buccaneers race .

name: Clione
description: Clione is a member of the Heart Pirates .

name: Clou D. Clover
role: Professor and archaeologist of the Tree of Knowledge
description: Clou D. Clover , commonly known as Professor Clover ( クローバー博士 , Kurōbā-hakase ) , was the director of the Ohara Library, and a leading authority on archaeology. He was a professor and archaeologist who studied Poneglyphs with his fellow colleagues in the Tree of Knowledge . During his younger years, he was also an infamous explorer known for getting repeatedly caught by the Marines .

name: Coburn
description: Coburn was the leader of the Shandia tribe from 400 years ago.

name: Cocoa
description: Cocoa was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who impersonated Nico Robin .

name: Cocox
crew: Animals of the Island of Rare Animals
origin: East Blue ( Island of Rare Animals )
description: Cocox is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals . Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon . He is classified as a Type B creature, "Small Friendly".

name: Colon
description: Colon is a resident of Elbaph and the half- human , half- giant son of Scopper Gaban and Ripley . He is the self-proclaimed captain of the "Colon Pirates".

name: Colscon
description: Colscon is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Columbus
description: Columbus is a member of the Yonta Maria Grand Fleet .

name: Comil
description: Vice Admiral Comil is the commander of Marine Base G-2 . He first appeared in Portgas D. Ace 's cover story , and later took part in the Summit War of Marineford .

name: Compo
description: Compo is a large muscular man. He wears a short sleeved shirt, a bandana, a beaded neckless and several bracelets on each forearm.

name: Concelot
description: Concelot is a fox mink and one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad .

name: Conis
description: Conis is a citizen of Skypiea who befriended Monkey D. Luffy and his crew after their arrival. She is Pagaya 's daughter and owner of a cloud fox named Su .

name: Conney
role: Queen dowager of the Sorbet Kingdom
description: Conney is the queen dowager of the Sorbet Kingdom as the mother of King Bulldog .

name: Corgi
description: Corgi is a World Government official who took part in the mission to acquire the blueprints of Pluton and escort the prisoners Nico Robin and Cutty Flam to Enies Lobby . He acted as the leader of the forces in the Sea Train , answering directly to the CP9 agents.

name: Coribou
description: "Blood-Splatterer" Coribou is a captain of the Caribou Pirates , along with his big brother Caribou .

name: Cornelia
description: Cornelia is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Cosette
description: Cosette is the head chef employed in the Germa Kingdom 's royal household.

name: Cosmo
description: Sergeant Cosmo is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi . Sergeant Cosmo was first introduced in the cover story of Enel's Great Space Operations .

name: Cosmos
description: Cosmos is a member of the Kuja Pirates .

name: Cotton
description: Cotton is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field .

name: Couran
description: Couran is the king of the Cameron Kingdom ( キャメロン王国 , Kyameron Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Cowboy
description: Cowboy is a member of the Arabasta Kingdom 's Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Crocodile
description: "Desert King" Sir Crocodile is a former Warlord of the Sea and former president—under the codename "Mr. 0" —of the mysterious crime syndicate Baroque Works . During his time as Warlord, Crocodile maintained a public facade of helping both the people of Arabasta Kingdom and the Marines , all while secretly using Baroque Works to weaken Arabasta for conquest . After his plot was exposed by Princess Nefertari Vivi and the Straw Hat Pirates , whose captain Monkey D. Luffy defeated him in battle, he was stripped of his title and arrested alongside most of his top subordinates (save his former Vice-President Nico Robin , who went on to join the Straw Hats).

name: Crocus
description: Crocus is a doctor and the caretaker of the whale Laboon as well as the overseer of the Twin Cape Lighthouse , which guides all ships using Reverse Mountain to enter the Grand Line .

name: Curiel
description: Curiel is the former 10th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Curly Dadan
description: Curly Dadan is a mountain bandit and the boss of the Dadan Family who lives on Mt. Colubo near Foosha Village . She served as the foster mother of Portgas D. Ace and Monkey D. Luffy , who were entrusted to her by Monkey D. Garp , and also took care of Sabo too when he moved in.

name: Cyrano
description: Cyrano is a character in Oda's one-shot, Monsters , and was a swordsman from Shimotsuki Ryuma 's past.

name: D. D. Tee
description: The Giant Warrior Pirates is a pirate crew made up of giants from Elbaph lead by Dorry and Brogy . Before them, the crew's captains were Jarul and Jorul . They disbanded 102 years ago when Dorry and Brogy began their duel, but reunited once they returned to Elbaph. They are major allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: D.R.
description: D.R. was one of the main antagonists in Oda 's one-shot, Monsters .

name: Dachoman
description: Dachoman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Daddy Dee
description: Daddy Dee is one of the houseparents, alongside Mummy Mee , of a World Government -affiliated orphanage situated on the Conomi Islands .

name: Dagama
description: Dagama is the tactician of the Prodence Kingdom . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Dagny
description: The Walrus School is the main educational institution of Elbaph , hosted in the Warrior's Spring alongside the neighboring Owl Library and southwest of Western Village. All of Elbaph's children come to the school in order to learn about different subjects and socialize with other children.

name: Dago
description: Dago is one of the Franky Family 's Kairiki Destroyers .

name: Daidalos
description: Daidalos was a giant squid that was close friends with Ikaros Much .

name: Daifugo
description: Daifugo is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who served as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country until his defeat during the prison uprising. After being tamed by Kurozumi Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Daigin
description: Daigin is a Marine Commodore who led the team that went to Impel Down to capture the intruder, Monkey D. Luffy .

name: Daikoku
description: Daikoku is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Daikon
description: Daikon is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit .

name: Daisy
description: Daisy is a slim woman of average height. She has long, bushy orange hair. She wears an outfit typical to the rest of the Kuja Tribe; this consists of a skimpy green top which appears to be made only from a long piece of cloth which barely covers each breast and tied down with a thin belt, black thigh-high stockings, and matching panties with red cloths buttoned at each side. As a Kuja Pirate, she also wears a white cape that resembles a Marine coat. She is easily distinguished by her wide, perpetual grin.

name: Dalmatian
description: Vice Admiral Dalmatian is one of the many Marine vice admirals to have participated in the Summit War of Marineford .

name: Dalton
devil_fruit: Ox-Ox Fruit, Bison Model (VIZ); Ox-Ox Fruit (4Kids); Ox-Ox Fruit, Bison Form (Funimation)
description: Dalton is the elected king of the Sakura Kingdom (successor to the Drum Kingdom). He was formerly the captain of security ( 守備隊隊長 , shubi-tai taichō ) of the Drum Kingdom under King Wapol . He also temporarily served as the captain of the civilian guard after the fall of Drum Kingdom.

name: Damask
description: Damask is a pyromaniac who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Daruma
description: Daruma is a cookiecutter shark fish-man and an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment.

name: Dashiteyaro
description: Dashiteyaro is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family and a prison guard who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country .

name: Davy D. Jones
description: Davy D. Jones , more commonly known as Davy Jones , was a legendary pirate from long ago who was said to have been cursed by a demon to live on the sea floor . Believed to have had obsessive greed, the piracy plunder game known as the Davy Back Fight was dedicated to him.

name: Daz Bonez
description: "The Killer" Daz Bonez , alias Mr. 1 , is a former bounty hunter and the former highest-ranked male Officer Agent of Baroque Works . His partner was Miss Doublefinger . After escaping Impel Down , he traveled with Crocodile in the New World and later joined Crocodile's new organization, Cross Guild .

name: Decalvan Brothers
description: The Decalvan Brothers are two infamous New World pirate captains who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Deigoro
description: Deigoro is a man living in the Wano Country 's Flower Capital .

name: Delacuaji
description: Delacuaji is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Dellinger
description: Dellinger is a combatant and an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army who is a hybrid between a human and a fighting fish fish-man .

name: Demalo Black
description: "Three-Tongued" Demalo Black is the former captain of the Fake Straw Hat Crew . He impersonated Monkey D. Luffy to benefit from his reputation, but was later arrested by Sentomaru . Afterwards, he began impersonating Eustass Kid , before being arrested again.

name: Demoni Aiyo
description: Demoni Aiyo is a hairstylist who lives in Dressrosa .

name: Den
description: Den is Tom 's younger brother. He is a bering wolffish merman . He is also a shipwright and a Sea Forest researcher.

name: Denjiro
description: Denjiro is a samurai from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden 's retainers. He currently serves as the daimyo of Kibi .

name: Devil Dias
description: Devil Dias is a pirate and the former captain of the Acumate Pirates , but was captured and sold as a slave to the family of World Noble Saint Rosward .

name: Diamante
description: Diamante is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates . He occupies the Diamond seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Diamante Army subdivision.

name: Didit
description: Didit is a noble living in the Goa Kingdom on Dawn Island . She is the wife of Outlook III , the biological mother of Sabo , and the adoptive mother of Sterry .

name: Diesel
description: Diesel is a Longarm and a member of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Diez Barrels
description: Diez Barrels was a Marine officer who defected to become a pirate . Thirteen years ago, he was the captain of the Barrels Pirates while operating in the North Blue until he was killed by Donquixote Doflamingo during an attempt to sell the Ope Ope no Mi to the Marines. He was also the father of X Drake .

name: Dirt Boss
description: The Dirt Boss is a giant mole awoken by Gedatsu during his work for Goro in his cover story .

name: Disc J
description: Disc J is a stocky man. He wears many dark colored barbed accessories over his entire body. In the anime, he was shown to have dark blue hair, and wore a tight black shirt, with his accessories colored green with yellow details.

name: Disco
description: Disco is the owner of the now-bankrupt Human Auctioning House at Grove 1 in Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Dive
description: Dive is a relatively short woman sporting lipstick and large braided pigtails. She wears round sunglasses over her forehead, a ragged shirt, a necklace and a pair of stockings coupled with high heels.

name: Dobby Ibadonbo
description: Dobby Ibadonbo is a man imprisoned in Level 6 of Impel Down .

name: Doberman
description: Vice Admiral Doberman is a veteran Marine officer. He was one of the five Vice Admirals who led the Buster Call against Enies Lobby , and also took part in the Summit War of Marineford . Two years later, he is one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Dobon
description: Dobon is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who served as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country .

name: Doc Q
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Ninth Ship)
description: Doc Q , known as "Death God" , is the doctor , and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the ninth ship of the fleet .

name: Dogra
description: Dogra is a member of Dadan 's bandits that are active on Mt. Colubo on Dawn Island . He helped take care of Ace and Luffy for Garp .

name: Dogya
description: Dogya is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Doha Ittanka II
description: Doha Ittanka II is a prisoner from Level 6 of Impel Down .

name: Doll
description: Doll is a Marine Vice Admiral and Commander of the G-14 Marine Base . She is one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Doma
description: "Bohemian Knight" Doma is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Domino
description: Domino is the Head Jailer of Impel Down serving under Warden Hannyabal .

name: Donannoyo
description: Donannoyo is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region of Wano Country .

name: Donovan
description: Donovan was one of the fifty mechanics of the Foxy Pirates . He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip .

name: Donquino
description: Donquino was the helmsman of the Roger Pirates .

name: Donquixote Doflamingo
description: Donquixote Doflamingo , nicknamed "Heavenly Yaksha" , is the captain of the Donquixote Pirates . Before his imprisonment, he was a member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea with a frozen bounty of 340,000,000, as well as the most influential underworld broker under the codename "Joker" . He is also a former World Noble , descended from the Donquixote Family .

name: Donquixote Homing
description: Saint Donquixote Homing was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family , one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government . Homing withdrew from his position and left Mary Geoise in order to live a normal life with his wife and two sons, Doflamingo and Rosinante . After suffering two years of abuse from prejudiced civilians, Homing was killed by his then 10-year-old son, Doflamingo.

name: Donquixote Mjosgard
description: Saint Donquixote Mjosgard was a World Noble and member of the Donquixote Family , one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government .

name: Donquixote Rosinante
description: Donquixote Rosinante was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family descent, being the second son of Donquixote Homing and the younger brother of Donquixote Doflamingo . After his family lost their status as Celestial Dragons and became pariahs, Rosinante was discovered by Sengoku and enlisted into the Marines , eventually reaching the rank of Commander . Upon reuniting with Doflamingo, he feigned muteness and operated as an Elite Officer of the Donquixote Pirates , serving Doflamingo under the codename Corazon while remaining an undercover Marine.

name: Donquixote Shivercalero
description: Saint Donquixote Shivercalero is a World Noble from the Donquixote Family and the father of the late Donquixote Mjosgard .

name: Doran
description: Doran is a child who was captured and kept in the Biscuits Room on Punk Hazard . He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Doringo
description: Doringo was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Dorry
description: Dorry the Blue Ogre is a giant from Elbaph and one of the two captains of the Giant Warrior Pirates alongside Brogy .

name: Dosun
description: Dosun is a hammerhead shark fish-man and was one of the officers of the New Fish-Man Pirates .

name: Dotaku
description: Dotaku is a samurai who resides in Wano Country .

name: Doubt Brothers
description: The Doubt Brothers are Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates .

name: Douzan
description: Douzan was an individual who was killed by Nerona Imu at some point in the past.

name: Dracule Mihawk
description: Dracule "Hawk Eyes" Mihawk is a world-famous pirate currently recognized as the strongest swordsman in the world.

name: Dragon Number Thirteen
description: Dragon Number Thirteen was a dragon created by Vegapunk to guard Punk Hazard . He carried out this duty even after Vegapunk and the World Government 's departure until he was killed by Roronoa Zoro four years later. He was named by one of the World Nobles .

name: Dragon Number Twenty-One
