description: Dragon Number Twenty-One is a dragon created by Vegapunk which resides on Punk Hazard . It was designed to be smaller than Vegapunk's first successful dragon, Dragon Number Thirteen , giving it more quickness.

name: Draw
description: Draw is a Marine Vice Admiral and the main antagonist of One Piece novel A Volume 1.

name: Drip
description: Drip was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who was posing as the real Sanji . When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Drip impersonated Killer .

name: Drophy
description: "Town-Collapser" Drophy , better known by her alias Miss Merry Christmas , is a former officer agent partnered with Mr. 4 .

name: Drug Peclo
description: Drug Peclo , also known as the Major Undertaker , is an emperor of the Underworld .

name: Ducky Bree
description: Ducky Bree is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Duval
role: Leader of the Rosy Life Riders (formerly the Flying Fish Riders)
description: Duval is the leader of the Rosy Life Riders (originally the Flying Fish Riders), active around the Sabaody Archipelago and Fish-Man Island .

name: Eddy
description: Eddy was the navigator of the Bellamy Pirates .

name: Vegapunk/Edison
description: Edison , also designated as Punk-03 ( PUNK-03 , Panku-Surī ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "thinking".

name: Edward Newgate
description: Edward Newgate , more commonly known as "Whitebeard" , was a legendary pirate and the captain of the Whitebeard Pirates . Widely known as the "Strongest Man in the World" , he was considered the "Man Closest to One Piece " after Gol D. Roger 's death.

name: Edward Weevil
description: Edward Weevil , or " Whitebeard Jr. ", is a pirate and self-proclaimed son of the late Edward "Whitebeard" Newgate . He is the son of Buckingham Stussy , the self-proclaimed lover of Newgate. He was initiated into the Seven Warlords of the Sea sometime during the two-year timeskip, and served in their ranks until the Warlords' dissolution.

name: Eiri
description: Eiri is a giant who resided on Elbaph 63 years ago. He was once severely injured by a young Charlotte Linlin .

name: Eggplant Soldier
description: Eggplant Soldier is a soldier of the Big Mom Pirates , serving as a guard at the Whole Cake Chateau . He was Sanji 's helper during his stay at the castle before his planned wedding to Charlotte Pudding .

name: Eikon
description: Eikon is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and a member of the Tontatta Pirates .

name: Elbow
description: Elbow is an individual who resided on Elbaph over 56 years ago and trained Hajrudin to be a warrior.

name: Elizabello II
description: "The Fighting King" Elizabello II is the king of the Prodence Kingdom . He is also a fighter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Elmy
description: Elmy is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Emet
description: Emet , also known as the Iron Giant , is a robot created around the time of the Void Century who was a friend of Joy Boy . Since that time it has been mostly de-powered, only reactivating in two known instances. The first instance occurred 200 years ago when it nearly attacked Mary Geoise . Afterwards, it was smuggled away and kept on Egghead , where in the present day it was used to guard Vegapunk 's prerecorded video being broadcasted from within itself. After hearing the Drums of Liberation from Monkey D. Luffy , Emet powered back up and aided the Straw Hat Pirates in battling the Five Elders .

name: Emil
description: Emil is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Emma
description: Emma is a woman with light colored hair that is stylized with a mohawk on top and two bangs on each side of her face. She wears an open dark jacket, a frilly skirt and high heels.

name: Emporio Ivankov
devil_fruit: Horm-Horm Fruit (VIZ and Funimation); Hor-Hor Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
role: G Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Emporio Ivankov , or Iva for short, is the queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom , known as "Okama King" and a "Miracle Person" . He is one of the Revolutionary Army 's founding members, as well as the commander of the G Army, which covers the Grand Line . A former slave of the World Nobles , he escaped during the Native Hunting Competition on God Valley and was responsible for the God Valley Incident along with Ginny .

name: Enel
description: Enel is the former tyrannical " God " of Skypiea .

name: Enishida
description: Enishida is a member of the Kuja and one of Boa Hancock 's attendants in her castle. She is a lady's maid .

name: Epoida
description: Epoida is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates , before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard .

name: Époni
description: Époni is a nurse in service to the royal household of the Germa Kingdom . She was primarily charged with caring for the late queen , Vinsmoke Sora .

name: Erik
description: Erik is an Arabasta Kingdom citizen and a former member of the Rebel Army led by Koza . He is from Suiren , a town that had been completely dried out.

name: Erio
description: Erio was a member of the Roger Pirates who acted as their information broker ( 情報屋 , jōhō-ya ) until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Eris
description: Eris was the mother of Marshall D. Teach and the wife of Rocks D. Xebec , a member of the Davy Family .

name: Esta
description: Esta is a young woman. In the anime, her dress is light blue (dark in the manga), and she wears a white frilly skirt with light blue spots. She has brownish orange hair.

name: Estrid
description: Estrid was the mother of Loki , as well as the former arranged wife to king Harald , making her Elbaph 's latest queen . She was also the daughter of a pureblooded and ancient influential lineage, akin to nobility . She passed away 62 years ago of an unknown illness .

name: Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro
description: Saint Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , holding the title of Warrior God of Finance .

name: Ettara Chaunkai
description: Ettara Chaunkai is a citizen of Dressrosa .

name: Eustass Kid
description: Eustass "Captain" Kid is a notorious pirate from the South Blue and the captain of the Kid Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ".

name: Farafra
description: Farafra is a former member of the Rebel Army led by Koza . He lost his right arm and right shoulder while protecting Koza during an enemy attack.

name: Farul
description: Farul is Cavendish 's pet horse and a member of the Beautiful Pirates .

name: Faust
description: Faust is a cat mink from North Blue and a member of the Hawkins Pirates , serving as the crew's magician.

name: Fen Bock
description: Fen Bock of the Gourd is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He is a satyr .

name: Figarland Garling
description: Saint Figarland Garling is one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , holding the title Warrior God of Science and Defense; prior to this, he held the position of Supreme Commander of the Knights of God . A World Noble who hails from the Figarland Family , Garling is the biological father of Knights commander Shamrock , as well as the pirate Shanks of the Four Emperors .

name: Figarland Shamrock
description: Saint Figarland Shamrock is a World Noble and the commander of the Knights of God . Born in God Valley , he is the son of Saint Figarland Garling , one of the Five Elders of the World Government , as well as the older twin brother of Shanks , one of the Four Emperors .

name: Fillonce
description: Fillonce is an amethyst anthias mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Finamore
description: Finamore is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Fishbonen
description: Dr. Fishbonen is a Marine naval surgeon (軍医 Gun'i ) stationed at Marineford .

name: Fisher Tiger
description: Fisher Tiger , known as the Adventurer , was a sea bream fish-man and the founder and original captain of the Sun Pirates .

name: Flapper
description: Flapper is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit , when he stopped Leo from taking Robin 's clothes and belongings. He participated in Operation SOP and became a temporary victim of Sugar 's Hobi Hobi no Mi .

name: Flare
description: Flare was a character from Eiichiro Oda 's one-shot Monsters .

name: Footbianco
description: Footbianco is one of the Franky Family 's Kairiki Destroyers .

name: Forest Boss
description: The Forest Boss is a mandrill that was first introduced in Gedatsu's cover story .

name: Forliewbs
description: Forliewbs is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Fossa
description: Fossa is the former 15th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Fourtricks
description: Fourtricks is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Foxy
description: Foxy the Silver Fox is the captain of the Foxy Pirates , and the main antagonist of the Long Ring Long Land Arc .

name: Francois
description: Francois is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5.

name: Franky
description: "Iron Man" Franky is the shipwright of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is the crew's eighth member and the seventh to join, doing so at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Fuga
description: Fuga is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "two".

name: Fugar
description: "Memorial Blade" Fugar is the bandmaster ( 船長 , banmasu ) of the Social Club , a subordinate pirate crew of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Fugetsu Kisaburo
description: Fugetsu Kisaburo is a swordsmith from the Wano Country who forged the Yakuza Kasen . He is a member of the Fugetsu Family .

name: Fugetsu Omusubi
description: Fugetsu Omusubi was a samurai who, as a member of the Fugetsu Family , served as the daimyo of the Kibi region until he was imprisoned and killed by Kaidou 20 years ago.

name: Fujin
description: Fujin is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Fukaboshi
description: Fukaboshi is a shark merman and the eldest son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island . After he, his father and his brothers were liberated by the Straw Hat Pirates , he allied himself with them against Hody Jones and his crew.

name: Fukumi
description: Fukumi was the younger sister of Fukurokuju .

name: Fukurokuju
description: Fukurokuju is a ninja and the previous captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu before they joined the Beasts Pirates following Orochi's deposition. Though he pledged his team's support to Kaidou, Fukurokuju remained loyal to the surviving Orochi and helped him attempt to get revenge. However, Fukurokuju was ultimately bested in combat by his rival Raizo as his and Orochi's plot failed.

name: Fukurou
description: Fukurou the Silent is an agent of CP0 and was previously an agent of CP9 .

name: Fullbody
description: "Double Ironfist" Fullbody is a Marine lieutenant commander serving under Rear Admiral Hina . He was a Marine Headquarters lieutenant at the start of the series, but was demoted to seaman recruit as a condition when he helped the former Black Cat pirate , Jango , get acquitted for his past crimes (in the anime, it was after getting into a fight with Sanji on the Baratie ). During the timeskip, however, he rose back through the ranks to become a commissioned officer once again, being one rank higher than he was to begin with in the series.

name: Funkfreed
devil_fruit: Elephant-Elephant Fruit (Funimation dub, VIZ) Eleph-Eleph Fruit (VIZ)
description: Funkfreed is Spandam 's sword , which has been animated by the Zou Zou no Mi , becoming an Elephant Sword ( 象剣 , Zōken ) . As such, he also serves as a pet and unofficial bodyguard for Spandam, compensating his master's physical slightness.

name: Furika
description: Furika is a tall, plump woman with shoulder-length hair kept in pigtails. She wears a striped dress, a sunhat with a wide brim, and dark sunglasses, and carries a small black purse.

name: Furrari
description: Furrari is the king of the Nagagutsu Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . He is the father of Tritobu .

name: Fuza
description: Fuza is the giant Three-length Bird of the Skypiean Priest Shura , who rode on it to get around to the different places throughout Skypiea .

name: Gab
description: "Howling" Gab is one of the Senior Officers of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Gaburu
description: Commander Gaburu ( ガブル隊長 , Gaburu Taichō ) was a revolutionist commander who led a militia group on an unknown island . His resemblance to Caribou caused misunderstandings in the cover story Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World . He is the grandson of Baburu .

name: Belly
description: The Belly , commonly represented as (a Latin lowercase esh superimposed over a capital B ), is the world 's main monetary unit.

name: Gal
description: Gal is a member of the G-5 branch of the Marines .

name: Galaxy
description: General Galaxy is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi . General Galaxy was first introduced in the cover story of Enel's Great Space Operations .

name: Galdino
description: "Loan Shark" Galdino , alias Mr. 3 , is a former officer agent of Baroque Works , partnered with "Miss Goldenweek" Marianne .

name: Gally
description: "Crescent-Moon" Gally is the captain of the Gally Pirates , currently active in the East Blue .

name: Gama Pyonnosuke
description: Gama Pyonnosuke is a toad that sat atop Usopp 's head during his stay in Wano Country .

name: Gambia
description: Gambia the Missionary is the staff officer of the Barto Club . He was also a gladiator competing at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Gambo
description: Gambo is the deputy commander of the South Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Lindbergh .

name: Gan Fall
description: Gan Fall is the current God of Skypiea . A venerable figure who served in that role for decades, he was overthrown by Enel and cast out of power for six years. During his exile, he roamed the sky as a mercenary known as the Knight of the Sky .

name: Gancho
description: Gancho is the king , also called "Tonta-Chief" ( トンタ長 , Tonta-Chō ) , of the Tontatta Kingdom . He is the father of Mansherry .

name: Gangaru
description: Gangaru is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates . He was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death.

name: Ganryu
description: Ganryu is a member of the Spade Pirates and a member of the Longarm Tribe .

name: Ganryu (Roger Pirates)
description: Ganryu was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Gantonio
description: Gantonio is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He serves as a minor antagonist in the Elbaph Arc after being converted into a demon .

name: Ganzui
devil_fruit: Bomb-Bomb Fruit (4Kids, Funimation, Odex); Boom-Boom Fruit (Viz)
description: Ganzui was a member of the Rocks Pirates . A smuggler by trade, he lost a Davy Back Fight and subsequently joined Rocks in his pursuits.

name: Garudan
description: Garudan is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates . He was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death.

name: Gatherine
description: Gatherine is a cafeteria worker at Enies Lobby .

name: Gattenshochinosukeo
description: Gattenshochinosukeo is a shipwright from the Wano Country who assisted Franky in repairing the rebel's ships.

name: Gatz
description: Gatz is the announcer at the Corrida Colosseum .

name: Gazelleman
description: Gazelleman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Gecko Moria
description: Gecko Moria is the captain of the Thriller Bark Pirates and a former member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea who resides on Thriller Bark , the largest ship in the world . His bounty is 320,000,000, which was frozen until he lost his Warlord position.

name: Gedatsu
role: Priest of Enel (former), Head Clerk of Hot Springs Resort
description: "Sky Boss" Gedatsu was one of Enel 's priests who punished criminals with the Ordeal of Swamp during Enel's reign.

name: Gem
devil_fruit: Bomb-Bomb Fruit (4Kids, Funimation, Odex); Boom-Boom Fruit (Viz)
description: Gem of the Border , better known by his alias Mr. 5 , was formerly the lowest-ranked officer agent in Baroque Works along with his partner, Miss Valentine . He now works as a fireman at the new Spiders Cafe alongside most of his former colleagues.

name: Genbo
description: Genbo is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel . After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper .

name: Genrin
description: Genrin is an old man who lives in Ebisu Town .

name: Genzo
description: Genzo is the sheriff of Cocoyasi Village , and an unofficial but long-serving parental figure to Nami and Nojiko .

name: George Black
description: Impel Down , also known as the Underwater Prison ( 海底監獄 , Kaitei Kangoku ) and the Great Prison ( 大監獄 , Dai Kangoku ) , is a government-controlled stronghold in Paradise together with Marineford and Enies Lobby . It is the World Government 's maximum-security prison for the most dangerous criminals and pirates . It is located underwater in the middle of the Calm Belt and part of the Tarai Current .

name: George Mach
description: George Mach is a former member of the Foxy Pirates . He fought Mountain Ricky before the third round of the Davy Back Fight .

name: Gerd
description: Gerd is a giant from Elbaph and the doctor of the New Giant Warrior Pirates . She was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery .

name: Gerotini
description: "Ball Fingers" Gerotini is the captain of the Puddle Pirates , a pirate crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Giberson
role: Warehouseman ( 倉庫業老舗 , Sōkogyō Shinise , English versions: "Warehouse Kingpin")
description: Giberson , known as "The Concealer" , is a veteran warehouseman and one of the emperors of the Underworld .

name: Gig
description: Gig is an obese man sporting liberty spikes and a crooked smile. He wears a pearl necklace and a leather jacket.

name: Gill Bastar
description: Gill Bastar was the main character of the one shot Wanted! . He has an extremely high bounty gained from killing many people in self defense.

name: Gimlet
description: Gimlet was the infant son of Senor Pink and Russian .

name: Gin
description: Gin the "Man-Demon" is a pirate and the Combat Commander ( 戦闘総隊長 , Sentō sōtaichō ) of the Krieg Pirates . He is initially introduced as a mere combatant of Krieg before his actual rank and abilities are made clear.

name: Gina
description: Gina was the female carpenter of the Foxy Pirates . She left the crew sometime during the Timeskip .

name: Ginko
description: Ginko is a little girl who was held captive on Punk Hazard . She was one of the children Momonosuke met when he came to the island. She is only named in the anime.

name: Ginnosuke
description: Ginnosuke is a child who lives in the Flower Capital and attended Sarahebi 's classes during Kaidou 's reign.

name: Ginny
role: East Army Captain of the Revolutionary Army, Slave (former)
description: Ginny was the former East Army commander of the Revolutionary Army , having joined the group alongside Bartholomew Kuma 22 years ago, back when they were known as the Freedom Fighters . She was the late mother of Jewelry Bonney .

name: Ginrummy
description: Ginrummy is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates .

name: Giro Chintaro
description: Giro Chintaro is a samurai from Wano Country who was appointed as the kaishakunin for Zorojuro 's seppuku ritual.

name: Giolla
description: Giolla is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Trebol Army.

name: Gion
description: Gion , better known by her alias Momousagi , is a Marine vice admiral .

name: Giovanni
description: Giovanni is a zebra mink and one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad .

name: Gismonda
description: Gismonda has a brush-like, bluish-gray beard. He wears a long white robe which covers his whole body and a white beaded necklace with a light blue bead in the middle. His mask is dark red and has an angry expression, with black hair which is flat and dreadlock-like.

name: Gladius
description: Gladius is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Pica Army.

name: Gloriosa
description: Gloriosa , more commonly known as " Elder Nyon ", is an advisor of sorts to the current empress of the Kuja tribe, Boa Hancock . Gloriosa is a former empress and captain of the Kuja Pirates from three generations prior to Hancock. She is also a former member of the legendary Rocks Pirates .

name: Glove
description: Commander Glove is a Marine commander that participated in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby .

name: Glutbunny
description: Glutbunny , also known as the Ear God , was a giant rabbit that lived in the Land of Gods and was revered by its residents. It was killed by Luffy and eaten by the Straw Hat Pirates ' Monster Trio.

name: Gode
description: Sage Gode is one of the three Birkan clergymen who lived on Skypiea and served Enel .

name: Going Merry
description: The Going Merry was the first full-sized ship owned by the Straw Hat Pirates , a caravel that served as their main transportation through the East Blue , and the Grand Line up until Water 7 . It was often affectionally referred to as simply Merry ( メリー , Merī ) by the crew.

name: Goki
description: Goki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "five".

name: Gol D. Roger
description: Gol D. Roger , more commonly known as Gold Roger , was a legendary pirate who, as captain of the Roger Pirates , held the title of Pirate King and possessed the legendary treasure known as the One Piece . He was also the lover of Portgas D. Rouge and the biological father of Portgas D. Ace .

name: Goldberg
description: Goldberg is a giant from Elbaph who is the cook of the New Giant Warrior Pirates and was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery .

name: Goldfish Princess
description: The Goldfish Princess is a character in the Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll cover story.

name: Gomorrah
description: Gomorrah is one of the two gigantic King Bulls owned by the Franky Family , the other being Sodom .

name: Gonbe
description: Gonbe is Chimney 's pet rabbit, though she firmly believes him to be a cat.

name: Goo
description: Captain Goo is a pirate captain who, along with his crew, had their shadows stolen by Gecko Moria .

name: Googly-Eyed
description: Googly-Eyed is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon .

name: Gorilla
description: Captain Gorilla is a Marine officer who was sent to investigate the Nightmare of Baldimore accidentally caused by Franky .

name: Gorishiro
description: Gorishiro is a gorilla that is attached to Mizerka 's body due to her consumption of a gorilla SMILE . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Goro
description: Goro is Toto 's younger brother and Koza 's paternal uncle. He appeared in Gedatsu 's cover story .

name: Gorobe
description: Gorobe is a citizen of Okobore Town in the Kuri region of Wano Country .

name: Gotti
description: "Hit Man" Gotti is an assassin , a combatant in the Fire Tank Pirates , and the husband of Charlotte Lola .

name: Grabar
description: Grabar is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit . She is Leo 's grandmother.

name: Gram
description: Gram was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Great Michael
description: Great Michael is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Guernika
description: Guernika was a masked agent of CP0 . While in Wano Country for negotiations with Shogun Kurozumi Orochi , Guernika played a relevant role in the Raid on Onigashima . On the World Government 's order, he interfered in the duel between Kaidou and Monkey D. Luffy , resulting in the latter's temporary loss, for which he was murdered by Kaidou as punishment.

name: Guillotine
description: Guillotine is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Gurutaro
description: Gurutaro is a samurai who was part of the Mimawarigumi 41 years ago. He was also a retainer of the Kouzuki Family .

name: Gustav
description: Gustav is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Gyaro
description: Gyaro is a member of the Macro Pirates . He is a pop-eyed goldfish fish-man . He was also a member of the Sun Pirates , before its disbanding.

name: Gyogyo
description: Gyogyo is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom , having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since childhood.

name: Gyoru
description: Gyoru is a fishmonger in Foosha Village and the husband of Chicken . Luffy bought fish from him when he was a kid.

name: Gyro
crew: Gyro Pirates , New Fish-Man Pirates (ruse, former)
description: Crab-Hand Gyro is the captain of the Gyro Pirates from South Blue that was on its way to the New World before an unfortunate meeting with the New Fish-Man Pirates .

name: Hack
role: Revolutionary Army member Fish-Man Karate Instructor Fish-Man Jujutsu Martial Artist
description: "Hundredth Dan" Hack is a Japanese soldierfish fish-man and a member of the Revolutionary Army , which he serves as combat instructor. He went to Dressrosa to investigate the arms trafficking there and competed at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Hack (Archaeologist)
description: Hack was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Hajrudin
role: Captain of the Sixth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: Hajrudin is a giant warrior described as being from the "new generation" of Elbaph . He is the illegitimate son of the late King Harald and his original lover Ida , as well as the older half-brother of Prince Loki .

name: Hakowan
description: Hakowan is Wapol 's pet dog, acquired after Wapol was permanently deposed from Drum Island .

name: Hakugan
description: Hakugan is the helmsman of the Heart Pirates .

name: Ham Burger
description: Ham Burger is the king of the Ballywood Kingdom , acting as chairman of the most recent Levely .

name: Hamburg
description: Hamburg is a combatant of the Foxy Pirates and the leader of the Groggy Monsters . Alongside Porche , he is one of Foxy 's last remaining crewmates.

name: Hamlet
description: Hamlet is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Hammond
description: Hammond is a Daggertooth pike conger fish-Man and a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates .

name: Han
description: Han is a small child with a round head, small eyes, a small round nose, and dark colored hair with a top knot. He is missing a front tooth, and he has snot dripping out of his nose.

name: Hana
description: O-Hana is a citizen of Wano Country , residing in the Flower Capital .

name: Hanafuda
description: Hanafuda , also known as the "King of Lizards" , was a former Warlord of the Sea and affiliate of the Beasts Pirates who was defeated by Portgas D. Ace four years ago. Following his expulsion and eventual death at the hands of rival pirates , his Warlord position was given to Bartholomew Kuma . He was also the father of Ulti and Page One .

name: Hangan
description: Hangan is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Hanger
description: Hanger is an employee at Robecca Hanberg , a clothing store in Loguetown . Nami tried on all of his best clothes, but did not buy any.

name: Hanji
description: Hanji is a resident of Wano Country who has been running a pawn shop for over 10 years.

name: Hanji (Prisoner)
description: Hanji is a former prisoner of Udon 's Prisoner Mine .

name: Hannyabal
description: Hannyabal is the warden of Impel Down . Formerly the Vice Warden, he was promoted to Magellan 's position following the mass breakout .

name: Hanzo
description: Hanzo is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Happa Yamao
description: Happa Yamao is a civilian of Water 7 whom Usopp bought wood and supplies from in order to repair the Going Merry . He is an old bandit turned carpenter who moved to Water 7 from the "Gourmet City", Pucci .

name: Happygun
description: Happygun is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Hara
description: Hara is a resident who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country .

name: Harald
description: Harald was the most recent king of Elbaph and a member of the Knights of God . He is the father of Hajrudin and Loki , born respectively from Ida , his original lover, and Estrid , his official spouse.

name: Haredas
description: Haredas is an old man who lives in Weatheria . He was Nami 's tutor in weather-manipulation during the timeskip.

name: Hareji
description: Hareji is a former prisoner of Udon 's prisoner mines. In the past, he was a resident of the Flower Capital . In the anime credits and closed captions, he was named Tetsu ( テツ ) .

name: Haritsu Kendiyo
description: Haritsu Kendiyo is a pirate captain whose crew was captured by the Kid Pirates as they tried to escape back to Paradise from the New World .

name: Haruta
description: Haruta is the former 12th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Hasami
description: Hasami is a giant desert crab from Sandy Island , and a friend of Matsuge the camel. Originally an inhabitant of the deserts near Rainbase , he currently works as an employee of Ukkari Hot-Spring Island .

name: Hatcha
description: Hatcha is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "eight".

name: Hatchan
description: Hatchan , nicknamed " Hachi " ( ハチ , Hachi ) , is an octopus fish-man who was an officer of the Arlong Pirates before their defeat, and a member of the Sun Pirates before that.

name: Hatsume
description: Hatsume is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates . She was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death.

name: Hattori
description: Hattori is Rob Lucci 's pet pigeon, and initially acted as the target of his ventriloquism.

name: Hawkman
description: Hawkman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Headband Catfish Village Elder
description: The Headband Catfish Village Elder is the chief of the Headband Catfish Village .

name: Heat
description: Heat has long light blue, shaggy hair. His mouth stretches to the sides of his face like a Glasgow smile . He has black sunken eyes and visible bone ridges on his forehead. There are stitched scars at his chin, mouth-line, and the high point of his cheeks. Tattoos resembling barbed wire run along his shoulders, arms, and neck.

name: Helmeppo
description: Lieutenant Commander Helmeppo is a Marine officer and the son of ex-Marine Captain "Axe-Hand" Morgan . Once a civilian who shamelessly exploited his father's status, he (together with Koby ) underwent extensive training under Vice Admiral Garp to become a full-fledged serviceman, currently holding the rank of lieutenant commander . He is also a member of the secret group known as SWORD .

name: Heppoko
description: Heppoko is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Peppoko and Poppoko .

name: Hera (Gladiator)
description: Hera is a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum that competed for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Hera
description: Hera the Thundercloud is a thundercloud homie created by Big Mom at Wano Country as a replacement for Zeus . She is a special kind of homie, having received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, and serves as one of her personal weapons, alongside Prometheus and Napoleon .

name: Heracles
description: Heracles is a strange warrior that used to reside in the Greenstone forest in the Boin Archipelago . He trained Usopp in the use of Pop Greens for two years.

name: Herb
description: Herb was a Shandia from 400 years ago. She was Kalgara 's wife and Mousse 's mother.

name: Hewitt
description: Hewitt was the chef of the Bellamy Pirates .

name: Hibari
description: Hibari is a Marine Commander and a member of SWORD .

name: Hidayu
description: Hidayu is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Higuma
description: Higuma was a bandit and the leader of the Higuma Bandits ( ヒグマ山賊団 , Higuma Sanzoku-dan ) , active in the mountains of Dawn Island . He was the first antagonist to be introduced in the series, and the first of three in the Romance Dawn Arc (third of three in the anime).

name: Hihimaru
description: Hihimaru is a baboon that was formerly a guard for the Beasts Pirates before being tamed by Tama .

name: Hikkomitsukumai
description: Hikkomitsukumai is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family and a prison guard who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country .

name: Hikoichi
description: Hikoichi is a member of the Arabasta Kingdom 's Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Hildon
description: Hildon was a Wild Zombie that resembled a stitched-up vampire. He appeared to act as a messenger in-between the members of Thriller Bark 's Mysterious Four , reporting to them noteworthy events that were happening throughout the island ship before it fell.

name: Hilmungardr
description: Hilmungardr is a giant serpent that lives in the Land of Gods .

name: Himuro
description: Himuro is a samurai and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He was previously a member of the Mimawarigumi , which served as the police force of the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Hina
devil_fruit: Bind-Bind Fruit ( VIZ ); Cage-Cage Fruit ( 4Kids , Funimation )
description: "Black Cage" Hina is a Marine Rear Admiral and a former classmate of Vice Admiral Smoker . She currently leads the Black Cage Corps , a unit (containing Jango and Fullbody among others) tasked with patrolling the seas around the Arabasta Kingdom .

name: Hinokizu
description: Hinokizu is the name given to a mysterious man possessing a burn scar. He is rumored to possess the Road Poneglyph that was once on Fish-Man Island and whose location is now unknown. He is said to sail on an all-black ship .

name: Hip
description: Hip is a woman with short light colored hair. She wears a short sleeved dark shirt and a light tank top with some writing on it.

name: Hippan Natte
description: Hippan Natte is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Hippie
description: Hippie the Skull Curry is the captain of the Endurance Curry Pirates .

name: Hippo Gentleman
description: Hippo Gentleman was a Wild Zombie who was the vice commander of the Wild Zombies.

name: Hiramera
description: Hiramera is an olive flounder mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Hiriluk
description: Dr. Hiriluk was a quack doctor from Drum Island , as well as Tony Tony Chopper 's father figure. He was also a former thief.

name: Hiro Gomon
description: Hiro Gomon is a member of the Endurance Curry Pirates .

name: Hiroshi
description: Hiroshi is a resident of Bakura Town in Wano Country who runs a restaurant alongside Wakasa; the two of them own a tanuki named Saikoro which the sumo wrestler Urashima forced to be cooked and served to him.

name: Hitsugisukan
description: Duke Hitsugisukan is a sheep mink and the former ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom before Inuarashi and Nekomamushi .

name: Ho
description: Dr. Ho is the palace medic of Arabasta 's royal family. He seems to hold Drum medicine in high regard.

name: Hocha
description: Hocha was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Hocker
description: Hocker was the owner of the Pet Food Shop in Orange Town and the owner of Chouchou .

name: Hody Jones
description: Hody Jones is a great white shark fish-man , the captain of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall, and a former soldier of the Neptune Army .

name: Hoe
description: Hoe is the pet whale of King Neptune who uses him as a means of transportation. The only word he can say is his own name.

name: Hogback
description: Doctor Hogback is the world-renowned "Genius Surgeon" who joined the Thriller Bark Pirates under the employment of Gecko Moria and assisted him in creating his undead army . He was one of the crew's Mysterious Four and the secondary antagonist of the Thriller Bark Saga . He also acts as the de facto main antagonist in the anime only Great Mikoshi Race Arc .

name: Michael and Hoichael
description: Michael and Hoichael are two troublemaker children in the backstreets of Water 7 . They idolize Franky , and even dress like him and use his motto as their own: "Mm, super!!", and similarly idolize Paulie . However, their backstreet delinquency has earned them ire from at least Tilestone and Peepley Lulu . Before the timeskip , they were part of class 6-5 of the Water 7 Back Alley Elementary School ( ウォーターセブン裏町小学校 , Wōtā Sebun Uramachi Shōgakkō , VIZ: "Water Seven Back Alley Elementary School") backstreet elementary school.

name: Hoisassa
description: Hoisassa is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family .

name: Holed'em
description: Holed'em is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates , who resides in Bakura Town . He is the son of Norinosuke , a Wano Country citizen.

name: Holy
description: Holy is a dog raised and trained by Ohm . In addition to being Ohm's pet , he is a skilled martial artist in his own right.

name: Home
description: Home is a bull that acted as a steed for Ashura Doji .

name: Hongo
description: Hongo is the one of the Senior Officers and the doctor of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Honner
description: Dr. Honner was the doctor aboard Mont Blanc Noland 's expedition fleet 400 years ago.

name: Hop
description: Hop is a woman with long light colored hair tied in a high ponytail. She wears an open dark jacket and a skirt.

name: Horseman
description: Horseman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates and an attendant of Bao Huang .

name: Hotei
description: Hotei is the former captain of the Mimawarigumi , a samurai police force in Wano Country that served the shogun Kurozumi Orochi until he was deposed by Kaidou .

name: Hotori and Kotori
description: Hotori and Kotori are the younger triplet brothers of Satori . They are lieutenants of the Divine Soldiers , an army of 50 warriors under the command of Yama , their leader, and Enel . Hotori is the middle triplet, while Kotori is the youngest. They are minor antagonists during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Hototogisu
description: Hototogisu is a Marine Vice Admiral and a subordinate of Vice Admiral Tsuru .

name: Hound
description: Hound is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: House
description: House is a woman with wild hair, with some of it arranged in the shape of a small pair of horns above her head. She wears a knee-length dress with an open shirt-collar and which sports a cross design printed on its front with many matching circles near the hem.

name: Hublot
description: Hublot is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Humphrey
description: Humphrey is a bartender at Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Hustle
description: Hustle is a member of the Krieg Pirates and a combat instructor.

name: Hyougoro
description: Hyougoro of the Flower is the former yakuza boss of the Flower Capital and the most famous yakuza in Wano Country during the first Kouzuki Family 's reign. During Kurozumi Orochi 's reign, he was imprisoned in Udon 's prisoner mines until he was freed by Monkey D. Luffy . As a prisoner, he was known as Grandpa Hyo ( ヒョウじい , Hyō-jii ) .

name: Hyoutauros
description: Hyoutauros is a former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He is a jaguar centaur .

name: Hyouzou
description: Hyouzou is a blue-ringed octopus merman . Prior to his imprisonment, he was a mercenary and working as the New Fish-Man Pirates ' assassin , and later became one of the officers . Hyouzou was also known as the best swordsman on Fish-Man Island .

name: Ibiributsu
description: Ibiributsu is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region of Wano Country . He is in charge of exchanging meal tickets for kibi dango .

name: Ibusu
description: Ibusu is a supposed pirate captain who affiliates and trades with the Donquixote Pirates . As his ship is later discovered to be a trading vessel for the Doerena Kingdom , it is unknown if he is truly a pirate captain.

name: Iceburg
description: Iceburg is the president of the Galley-La Company and the mayor of Water 7 .

name: Medaka Mermaid Quintuplets
description: The Medaka Mermaid Quintuplets are five young Japanese rice fish mermaids who are friends with Camie . Their names are Ichika ( イチカ ) , Nika ( ニカ ) , Sanka ( サンカ ) , Yonka ( ヨンカ ) , and Yonka Two ( ヨンカツー , Yonka Tsū ) .

name: Ida
description: Ida was a giantess hailing from Samuwanai Island in the South Blue who once worked at a circus in the Bunt Kingdom . She ran a notorious bar alongside Mato in Elbaph .

name: Ideaman
description: Ideaman is a member of Krieg Pirates . He is the Staff Officer of Planning.

name: Ideo
role: Captain of the Fourth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: "Destruction Cannon" Ideo is an XXX-rank boxer and a member of the Longarm Tribe , as well as the captain of the Ideo Pirates and of the fourth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , where he met three other gladiators with whom he would form the then-XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, as well as Monkey D. Luffy , to whom he eventually pledged his loyalty.

name: Igaram
description: Igaram is the captain of the Arabasta royal guard (captain of Arabasta security in the English dub). He aided Nefertari Vivi in infiltrating Baroque Works as a Frontier Agent and took on the codename Mr. 8 . He was partnered with Miss Monday . He is also Terracotta 's husband. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whisky Peak (after being a minor antagonist) and Arabasta Arcs.

name: Ikaros Much
description: Ikaros Much is a giant squid fish-man and was an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment.

name: Ikkaku
description: Ikkaku is a member of the Heart Pirates .

name: Ikkaku (Wano)
description: Ikkaku is an announcer who commentates sumo matches in Bakura Town in Wano Country .

name: Inazuma
devil_fruit: Snip-Snip Fruit (VIZ and Funimation); Shear-Shear Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
description: Inazuma is a newkama and the deputy commander of the G Army in the Revolutionary Army , serving under Emporio Ivankov as his right hand man/woman.

name: Inbi
description: Inbi is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "one".

name: Indigo
description: Dr. Indigo is the scientist of the Golden Lion Pirates and the secondary antagonist of the tenth One Piece movie . He is the one who created Boss and the other monstrous animals under Shiki 's dominion.

name: Inhel
description: Inhel is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field.

name: Inoichibannosuke
description: Inoichibannosuke is a firefighter who works for the fire department Igumi ( い組 ) , which he claims is the best in Wano Country .

name: Inuarashi
description: Duke Inuarashi is a canine mink . He was one of the two rulers of the Mokomo Dukedom , dubbed the " Ruler of Day ", holding the position from 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM. He currently serves as the daimyo of Kuri .

name: Inukai
description: Inukai is a man with very thick black eyebrows and a pointy black mustache. He has long brown hair that curls on the sides and is tied in a topknot at the back. He wears a light green kimono with small green dots, and a green coat with yellow-brown circle patterns.

name: Inuppe
description: Inuppe was a Wild Zombie on Thriller Bark in the service of Gecko Moria . He was animated with Sanji 's shadow and eventually assigned to guard Hogback .

name: Ipponmatsu
description: Ipponmatsu is the owner of an arms shop in Loguetown and Ipponume 's husband. He was the former owner of both Sandai Kitetsu and Yubashiri .

name: Ipponume
description: Ipponume is a tall, large woman with a pointed nose, low ears, long eyelashes, thin eyebrows, and shoulder-length, curly red hair. She wears a light-colored polo shirt, a light-colored skirt, a dark-colored sweater, and a dark-colored cap with stars on it.

name: Isa
description: Isa is a Shandia woman and Aisa 's mother.

name: Iscat
description: Iscat is a giant cat previously locked in the Land of Gods ' diorama, where it ruled Bigstein Castle . It is the Sun God's pet.

name: Ishigo Shitemanna
description: Ishigo Shitemanna is an appraiser in Water 7 .

name: Ishilly
description: Ishilly is a striped beakfish mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Island Eater
description: Island Eater was a giant goldfish that inhabited the sea near Little Garden . He was said to be the main reason ships leaving the island never reached their destination. He was classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Islewan
description: Islewan is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates , before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard .

name: Issho
description: Issho , better known by his alias Fujitora , is an Admiral in the Marines . Once the captain of a guard force in the former Aoi Kingdom , he was conscripted through a World Military Draft during the two-year timeskip, being appointed to fill one of the Admiral vacancies caused by Kuzan 's resignation and Sakazuki 's promotion alongside his co-worker Ryokugyu . A proponent of "Humane Justice", Fujitora notably spearheaded a campaign for the abolishment of the " Seven Warlords of the Sea " system, which came to pass during the most recent Levely .

name: Isuka
description: "Nailing" Isuka is a Marine Ensign that confronted the Spade Pirates during their time of activity.

name: Itomimizu
description: Itomimizu is the former Foxy Pirates ' game official and serves as the announcer and commentator of the Davy Back Fight events. He rides on a very large bird named Chuchun .

name: Ivan X
description: Ivan X is a member of the Arabasta Kingdom 's Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Iwatobi
description: Iwatobi is the king of the Whiteland Kingdom ( ホワイトランド王国 , Howaitorando Ōkoku ) in the North Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Iyan'eno Chinode
description: Iyan'eno Chinode is a writer for the fashion column "Streetcorner Collection" in the World Economy News Paper .

name: Izou
description: Izou was the former 16th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates and prior to this, a retainer of the Wano Country daimyo Kouzuki Oden . He was the older brother of fellow retainer Kikunojo .

name: Jabari
description: Jabari is a serious-looking man who sports sunglasses and parted light hair. As part of his job to infiltrate the World Economy News Paper , he donned Attach 's clothes and a latex mask of the reporter.

name: Jabra
description: Jabra is an agent of CP0 . He was previously an agent of CP9 , being the third strongest of this agency.

name: Jack
devil_fruit: Elephant-Elephant Fruit, Ancient Zoan Model: Mammoth (Funimation), Eleph-Eleph Fruit Ancient Zoan Model Mammoth
description: Jack the Drought is a giant grouper fish-man , an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates as one of Kaidou 's three closest confidants , and captain of the Mammoth , prior to its destruction. He was formerly the ruler of Kuri region in Wano Country .

name: Zombie
description: Zombies are corpses capable of self-movement and other sentient actions. Well-known in superstitions and literature throughout the world , they can be created in actuality through at least one method: infusing corpses with shadows via the Kage Kage no Mi .

name: Jacksonbanner
description: Jacksonbanner was the musician of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Jaguar
description: Jaguar is a large muscular man with light colored hair. He wears a tank top which right side is dark colored and the right is light colored with dark circles, and an image of a panda at the center, shorts and boxing gloves.

name: Jaguar D. Saul
description: Jaguar D. Saul is a giant and former Vice Admiral who deserted the Marines and happened to wash ashore on Ohara .

name: Jaki
description: Jaki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "four".

name: Jalmack
description: Saint Jalmack is a World Noble who visited the Goa Kingdom twelve years ago.

name: Jango
description: The subject of this article is sometimes called Django .

name: Jarul
description: "Mountain Beard" Jarul is a giant and former co-captain of the Giant Warrior Pirates , alongside Jorul . Along with Jorul, he is known as a hero of the giants, and after Jorul's death, Jarul is currently the oldest giant in the world.

name: Jaygarcia Saturn
description: Saint Jaygarcia Saturn was a World Noble who served as one of the Five Elders publicly heading the World Government . A scientist by trade, he held the title Warrior God of Science and Defense during his tenure.

name: Jean Ango
description: Jean Ango , also known as Jean the Bandit , is a bounty hunter . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Jean Bart
description: Jean Bart is a pirate who was originally introduced as Saint Rosward 's slave, being part of his Pirate Captain Collection. He currently serves under Trafalgar Law as a member of the Heart Pirates after being freed from the World Noble .

name: Jean Goen
description: Jean Goen is a prisoner on Level 1 of Impel Down .

name: Jean Noueilles
description: Jean Noueilles , also known as Captain Porcupinefish , is a porcupinefish fish-man and a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates . He was the commander of the Sea Urchin Armor Spine Squad.

name: Jeep
description: Jeep is the king of the South Fire Kingdom ( 南ファイアー王国 , Minami Faiā Ōkoku , WT100 2nd : "Kingdom of South Firea" ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . He is also the father of Wheel .

name: Jeet
description: Jeet is a criminal and a former bounty hunter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , along with his partner, Abdullah . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc . After the battle with the Donquixote Pirates at Dressrosa , he joined the XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, which later converted to a pirate crew called the Ideo Pirates .

name: Jerry
description: Jerry is a Cipher Pol agent of CP6 . He was found as head of security of the Puffing Tom 's seventh passenger car, which Sanji invaded to rescue Nico Robin . He comes from Karate Island in the South Blue , and claims to be a boxing champion.

name: Jero
description: Jero is a member of the G-5 branch of the Marines .

name: Jesus Burgess
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the First Ship)
description: Jesus Burgess , better known as the "Champion" , is the helmsman and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the first ship of the fleet .

name: Jew Wall
description: A logbook is a record of events on a voyage. It is common practice for ships to maintain a log and fill it in daily.

name: Jewelry Bonney
description: Jewelry Bonney , also known as the "Big Eater" , is a pirate from the South Blue and the captain of the Bonney Pirates . She is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation " and the only female member of the group.

name: Jibuemon
description: Jibuemon is a former retainer from Kibi serving under the Kouzuki Shogunate . As a hatamoto , he directly served under the former shogun , Kouzuki Sukiyaki .

name: Jigoku Benten
description: Jigoku Benten is a kunoichi and a member of the Beasts Pirates . She previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Jigokukamabuta Megatenpanchiro
description: Jigokukamabuta Megatenpanchiro was a retainer of Shimotsuki Family under the Daimyo of Hakumai , Shimotsuki Yasuie .

name: Jigoro
description: Jigoro of the Wind was a master swordsman who was subsequently revived by Gecko Moria as Zombie #850 , a General Zombie . He was animated with Zoro 's shadow and eventually assigned to guard Hogback .

name: Jigra
description: Jigra was an organ trader and a member of the Underworld who attempted to attack the Big Mom Pirates . In the anime, he is also part of the Organ Dealing Assassination Group .

name: Jinbe
description: "Knight of the Sea" Jinbe is the helmsman of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is the tenth member of the crew and the ninth to join, doing so during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Jiron
description: Jiron is the deputy commander of the North Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Karasu .

name: Jobo
description: He is a normal sized man, with stubble on his chin and upper lip. He has a large nose, and longish black hair. He wears a hat with a bandana underneath, and has a small scar under his right eye. Evidently a drunkard, his face is often flushed and lethargic-looking.

name: Johanna
description: Johanna is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: John
description: Captain John was a famous pirate captain who was once a member of the infamous Rocks Pirates prior to forming his own crew. He was notable for collecting one of the most significant treasures in the world; his fabled treasure cave and the riches within, which are notably long sought after by Buggy .

name: John Giant
description: John Giant is a Vice Admiral in the Marine Headquarters , and the first giant to ever enlist in the Marines .

name: Johnny
description: Johnny along with Yosaku are old friends and former bounty hunting partners of Roronoa Zoro .

name: Jorge
description: Jorge was the head of the Judicial Ship that sailed to Water 7 . He was the one who judged Tom for his support of the Pirate King Gol D. Roger .

name: Jorul
description: "Waterfall Beard" Jorul was a giant and former co- captain of the Giant Warrior Pirates , along with Jarul . He was known as a hero of the giants and one of the world's oldest warriors.

name: Joseph
description: Joseph is a masked agent of CP0 and a Longarm tribesman .

name: Joshu
description: Joshu is a cat and Edison 's assistant on Egghead .

name: Joy Boy
description: Joy Boy was a man from the Great Kingdom born 900 years ago at the start of the Void Century , as well as the first pirate in history. An extremely relevant figure in the Void Century, Joy Boy was a chief opponent of the alliance that would eventually become the World Government in the Great War . He played an important role in the history of Fish-Man Island and left behind a vast treasure on the last island of the Grand Line , thus becoming a legendary figure in the world .

name: Jozu
description: "Diamond" Jozu is the former 3rd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates , serving as one of the crew's most prominent members.

name: Jugemu Jugemuko
description: Jugemu Jugemuko is a young girl from the Hakumai region of the Wano Country . She is the sister of Chokyumei-no Chosuke .

name: Jujiro
description: Jujiro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Juki
description: Juki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "ten".

name: Julius
description: Julius is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Jumper
description: Jumper is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Junan
description: Junan is a codfish fish-man and a cashier at Pappag 's Criminal Brand store.

name: Kabu
description: Kabu is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who is the leader of the Yellow Kabu Squad and a member of the Tontatta Pirates .

name: Kadar
description: Rear Admiral Kadar is a Marine Rear Admiral at the G-2 Marine base from fifteen years ago. His current location and rank are unknown.

name: Kagero
description: Kagero is a priest and samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance for the Raid on Onigashima .

name: Kagikko
description: Kagikko is a member of the Krieg Pirates and a locksmith.

name: Kaidou
devil_fruit: Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon Fish-Fish Fruit, Azure Dragon Model
description: Kaidou of the Beasts , renowned as the world 's "Strongest Creature" , is the Governor-General of the Beasts Pirates and was formerly one of the Four Emperors who ruled over the New World . He is also the father of Yamato .

name: Kairen
description: Kairen is a righteye flounder mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Kairiken
description: Kairiken is a bounty hunter at Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Kairo Kureyo
description: Kairo Kureyo is a prisoner on Level 5 of Impel Down .

name: Kaku
description: Kaku is a masked agent of CP0 . He was previously an assassin of CP9 , operating undercover in order to obtain the Pluton blueprints from Iceburg . While undercover, he acted as one of the five foremen of Galley-La Company 's Dock One, specializing in mechanics, diagnostics, and housecalls.

name: Kaku (Wano)
description: Kaku is a gangster who is a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country .

name: Kakukaku
description: Kakukaku is a resident of Water 7 who was among the townspeople as they discussed the attempted murder of Iceburg .

name: Kakunoshin
description: Kakunoshin is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Kalgara
description: Kalgara was a warrior of the Shandia who lived on Jaya around 400 years ago. He was renowned among his people as the "Great Warrior of Shandora" and feared as the "Demon of Shandora" by outsiders. During his life, he befriended the later infamous explorer Mont Blanc Noland , and the two promised to meet again. However, both men met tragic ends before this promise could be fulfilled.

name: Kalifa
description: Kalifa is an agent of CP0 . Before the timeskip, she was an agent of CP9 , operating undercover as Iceburg 's secretary at the Galley-La Company . She is also Laskey 's daughter and the older sister of Alpha .

name: Kamakiri
description: Kamakiri is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel . After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper .

name: Kamakirigirl
description: Kamakirigirl is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , she became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Kamekichi
description: Kamekichi is a newspaper deliveryman in the Flower Capital who announced reports of Kamazo the Manslayer and Ushimitsu Kozo .

name: Kamijiro
description: Kamijiro is a lion's head, legs, and tail that are attached to Holed'em 's body due to his consumption of a lion SMILE .

name: Kaneshiro
description: Kaneshiro is the shipwright of the Arlong Pirates and a goldfish fish-man . He was previously a member of the Sun Pirates .

name: Kanezenny
description: Kanezenny is an elderly farm woman from Nico Robin 's past.

name: Kappa
description: Kappa is a young shoeshine-boy in Nanohana .

name: Karasu
role: North Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Karasu is a member of the Revolutionary Army , serving as one of its executive officers and the commander of the North Army.

name: Karin
description: Karin is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Karma
description: Karma is an octopus fish-man and the captain of the Takotopus Pirates , an infamous New World pirate crew subordinate to the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Karoo
crew: Arabasta Kingdom Guard Squad ( Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ), Straw Hat Pirates (former), Baroque Works (former)
description: Karoo is Nefertari Vivi 's pet super spot-billed duck . A fleet riding bird, one of the fastest modes of transportation available in the Arabasta Kingdom , he is captain of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Kasa
description: Kasa is an elderly woman from Raijin Island .

name: Kasagoba
description: Kasagoba is a marbled rockfish fish-man and was a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates prior to their downfall. In the anime, he is named Kasagon ( カサゴン , Kasagon ) .

name: Kashii
description: Kashii , together with Oimo , was one of the two giants who guarded the front gate of Enies Lobby for over fifty years until he and Oimo realized they were tricked by the World Government . He is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He and Oimo became major allies to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Enies Lobby Arc and Egghead Arc .

name: Kashigami
description: Kashigami was a giant snake that lived on Jaya four centuries ago. It was worshiped by the Shandia as a god until it was slain by Mont Blanc Noland . It is the grandparent of Nola , who lives in Skypiea in the present day.

name: Kashigami's Child
description: Kashigami's child was a snake that resided on Jaya over 400 years ago. The offspring of the snake deity Kashigami and parent of Nola , it too was revered as a god by the Shandia but was slain by their warrior Kalgara to aid Mont Blanc Noland .

name: Katsuzo
description: Katsuzo was a yakuza of Wano Country . He died 41 years before the present day, and his cremated body was used by Kouzuki Oden to cook a pot of oden.

name: Kawamatsu
description: Kawamatsu the Kappa is a Japanese puffer fish-man who is a yokozuna -ranked sumo wrestler. As a child, he was shipwrecked in Wano and orphaned soon afterwards. After Kouzuki Oden rescued him from an attempted lynching, he went on to serve as one of Oden's Nine Red Scabbards until Oden's death 20 years ago.

name: Kazekage
description: Kazekage is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Kazenbo
description: Kazenbo was a flaming ghost-like entity created by Kurozumi Kanjuro , with the power of the Fude Fude no Mi , for the purpose of destroying Onigashima . It was created to symbolize the "burning hatred" ( 燃える怨念 , moeru onnen ) of the Kurozumi Family against those who wronged them.

name: Kebi
description: Kebi was a member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army .

name: Kechatch
description: Kechatch is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Keith
description: Keith is a monkey mink and a member of the Guardians who protect the Mokomo Dukedom at night.

name: Kentauros
description: Kentauros is a member of the Arabasta Kingdom 's Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Kelly Funk
description: Kelly Funk is an assassin from the Mogaro Kingdom and Bobby Funk 's older brother. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Kiba
description: Kiba is a giant from Elbaph and the principal of the Walrus School . He is a former member of the Giant Warrior Pirates .

name: Kibagaeru
description: Kibagaeru was the captain of the Fanged Toad Pirates until he lost to Foxy at the Davy Back Fight and joined his crew but eventually left sometime during the Timeskip . Due to his anime-exclusive actions, he can be considered one of the main antagonists of the Foxy's Return Arc .

name: Kibin
description: Commodore Kibin is a Marine officer that participated in the Summit War of Marineford .

name: Kiev
description: Kiev is a ship dismantler from Water 7 . Initially part of the Franky Family , he is now working for the Galley-La Company as part of the Zambai's Company Union.

name: Kikipatsu
description: Kikipatsu is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Kiku (Kuja)
description: Kiku is a member of the Kuja . She is never seen but her name appears on the match-ups of the arena battle board.

name: Kikunojo
description: Kikunojo of the Lingering Snow , more commonly referred to as Kiku , is a samurai from Wano Country and a retainer for the Kouzuki Family , serving as one of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . She is also the younger sister of Izou and the daughter of the dancing school head of the Hanayanagi School ( 花柳流 , Hanayanagi-ryū ) in Ringo .

name: Kikyo
description: Kikyo is a Kuja warrior from Amazon Lily .

name: Killer
description: "Massacre Soldier" Killer is a pirate from the South Blue and a combatant of the Kid Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". After the timeskip, his bounty has been raised from 162,000,000 to 200,000,000.

name: Kimel
description: Kimel is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Kin'emon
devil_fruit: Garb-Garb Jutsu (VIZ and Funimation); Garb-Garb Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
description: "Foxfire" Kin'emon is a samurai from the region of Kuri in Wano Country who currently serves the shogunate as a great elder in the Flower Capital . Once a thug in his youth, he became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family and the leader of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . He was born 56 years before the present day, but traveled 20 years forward in time when he was 36 years old.

name: Kinbo
description: Kinbo is a boy who lives in Okobore Town of Kuri with his mother Yame and his little brother.

name: Kinderella
description: Kinderella , also known as Miss Universe , is a woman who married Wapol after he became the head of his own corporation. Two years after that, she became the queen of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom when Wapol became its king .

name: King
description: King the Conflagration is one of the three All-Stars of the Beasts Pirates and Kaidou 's right-hand man. Born as Arber , he is a member of the near-extinct lunarian race from the Red Line , noted for their ability to create fire.

name: Kingbaum
description: Kingbaum is a tree homie , a member of the Big Mom Pirates , and the master of the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island . However, he was forced to serve the Straw Hat Pirates due to them possessing Charlotte Linlin 's Vivre Card .

name: Kinga
description: Kinga is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard .

name: Kingdew
description: Kingdew is the former 11th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Kinoko
description: Kinoko is a former prisoner on Level 5 of Impel Down and is currently a member of the Buggy Pirates , joining after his escape from Impel Down and the Summit War of Marineford .

name: Kirinkodanuki
crew: Animals of the Island of Rare Animals
description: Kirinkodanuki is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals . Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon .

name: Kirintauros
description: Kirintauros is a former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He is a giraffe centaur .

name: Kisegawa
description: Kisegawa is a geisha from the Flower Capital of Wano Country . She once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima .

name: Kitton
description: Kitton is a boy who lives in Karakuri Island . He has a grandfather who takes care of him, as well as a cyborg dog named Taroimo .

name: Mozu and Kiwi
description: Mozu and Kiwi , also known as the Square Sisters due to their square-like hairstyle, are two women from Water 7 who were part of the Franky Family . They were both very loyal to Franky , going with him everywhere and tending to imitate every pose he made.

name: Koala
origin: Baltigo (former); Foolshout Island (former); Mary Geoise (former); Momoiro Island
description: Koala is a high ranking officer of the Revolutionary Army , serving as the Fish-Man Karate assistant instructor. She started as a slave on Mary Geoise , but was then set free by Fisher Tiger 's rampage. She sailed along with the Sun Pirates to reach her home town . Approximately two years later, she left her family to join the Revolutionary Army, where she often works alongside both Sabo and Hack .

name: Kobe
description: Kobe is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country and the landlord for the Longhouses. He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima .

name: Koby
description: Koby the Hero is a Marine Captain , currently serving in the SWORD special forces unit. Alongside fellow SWORD member Helmeppo , he was trained and mentored into prominence under the legendary Vice Admiral Garp .

name: Koda
description: Koda is a Marine Chef , Kyuji 's wife and mother of Moda .

name: Koito
description: Koito is a young girl residing in Ebisu Town of the Wano Country .

name: Koiwa
description: Koiwa is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago.

name: Kojuro
description: Kojuro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Kokoro
description: Kokoro is an icefish mermaid and the stationmaster for Shift Station , a Sea Train station near Water 7 . She was also Tom 's secretary during the days of Tom's Workers .

name: Komachiyo
description: Komachiyo is a komainu that resides in the Kuri region of Wano Country . It has been Kurozumi Tama 's best friend since their childhood.

name: Komakkov
description: "Winter Cuisine" Komakkov is a chef under the employment of the Marines as one of its Four Head Chefs .

name: Komane
description: Komane is the deposed princess of the Lulusia Kingdom , being the daughter of the former king Seki .

name: Konbu
description: Konbu is a child who lived in Punk Hazard 's Biscuits Room . He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Kong
description: Kong is the Commander-in-Chief of the World Government . He was a Fleet Admiral of the Marines at the time of the Battle of Edd War twenty-seven years ago. Some time after, he was promoted while Sengoku eventually became the new Fleet Admiral.

name: Kop
description: Kop is a very tall and thin man. He has a rectangular shaped face and a triangle shaped nose. He has a piece of orange cloth tied around his head.

name: Koshi Falcon
description: Koshi Falcon is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Kotatsu
description: Kotatsu is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Kotetsu
description: Kotetsu was a swordsmith who crafted the cursed Great Grade sword Nidai Kitetsu . He is an ancestor of the present-day Kouzuki Family in Wano Country , namely Sukiyaki , Oden , Momonosuke , and Hiyori .

name: Kouzuki Hiyori
description: Kouzuki Hiyori is the daughter of the late Kouzuki Oden and Kouzuki Toki and the younger sister of Kouzuki Momonosuke .

name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
devil_fruit: Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon Fish-Fish Fruit, Azure Dragon Model
description: Kouzuki Momonosuke is the current shogun of Wano Country . A member of the Kouzuki Family , he is the son of the late daimyo of Kuri Kouzuki Oden and his wife Toki , the grandson of the former shogun Sukiyaki , and the older brother of Hiyori .

name: Kouzuki Oden
description: Kouzuki Oden was the daimyo of Kuri in Wano Country and the son of the former shogun Kouzuki Sukiyaki , being a member of the Kouzuki Family . He was the husband of Kouzuki Toki and the father of Momonosuke and Hiyori . Additionally, he was the leader of a group of legendary and powerful samurai known as the Nine Red Scabbards , with all of them serving as his retainers and most trusted allies.

name: Kouzuki Sukiyaki
description: Kouzuki Sukiyaki is the former shogun of Wano Country . He is the father of the late daimyo of Kuri , Kouzuki Oden , as well as the paternal grandfather of current shogun Kouzuki Momonosuke and Hiyori . The descendant of the legendary swordsmith Kotetsu , he is a swordsmith by hobby and crafted one of Roronoa Zoro 's swords, Sandai Kitetsu , as well as Ame no Habakiri , which was previously wielded by Oden and currently by his son, Momonosuke.

name: Kouzuki Toki
description: Kouzuki Toki , née Amatsuki , was the wife of the daimyo of Kuri , Kouzuki Oden and the mother of Kouzuki Momonosuke and Kouzuki Hiyori .

name: Koyama
description: Koyama , as named by Kouzuki Oden and his retainers, is a white boar and the child of the Mountain God that lived in the forests of Wano Country as late as thirty years ago. In what became known as the Mountain God Incident , it was kidnapped from its parent and later stolen by Kin'emon . It later became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family alongside its parent.

name: Koza
description: Koza is Princess Nefertari Vivi 's childhood friend. As a child, he was the leader of the Sand-Sand Clan . Years later, he became the leader of the Arabasta Rebellion . He later became the environmental minister of the Arabasta Kingdom .

name: Koze and Packy
description: Koze and Packy were members of the Yes Pirates .

name: Krieg
description: Don Krieg is the admiral of the Krieg Pirates , widely reputed as Foul-Play Krieg for his underhanded methods. At his height, he was also known as the Pirate Fleet Admiral , commanding a fleet of fifty ships (totaling some 5,000 pirates ) throughout the East Blue .

name: Kujaku
description: Kujaku is a Marine Rear Admiral stationed at Marine Base G-14 and also a member of SWORD . She is the granddaughter of Marine Vice Admiral Tsuru .

name: Kukai
description: Kukai is a samurai and member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Kumadori
description: Kumadori is an agent of CP0 . Before the time skip, he was an agent of CP9 . He is also the son of Kumadori Yamanbako .

name: Kumadori Yamanbako
description: Kumadori Yamanbako is the mother of Kumadori who was an assassin like him which means Kumadori followed her footsteps. Kumadori made lots of poetry about his mother in heaven, but in reality she is still alive.

name: Kumae
description: Kumae was a bear introduced in SBS Volume 66 . It was shown to be Perona 's pet when she was young.

name: Kumagoro
description: Kumagoro is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country . He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima .

name: Kumashi
description: Kumashi was a stuffed bear zombie of the Thriller Bark Pirates who acted as Perona 's servant and the commander-in-chief of the Wild Zombies prior to being purified by Usopp .

name: Kuni
description: Kuni is a gangster and a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country .

name: Kunyun
description: Kunyun is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "nine". She works under Black Maria .

name: Kureha
role: Head- Doctor of the Sakura Kingdom
description: Dr. Kureha is an elderly doctor who works on Drum Island . She is referred to as "witch" by some people.

name: Kuro
description: Kuro of a Hundred Plans is the captain of the Black Cat Pirates .

name: Kurokoma
description: Kurokoma was a yakuza of the Flower Capital in Wano Country . Forty-one years before the present day, he was the head of his family.

name: Kuromarimo
description: Kuromarimo was the evil magistrate ( 悪代官 , aku daikan ) during Wapol's rule on Drum Island, and was the highest-ranking law officer below Wapol . After fleeing Drum Island to escape Blackbeard 's attack, Kuromarimo became part of the Bliking Pirates .

name: Kuroobi
description: Kuroobi is a ray fish-man and an officer of the Arlong Pirates , who was once a member of the Sun Pirates . He is one of the major antagonists of the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Kurosawa
description: Kurosawa is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Kurotsuru
description: Dr. Kurotsuru , also named "Dr. Black Beard" based on the same name on the lapel of his coat, is a doctor who appeared in Ace's cover story .

name: Kurozumi Higurashi
description: Kurozumi Higurashi was a member of the Kurozumi Family and a major supporter of Kurozumi Orochi . She was killed by Kaidou for her interruption in his fight with Kouzuki Oden .

name: Kurozumi Kanjuro
description: Kurozumi Kanjuro , nicknamed "Evening Shower" Kanjuro , was a samurai from the Kuri region of Wano Country and a member of the Kurozumi Family . After losing his parents, he was instructed by Kurozumi Orochi to operate undercover within the Kouzuki Family . Kanjuro became Kouzuki Oden 's retainer and one of the Nine Red Scabbards while secretly aiding Orochi in his rise to power and efforts to eliminate the Kouzuki bloodline, by feeding him information.

name: Kurozumi Orochi
devil_fruit: Snake-Snake Fruit, Model: Eight Headed Serpent
description: Kurozumi Orochi was the former shogun of Wano Country and one of the last members of the Kurozumi Family .

name: Kurozumi Semimaru
description: Kurozumi Semimaru was a member of the Kurozumi Family and a major supporter of Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Kurozumi Tama
description: Kurozumi Tama , commonly known as O-Tama ( お玉 ) , is a girl from the region of Kuri in Wano Country . She is a kasa weaver working under Tenguyama Hitetsu , as well as a kunoichi in training under the apprenticeship of Shinobu . She is the last known survivor of the Kurozumi Family .

name: Kuzan
devil_fruit: Ice-Ice Fruit ( Funimation ); Chilly-Chilly Fruit ( VIZ )
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Tenth Ship)
description: Kuzan , better known by his alias Aokiji , is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the tenth ship of the fleet . Before joining Blackbeard 's crew, he served as a Marine Admiral , having been taught by Monkey D. Garp . He was nominated by Sengoku for the position of Fleet Admiral; however, after fighting Sakazuki for the position and losing, Kuzan resigned from the Marines.

name: Kyo
description: Kyo , also known as Silver Axe , is a mobster-turned- pirate , a former member of the Rocks Pirates , and a rival of Shiki .

name: Kyros
description: Kyros is a legendary gladiator who fought in the Corrida Colosseum until he left to become captain of the royal army of Dressrosa.
