He was later turned into a toy , causing everyone to forget his existence, becoming a One-Legged Soldier ( 片足の兵隊 , Kata-ashi no Heitai ) , also known as the " Thunder Soldier of Rage ". He is the former captain of the Riku Royal Army , the father of Rebecca , the husband of Scarlett , and the son-in-law of Riku Doldo III .

name: Kyuin
description: Kyuin is a former member of the Donquixote Pirates , and the former boss of the SMILE Factory on Dressrosa .

name: Kyuji
description: Kyuji is a Marine chef , Koda 's husband, and Moda 's father.

name: Kyukyu
description: Dr. Kyukyu is a doctor in Water 7 . He examined Iceburg after he was shot by the CP9 .

name: Laboon
description: Laboon is an Island Whale the Straw Hat Pirates encounter immediately after entering the Grand Line . He is native to the West Blue and is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly", and at the top of both the size and friendliness scale.

name: Lacroix
description: Vice Admiral Lacroix is a Marine vice admiral and a member of the Giant Squad .

name: Lacuba
description: Lacuba is a pirate famed as a devious tactician who was captured and taken to the Human Auctioning House .

name: Lady Tree
description: Lady Tree is a tree homie living in the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island . She's also Kingbaum 's fiancée.

name: Laffitte
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Fifth Ship)
description: Laffitte , nicknamed "Demon Sheriff" , is the navigator and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the fifth ship of the fleet . He is also a former West Blue policeman known for countless acts of police brutality, which resulted in his exile from that sea.

name: Lao G
description: Lao G is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army.

name: Laskey
description: Laskey is a former CP9 agent and the father of current Cipher Pol agents Kalifa and Alpha .

name: Lassoo
devil_fruit: Mutt-Mutt Fruit, Dachshund Type ( Viz ); Mutt-Mutt Fruit ( 4Kids ); Mutt-Mutt Fruit Fruit, Dachshund Variety ( Funimation )
description: Lassoo is Mr. 4 's gun that consumed a Devil Fruit through some unknown method which allows it to become a living dog. He is classified as a Type D creature, "Small Savage".

name: Lemoncheese
description: Lemoncheese is the queen of the Bestland Kingdom ( ベストランド王国 , Besutorando Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Leo
devil_fruit: Stitch-Stitch Power (VIZ and Funimation); Sew-Sew Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
role: Captain of the Fifth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: "Warrior" Leo is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and the leader of the " Tonta Corps " ( トンタ兵長 , Tonta-heichō ) , which was later reformed as a pirate crew now known as the Tontatta Pirates , with Leo now acting as the captain. He is the captain of the fifth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Leonero
description: Leonero is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Vegapunk/Lilith
description: Lilith , also designated as Punk-02 ( PUNK-02 , Panku-Tsū ) , is one of six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "evil".

name: Lily
description: Lily was a member of the Bellamy Pirates . She was first seen with Sarquiss on Jaya Island. She was the only member of the minor crew members in Bellamy's crew that was openly named. Lily appeared in most of the events the crew were involved with during the Jaya Arc. She was last seen when Doflamingo came to punish Bellamy .

name: Limejuice
description: Limejuice is one of the Senior Officers of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Linaria
description: "Igniting" Linaria is the captain of the Night Butterfly Pirates , a crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Lindbergh
role: South Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Lindbergh , or "Lind" for short, is a cat mink and the commander of the Revolutionary Army 's South Army.

name: Lines
description: Seaman First Class Lines is a former subordinate of Fullbody from his time as a lieutenant .

name: Lionbuta
crew: Animals of the Island of Rare Animals
description: Lionbuta is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals . Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon .

name: Lip Doughty
description: Lip "Service" Doughty was one of the rookies who had joined the ranks of the Fake Straw Hat Crew . He had a bounty of 88,000,000.

name: Little Oars Jr.
description: Little Oars Jr. (also referred to as Oars III on his flag) is the captain of the Little Pirates , a descendant of Oars , and a former subordinate of the Whitebeard Pirates . He is among the several New World pirates that aided the Whitebeard Pirates in saving Ace from execution by the World Government .

name: Loki
description: Loki is the prince of Elbaph , the son of King Harald and Queen Estrid , the younger half-brother of Hajrudin , and the foster son of Ida .

name: Lola (Zombie)
description: Lola was a Wild Zombie created by Dr. Hogback and animated by Gecko Moria 's powers , using the shadow of Charlotte Lola .

name: Lonz
description: Vice Admiral Lonz is a Marine vice admiral who is also part of the Giant Squad .

name: Lord of the Coast
description: The Lord of the Coast is a Sea King that inhabits the waters of Dawn Island , typically near Foosha Village . He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Lord of the Coast (Long Ring Long Land)
description: The Lord of the Coast is a large Sea King that inhabits the waters around Long Ring Long Land .

name: Louis Arnote
description: Louis Arnote is an explorer and one of the people whose adventures are recorded in Brag Men , a book of Grand Line tales.

name: Love
description: Love is a former Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak .

name: Lucky Roux
description: Lucky Roux is one of the Senior Officers , and the cook of the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Lu Feld
description: Lu Feld , known as the "God of Fortune" , is the "Loan Shark King" ( 闇金王 , Yamikin-Ō ) . He is a member of the Lu Feld Conglomerate ( ルフェルド財閥 , Ru Ferudo Zaibatsu ) , the former financer of MADS , and an emperor of the Underworld .

name: Lulis
description: Lulis is a marine angelfish mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Machvise
description: Machvise is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army.

name: Macro
description: Macro is a pelican eel fish-man and the captain of the Macro Pirates . He first appeared in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll cover story. He was also a member of the Sun Pirates .

name: Macro (Automaton)
description: Colonel Macro is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi . Colonel Macro was first introduced in the cover story of Enel's Great Space Operations .

name: Madilloman
description: Madilloman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Mag
description: Mag is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Magellan
description: Magellan is the vice warden of Impel Down . He was formerly the chief warden, but after his failure to stop the jail's one and only mass-breakout , he was replaced by Hannyabal and demoted to vice warden.

name: Magnolia
description: Magnolia was the mother of Shamrock and Shanks , and the lover of Figarland Garling . A native of God Valley , she was killed during the prelude of the God Valley Incident by Garling.

name: Magra
description: Magra is a member of the Dadan Family that are active on Mt. Colubo on Dawn Island . He helped take care of Ace and Luffy for Garp .

name: Maha
description: Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Maidy
description: Maidy is a servant of the Nefertari Family , working as a lady's maid in Alubarna Palace .

name: Maki
description: Maki is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Makino
description: Makino is the owner and bartender of Partys Bar in Foosha Village , Monkey D. Luffy 's home town. She is also the mother of an unknown child .

name: Makino's Child
description: Makino's child is an unnamed baby born to Makino and an unknown man during the two-year timeskip .

name: Makko
description: Ensign Makko is a senior member of Hina 's death squad who was on one of the ships that attacked the Straw Hat Pirates as they fled Arabasta .

name: Manboshi
description: Manboshi is an opah merman and the third son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island .

name: Mani
description: Mani was a combatant of the Bellamy Pirates .

name: Manjaro
description: Manjaro is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Zoro . When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Manjaro impersonated Heat .

name: Manmayer Gunko
description: Saint Manmayer Gunko is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God . Previously, she was a Devoted Blade of God serving under the Knights of God 38 years ago during the events of the God Valley Incident .

name: Manmayer Gurou
description: Saint Manmayer Gurou is a World Noble from the Manmayer Family and a member of the Knights of God 62 years ago. He is the biological father of Manmayer Gunko from an unclear relationship with Esperia Kingdom 's Queen Candelle during his stay there 77 years ago.

name: Mansherry
description: Mansherry is a dwarf and the princess of the Tontatta Kingdom . She is the daughter of Gancho , the king of the Tontatta Kingdom.

name: Marco
devil_fruit: Tweet-Tweet Fruit, Phoenix Model (Crunchy subs) Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Phoenix (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
description: Marco the Phoenix is the former 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . Once starting out as an apprentice on the crew, he eventually came to be Whitebeard 's closest confidant and right-hand man. After his captain's death during the Summit War of Marineford , Marco assumed leadership of the Whitebeard Pirates until the crew's disbandment following the Payback War .

name: Marcus Mars
description: Saint Marcus Mars is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , holding the title of Warrior God of Environment .

name: Margarita
description: Margarita is the owner of the shadow that was inserted into Victoria Cindry 's corpse twelve years ago . She currently works as a maid for Egana .

name: Marguerite
description: Marguerite is a member of the Kuja tribe living on the island of Amazon Lily . She, along with Aphelandra and Sweet Pea , saved Luffy after he ate mushrooms that completely covered his body. During the timeskip, she became a member of the Kuja Pirates .

name: Mari
description: Mari is the king of the Czacho Kingdom ( チャコ王国 , Chako Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Maria Napole
description: Maria Napole is a largehead hairtail mermaid and a famous singer considered the pride of Fish-Man Island .

name: Marianne
description: Marianne , also known as the "Flag-Bearer of Freedom" and more commonly by her alias Miss Goldenweek , is a former officer agent of Baroque Works and the partner of Mr. 3 . She is currently working as a painter at the new Spider's Cafe alongside many of her former colleagues.

name: Marie
description: Marie is the thirteenth wife of Saint Charlos . Before being enslaved by Charlos, she worked as a nurse in the Sabaody Archipelago , and was the fiancée of Judy .

name: Marilyn
description: Marilyn is a woman that lives in Skypiea . She was Miss Skypiea forty-two years ago.

name: Marin
description: Marin is a male slave who was forced to dress as a mermaid by his owner.

name: Mario
description: Mario is a dog that tore off the arm of a toy citizen of Dressrosa .

name: Marlon
description: Don Marlon was a member of the Rocks Pirates and a gangster from the West Blue . He joined Rocks D. Xebec after losing a Davy Back Fight , but was later killed during the World Government 's abduction of Shakuyaku .

name: Marshall D. Teach
description: Marshall D. Teach , most commonly referred to by his epithet "Blackbeard" , is the admiral of the Blackbeard Pirates , and one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World . He is the son of the legendary pirate Rocks D. Xebec and his wife Eris , making him a member of the nearly-extinct Davy Family and a descendant of Davy D. Jones , which is only known to a small number of individuals, including his own crew, the Five Elders , and Nerona Imu . He is the only known person in history to wield the powers of two Devil Fruits .

name: Mash
role: Holder of the Takoyaki recipe and sauce
description: Mash is a giant octopus that appeared in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll .

name: Mashikaku (Marine)
description: Chief Petty Officer Mashikaku is a subordinate of Smoker and Tashigi . However, it is unknown if he remained with the two after they transferred to G-5 as he is not seen with the G-5 Marines.

name: Masira
description: "Salvage King" Masira is the boss ( 園長 , bosu ) of the Masira Pirates and the head of a simian ship salvage operation near Jaya Island. His sworn brother is Shoujou and both of them are members of the Saruyama Alliance , headed by Mont Blanc Cricket . He and Shoujou are both fans of Mont Blanc Noland 's exploits and the fairy tale book based on them.

name: Masked Deuce
description: Masked Deuce is an alias used by the first member of Ace 's pirate crew, the Spade Pirates , usually referred to as just "Deuce" or "Deu". He abandoned his real name, which remains unknown, but is known to have come from a prominent East Blue family of medical professionals. Despite nominally being the head of the crew besides Ace, Deuce could struggle being respected by the crew, often relying on Skull and Mihar , the crew's other officers. Deuce also came to be referred to as "Doc" by at least Whitebeard after being integrated into the medical staff of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Massui
description: Massui is a Waiter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Master
description: The Master is a digger who works on an unnamed island in Paradise .

name: Mato
description: Mato is a giant bartendress from Elbaph .

name: Matryo Princesses
description: The Matryo Princesses are the princesses of the Roshwan Kingdom . Their names, in order from largest to smallest, are Matryosaka ( マトリョーサカ ) , Matryosuka ( マトリョースカ ) , Matryoseka ( マトリョーセカ ) , and Matryosoka ( マトリョーソカ ) .

name: Matsuge
description: Matsuge is a yasa camel who accompanied the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arabasta Arc . He is classified as a Type-A creature, "Big Friendly" and currently works as a member of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Maujii
description: Maujii is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom and the aide of Princess Mansherry .

name: Maynard
description: Maynard the Pursuer is a vice admiral who appears in the Dressrosa Arc . He was registered as a gladiator to compete at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi , but was defeated before he could participate.

name: MAX Marx
description: MAX Marx was the cook of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Mayushika
description: Mayushika is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel .

name: McGuy
description: "Thunder Lord" McGuy is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: McKinley
description: McKinley is a member of God Guardians (previously known as the White Berets), Skypiea 's police force. He initially serves as a minor antagonist in the Skypiea Arc , but later becomes an (indirect) ally to the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Meadows
description: Meadows is a gladiator who competed in the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Mecha-Shark
description: The Mecha-Shark is a cyborg shark created by Vegapunk alongside the Sea Beast Weapons .

name: Megalo
description: Megalo is a shark that lives on Fish-Man Island . He is the beloved pet of princess Shirahoshi and former pet of the Neptune Army.

name: Mero
description: Mero is a smelt-whiting mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Merry
description: Merry is Kaya 's butler, and the original designer of the Going Merry .

name: Mezasuzowan Pisuo
description: Mezasuzowan Pisuo is a member of the Germ Pirates .

name: Mihar
description: "Indoor" Mihar is a member of the Spade Pirates and, subsequently, the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Mikazuki
description: Mikazuki is the captain and only named member of the Big Helmet Pirates .

name: Mikio Itoo
description: Mikio Itoo is a background joke character created by Eiichiro Oda , and arguably the first Easter Egg featured in One Piece .

name: Mikita
description: "Courier" Mikita , more commonly known by her alias Miss Valentine , is a former officer agent of Baroque Works who was partnered with Mr. 5 . As of now, she is currently working as a chocolate lady alongside most of the other Baroque Works members at the new Spiders Cafe .

name: Miles
description: Miles is a trumpetfish merman and a trumpeter in a swing jazz orchestra from Fish-Man Island .

name: Milky
description: Milky is a reindeer mink and a member of the Guardians .

name: Millet Pine
description: Millet Pine was the torturer ( 拷問係 , gōmon-gakari ) of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution.

name: Milo
description: Milo is a citizen of Dressrosa . While he was a toy , he was known as " Onepoco ".

name: Minatomo (East Blue)
description: Minatomo-san is a traveling carpenter (in)famously obsessed with repairing any broken door he sees. A native of Wano Country , he left with Shimotsuki Kouzaburou and Furiko 55 years ago and resettled in the East Blue . One of his relatives, also known as Minatomo , remains in Wano.

name: Minatomo (Wano)
description: Minatomo is a legendary carpenter in Wano Country and the leader of a guild that Franky joined to get access to the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress . He is related to another person, whose name is also Minatomo , who is a descendant of someone who traveled from Wano to East Blue .

name: Minister of the Left
description: The Minister of the Left is a catfish merman in service of King Neptune . While it is not clear what his job entails, it appears to involve some sort of administrative and military duties. His actual name is currently unknown.

name: Minister of the Right
description: The Minister of the Right is a seahorse merman in service to King Neptune . While it is not clear exactly what his job entails, he appears to have some administrative and military duties. He also appears to be a guard or commander as he and the other guards hurried to the princess when she needed help. His actual name is unknown.

name: Minochihuahua
description: Minochihuahua is the newest Jailer Beast in Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user who ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a chihuahua.

name: Minokoala
description: Minokoala is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user that ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a koala.

name: Minorhinoceros
description: Minorhinoceros is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user, having eaten a Devil Fruit that allows him to turn into a blue rhinoceros.

name: Minoruba
description: Minoruba is a bounty hunter on Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Minotaurus
description: Minotaurus is one of Impel Down 's Jailer Beasts . He is an awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user who ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a Holstein cow.

name: Minozebra
description: Minozebra is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user that ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a zebra.

name: Misery
description: Misery is a homie created by Big Mom as an attack during the Raid on Onigashima . She is formed from the Maser Saber combination of Prometheus , Hera , and Napoleon .

name: Mishoin Cashible
description: Mishoin Cashible is a salesman based in Water 7 who rents bulls to ferry people around the canals.

name: Miss Catherina
description: Miss Catherina is a former Baroque Works Millions agent who was stationed at Whisky Peak alongside her partner, Mr. Beans . She worked under the Frontier Agents Mr. 8 , Miss Monday , Mr. 9 , and Miss Wednesday .

name: Miss Father's Day
description: Miss Father's Day is a former Frontier Agent of Baroque Works, being half of a sniper duo along with her partner, Mr. 7 . She is a minor antagonist in the Arabasta Arc .

name: Miss Friday
description: Miss Friday is a vulture and a member of the criminal organization Baroque Works , being a part of the Unluckies ( 13日の金曜日 , Anrakkīzu ) along with Mr. 13 . They were a team that served as messengers for Mr. 0 and were also responsible for executing any Baroque Works agents that fail their missions. She is classified as a Type D creature, "Small Savage".

name: Miss Monday
description: Miss Monday is the code name of a former frontier agent of Baroque Works and partner to Igaram (Mr. 8 at the time) during his infiltration of Baroque Works . Due to her actions, she is a supporting antagonist in the Whisky Peak Arc . After the fall of Baroque Works, she stayed at Whisky Peak, and eventually bore a son with Mr. 9 .

name: Miss Mother's Day
description: Miss Mother's Day is the partner of Mr. 6 and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. She was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Miss Saturday
description: Miss Saturday is the partner of Mr. 12 and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. She was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Miss Thursday
description: Miss Thursday is the former partner of Mr. 11 and a Frontier Agent of Baroque Works . She was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi during her explanation to the Straw Hat Pirates on the organization of Baroque Works. She is also Mr. 4 's younger sister.

name: Miss Tuesday
description: Miss Tuesday is the partner of Mr. 10 and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Misty
description: Misty is a former Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak .

name: Miyagi
description: Miyagi is a goat mink and one of Inuarashi 's subjects, until Carrot took the throne of Mokomo Dukedom .

name: Mizerka
description: Mizerka is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , she became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Mizuira
description: Mizuira was a little girl from Ohara . She was the daughter of Oran and Roji , the niece of Nico Olvia , and the cousin of Nico Robin .

name: Mizuta Madaisuki
description: Mizuta Madaisuki was the older of the two Mizuta Twins , identical twin brothers of the Rumbar Pirates . He and his brother, Mawaritosuki , were identified by Oda in a SBS question . A fan asked why one of the Rumbar Pirates that died singing had a sword in his skull. Oda explained that this was because they were two identical pirates who died two separate ways.

name: Mizuta Mawaritosuki
description: Mizuta Mawaritosuki was the younger of the two Mizuta Twins , identical twin brothers of the Rumbar Pirates . He and his brother, Madaisuki , were identified by Oda in a SBS question . A fan asked why one of the Rumbar Pirates that died singing had a sword in his skull. Oda explained that this was because they were two identical pirates who died two separate ways.

name: Moai
description: Moai is a large man with light colored hair tied in a ponytail. He wears a tattered light color tank top, a beaded neckless, a dotted bandana, a beaded belt and low hanging pants.

name: MocDonald
description: MocDonald was a Wild Zombie who lived on Thriller Bark .

name: Mocha
description: Mocha is a little girl who was held captive on Punk Hazard . She was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Mochi
description: Mochi is a Skypiean on Angel Island and Moyle 's son.

name: Moda
description: Moda is a milk maiden from the Lulusia Kingdom that Ace met during his cover story . She is the daughter of Koda and Kyuji .

name: Mohji
description: Mohji the Beast Tamer is a pirate and the first mate of the Buggy Pirates and a member of the Buggy and Alvida Alliance . He is a pet tamer, usually accompanied by his pet lion Richie . He was a member of Buggy's Delivery , and now currently a member of Cross Guild .

name: Momonga
description: Vice Admiral Momonga is a Marine officer and the Base Commander of the G-1 Marine Base. He was one of the five Vice Admirals who had led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby .

name: Momoo
description: Momoo is a giant sea cow from the Grand Line , and the first Sea Beast seen in the series. He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly".

name: Monda
description: Monda is a Star Shark and a former pet animal of the Foxy Pirates . He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip .

name: Monet
description: Monet was a scout and assistant for Caesar Clown and his underlings in the research facility on Punk Hazard . She was, in truth, a member and officer of the Donquixote Pirates and was sent as a deep cover agent by Doflamingo . She was also the older sister of Sugar .

name: Monjii
description: Monjii is an elderly monkey mink with long, white eyebrows and a mustache connected to a chest-length beard. He wears a dark cloak, a hat, and baggy striped pants.

name: Monjiro
description: Monjiro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Monkey D. Dragon
role: Supreme Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Monkey D. Dragon , also known as the "Rebellious Dragon" , is the supreme commander and founder of the Revolutionary Army (originally the Freedom Fighters ). A former Marine , his disgust with the organization's actions in the God Valley Incident , and its brutality in the Ohara Incident led to him forming the Revolutionary Army to oppose the World Government in its entirety. Having campaigned toward its downfall for over thirty years, he is labeled the " World's Worst Criminal ".

name: Monkey D. Garp
description: Monkey D. Garp , also known as "Garp the Fist" , is an extremely famous and powerful Marine Vice Admiral . He is the father of Monkey D. Dragon , the paternal grandfather of Monkey D. Luffy , and the adoptive grandfather of Portgas D. Ace . He was responsible for overseeing Ace's birth and raising a young Luffy, before entrusting them both to the Dadan Family .

name: Monkey D. Luffy
description: Monkey D. Luffy , commonly known as "Straw Hat Luffy" or simply "Straw Hat" , is the founder and captain of the Straw Hat Pirates . He pursues the legendary treasure of the late Gol D. Roger in order to become the new Pirate King and reach a further, untold dream (currently known to only his crew, family and closest friends). He believes that being the Pirate King means having the most freedom in the world .

name: Monster
description: Monster is one of the Senior Officers and musicians of the Red Hair Pirates . He first appeared playing with his crew at the Partys Bar .

name: Mont Blanc Cricket
description: Mont Blanc Cricket is an inhabitant of Jaya , living in a small home behind the façade of a castle. He is the distant descendant of Mont Blanc Noland and the "Last Boss" ( 最終園長 , Rasuto Bosu ) of the Saruyama Alliance .

name: Mont Blanc Noland
description: Mont Blanc Noland was an admiral in the Lvneel Kingdom and a famous explorer who made multiple trips into the Grand Line . He discovered a City of Gold on Jaya , but found upon returning there with Lvneel's king that it had disappeared , causing him to be executed. He was then memorialized in a fairy tale as a liar and trickster.

name: Moodie
description: Moodie is a woman who Fullbody took to the Baratie .

name: Moon Isaac Jr.
description: Moon Isaac Jr. was a member of the Roger Pirates and their tactical staff officer ( 戦術参謀 , senjutsu sanbō ) until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Moqueca
description: Moqueca is the king of the Samba Kingdom ( サンバ王国 , Sanba Ōkoku ) in the South Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Morgan
description: "Axe-Hand" Morgan is a former Marine captain , the father of Helmeppo and the first significant Marine officer to appear in the storyline. After his defeat by Monkey D. Luffy and Roronoa Zoro , he was stripped of his rank for his many abuses of power.

name: Morgans
devil_fruit: Tweet-Tweet Fruit, Albatross Model (Crunchy subs) Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Albatross (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
description: "Big News" Morgans is the president of the World Economy News Paper and one of the emperors of the Underworld .

name: Morley
role: West Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
description: Morley of Fur is a giant and a newkama , as well as the commander of the West Army in the Revolutionary Army .

name: Mornin
description: Mornin is the mayor of Syrup Village , and one of several villagers who used Usopp 's antics as a makeshift alarm clock.

name: Mororon
description: Mororon is the queen of the Tajine Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Mosa
description: Nothing is known about Mosa's features as the character has yet to make an appearance.

name: Mosh
description: Mosh is a very large man, comparable to Jean Bart in size. His hair is light-colored and arranged in a ponytail, with a prominent bang covering the left side of his face. He wears a feathered coat adorned with spikes at the shoulders (similar to Kid 's own captain coat before the timeskip) and a shirt with the picture of a guitar printed on it.

name: Motobaro
description: Motobaro is the pet bison of Duval . He is used by Duval as a steed, and can also swim on water.

name: Mottled
description: Mottled is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon .

name: Motzel
description: Mr. Motzel is a gourmand and one of the known customers of the Baratie .

name: Moulon
description: Don Moulon was the boss of the Moulon Family .

name: Mounblutain
description: Mounblutain was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who masqueraded as Sogeking .

name: Mountain God
description: The Mountain God , respectfully called Yama-san ( 山さん , Yama-san , VIZ Media: Yama) by Kouzuki Oden and his retainers, is a giant boar that lived in the forests of Wano Country as late as thirty years ago. In what became known as the Mountain God Incident , it was cut down by Kouzuki Oden during its attack on Flower Capital , but it ultimately survived the ordeal. It later became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family alongside its child, Koyama .

name: Mountain Ricky
description: Mountain Ricky is a former member of the Foxy Pirates . He fought George Mach before the third round of the Davy Back Fight .

name: Mouseman
description: Mouseman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . He resides in Bakura Town .

name: Mousse
description: Mousse was the daughter of Kalgara and Herb and was considered the most beautiful of the Shandia women on the island of Jaya four hundred years ago.

name: Mouthto Mouthyan
description: Mouthto Mouthyan is a citizen of Dressrosa .

name: Moyle
description: Moyle is a Skypiean and the father of Mochi . He originally worked for Gan Fall in the Divine Squad , but after Enel took over, he and the other members were forced to work in God's Army until they were betrayed and almost killed.

name: Mozambia
description: Vice Admiral Mozambia is a Marine officer who attended the meeting with the Seven Warlords of the Sea to discuss Crocodile 's replacement.

name: Mr. 6
description: Mr. 6 is the partner of Miss Mother's Day and the top Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. He was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Mr. 7 (Previous)
description: Mr. 7 was a frontier agent of Baroque Works . He died on duty when he attempted to forcefully recruit Roronoa Zoro to the organization. His position was filled by the next Mr. 7 .

name: Mr. 7
description: Mr. 7 is a former Frontier Agent of Baroque Works , being half of a sniper duo along with his partner, Miss Father's Day . He replaced the previous agent of the same codename when the latter died in the line of duty. He is a minor antagonist in the Arabasta Arc .

name: Mr. 9
description: Mr. 9 is the code name of a former Frontier Agent and bounty hunter of Baroque Works , and Miss Wednesday 's former assigned partner during her infiltration. Due to his actions, he is one of the main antagonists of the Reverse Mountain Arc , and a supporting antihero in the Whisky Peak Arc . After the fall of Baroque Works, he stayed at Whisky Peak, and eventually bore a son with Miss Monday .

name: Mr. 10
description: Mr. 10 is the partner to Miss Tuesday and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Mr. 11
description: Mr. 11 was a Frontier Agent for Baroque Works and the partner of Miss Thursday .

name: Mr. 12
description: Mr. 12 is the partner of Miss Saturday and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. He was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Mr. 13
description: Mr. 13 is an otter and a member of the criminal organization Baroque Works , being a part of the Unluckies ( 13日の金曜日 , Anrakkīzu ) along with Miss Friday . They were a team that served as messengers for Mr. 0 and were also responsible for executing any Baroque Works agents that fail their missions. He is classified as a Type D creature, "Small Savage".

name: Mr. Beans
description: Mr. Beans is a former Baroque Works Millions agent who was stationed at Whisky Peak alongside his partner, Miss Catherina . He worked under the Frontier Agents Mr. 8 , Miss Monday , Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday .

name: Mr. Love
description: Mr. Love is one of Baroque Works ' Billions who posed as a member of the Rebel Army.

name: Mr. Mellow
description: Mr. Mellow is one of the only identified members of Baroque Works ' Billions .

name: Mr. Momora
description: Mr. Momora was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Sapoten Graveyard
description: Sapoten Graveyard , also known as Cactus Rock ( サボテン岩 , saboten iwa , English versions: Cactus Rocks) is a graveyard located on Whisky Peak . The large, cactus-like appearance of Sapoten Graveyard makes it a notable landmark of Cactus Island .

name: Mr. Shimizu
description: Mr. Shimizu was a Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak . He worked under the Frontier Agents Mr. 8 , Miss Monday , Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday .

name: Muchana
description: Muchana is a doctor who currently works in Impel Down 's medical room.

name: Muginn
description: Muginn is a giant raven that lives in the Land of Gods .

name: Mugren
description: Colonel Mugren was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Mukkashimi Tower
description: Mukkashimi Tower is a spectator at the Corrida Colosseum .

name: Mummy
description: Mummy is a sorcerer who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Mummy Mee
description: Mummy Mee is one of the houseparents, alongside Daddy Dee , of a World Government -affiliated orphanage situated on the Conomi Islands .

name: Muret
description: Muret was the doctor of the Bellamy Pirates .

name: Muti
description: Muti is a middle-aged woman with long, wavy brown hair and a round face. She wears a windowpane sea green shirt and dark pants.

name: Nakaiwa
description: Nakaiwa is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago.

name: Nako
description: Dr. Nako is a doctor from Cocoyasi Village . He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Nami
description: "Cat Burglar" Nami is the navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . She is the third member of the crew and the second to join, doing so during the Orange Town Arc . She is the adoptive sister of Nojiko after the two were orphaned and taken in by Bell-mère .

name: Namur
description: Namur is a fish-man and the former 8th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Nanday
description: Nanday is the infant son of Mr. 9 and Miss Monday .

name: Nangi
description: Nangi is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "seven".

name: Napoleon
description: Napoleon the Bicorne is a homie taking the form of a bicorne hat that is worn by Big Mom . He can also become a sword homie that Big Mom uses in combat. He is a special kind of homie, as he received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, and serves as one of her personal weapons alongside Prometheus and Hera , and formerly Zeus .

name: Nash
description: Nash is a giant shield homie that is owned by Goldberg of the New Giant Warrior Pirates .

name: Nashi
description: Nashi is the king of the Ringo Kingdom ( リンゴ王国 , Ringo Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Natto
description: Natto is a former member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army .

name: Nazu Ketagari
description: Nazu Ketagari is a Vice Admiral and the head of a Marine Headquarters division in charge of assigning epithets to Marines , including the Admiral aliases.

name: Needle God
description: The Needle God is a giant hedgehog that lives in the Land of Gods , within Bigstein Castle .

name: Nefertari Cobra
description: Nefertari Cobra was the 12th king of the Arabasta Kingdom , the former patriarch of Nefertari Family , husband of the late Nefertari Titi and father of Nefertari Vivi . He was related to Nefertari D. Lili , one of the First Twenty monarchs who founded the World Government , and secretly bore her initial D. in his name.

name: Nefertari D. Lili
description: Nefertari D. Lili was the queen of the Arabasta Kingdom during the time of the Void Century , being one of the twenty monarchs credited with the founding of the World Government . However, Lili was the only one who chose not to become a World Noble and move to Mary Geoise; but before she could return to her home country, she mysteriously vanished. Aside from that, little is known about her except that she had a younger brother who succeeded her as the ruler of Arabasta in her absence.

name: Nefertari Titi
description: Nefertari Titi was the queen of the Arabasta Kingdom , Nefertari Cobra 's wife, and Nefertari Vivi 's mother.

name: Nefertari Vivi
description: Nefertari Vivi is the princess of the Arabasta Kingdom . She is the daughter of Nefertari Cobra and Titi , and along with the rest of her family, she bears the initial D. in her name. During her childhood, Vivi was part of the Sand-Sand Clan , being the vice-leader of the group led by her friend Koza .

name: Neggy
description: Neggy is the queen of the Gingapore Kingdom ( ギンガポール王国 , Gingapōru Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Negikuma Maria
description: Negikuma Maria is a resident of Drum Island , and friend of Dalton .

name: Nekomamushi
description: Master Nekomamushi is a feline mink and the former guardian of the Whale Forest on Zou . He was one of the two rulers of the Mokomo Dukedom , dubbed the "Ruler of Night" , holding the position from 6:00 PM to 6:00 AM. He and Inuarashi serve as retainers for the Kouzuki Family of Wano Country , as members of the Nine Red Scabbards .

name: Nekozaemon
description: Nekozaemon was a cat created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi . It was created to aid him, Kin'emon , and Bariete scale Zunesha 's leg to reach Zou , though it ultimately failed in its goal.

name: Neoki
description: Neoki is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Neptune
description: King Neptune is a coelacanth merman and the king of the Ryugu Kingdom on Fish-Man Island . He is also the current patriarch of the Neptune Family , father of Fukaboshi , Ryuboshi , Manboshi , and Shirahoshi , and the husband of the late Queen Otohime .

name: Nerine
description: Nerine is a member of the Kuja from Amazon Lily .

name: Nero
description: Nero the Sea Weasel was the newest agent of CP9 and part of the team escorting Nico Robin to Enies Lobby .

name: Nerona Imu
description: Saint Nerona Imu is the King of the World ( 世界の王 , Sekai no Ō ) who occupies the Empty Throne , giving him sole authority over the World Government . One of the First Twenty responsible for the creation of the World Government and the only one alive today, his status has been kept an absolute secret from the world at large for over 800 years since the Void Century .

name: Nezumi
description: Captain Nezumi is a Marine captain of the 16th Branch in the East Blue . Highly corrupt, he covered up the vast majority of Arlong 's actions in the Conomi Islands in exchange for bribe money.

name: Nico Olvia
description: Nico Olvia was an archaeologist from Ohara who studied the Poneglyphs two decades ago, the mother of Nico Robin , and the older sister of Oran and paternal aunt of Mizuira .

name: Nico Robin
devil_fruit: Hana-Hana Fruit ( 4Kids ); Flower-Flower Fruit ( VIZ / Funimation )
description: Nico Robin , also known by her epithet "Devil Child" and the "Light of the Revolution" , is the archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . She is the seventh member of the crew and the sixth to join, doing so at the end of the Arabasta Arc . She temporarily left the crew during the Water 7 Arc but rejoined during the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Nigeratta
description: Nigeratta is a man from Nico Robin 's past.

name: Nightcrab Girl
description: Nightcrab Girl is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Nika
description: Nika is the name of a legendary warrior revered as the Sun God by slaves from ancient times and whose existence is tied to Elbaph mythology and folklore. He was first mentioned by Who's-Who , who heard about the legend from a prison guard during his imprisonment by the World Government .

name: Ninjin
description: Ninjin is a former member of the Usopp Pirates , along with Piiman and Tamanegi , before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Ninth
description: Ninth is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Nitro
description: Nitro is a jelly homie that is often seen with Charlotte Pudding .

name: Noble Croc
description: The Noble Croc is a crocodile homie that lives in the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island .

name: Nodoi Wakan
description: Nodoi Wakan is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Nokokuwa Police
description: Nokokuwa Police is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Nokotti
description: Nokotti is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region. She acted as the gyōji during the Sumo Inferno held by Queen .

name: Nojiko
description: Nojiko is the owner of a mikan farm in Cocoyasi Village and the adoptive older sister of Nami . They were raised together by their adoptive mother, Bell-mère .

name: Nola
description: Nola , known to many as the Master of the Sky , is a giant snake who lives on Upper Yard in Skypiea . Having lived for over four centuries, the snake was once the companion of Kalgara and Mont Blanc Noland back when Upper Yard was still part of Jaya . It is the grandchild of the snake Kashigami , whom the Shandia once worshiped as a god.

name: Nora Gitsune
description: Nora Gitsune is a fox who filled the role of the " pet " for the Fake Straw Hat Crew , who did not know that the real Chopper is the crew 's doctor and is given human -traits by the Hito Hito no Mi .

name: Noriko
description: Noriko is a nori maker who lives in Ebisu Town .

name: Norinosuke
description: Norinosuke is a self-proclaimed shaman from the Flower Capital of the Wano Country and the father of Beasts Pirates officer Holed'em .

name: Nosgarl
description: Nosgarl is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Nubon
description: Nubon is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit .

name: Nugire Yainu
description: Nugire Yainu was the shipwright of the Black Cat Pirates and the crew member who was killed by the Marines three years prior to Kuro enacting his plan.

name: Nure-Onna
description: Nure-Onna is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria .

name: Nyasha
description: Nyasha is a giant cat owned by the Vinsmoke Family that pulls their royal carriage.

name: Nyornyo Nyarmani
description: Nyornyo Nyarmani is a famous fashion designer from the Nagagutsu Kingdom . He is the creator of a high-end fashion brand which shares his name, "Nyornyo Nyarmani", which is worn by the Five Elders .

name: Oars
description: Oars the Continent-Puller , also known as the "Devil" , was an infamous ancient giant . Around 500 years, he wreaked havoc on the seas by conquering countries and hauling away entire islands, which he used to create a "nation of villains". He eventually died in the Land of Ice .

name: Octopako
description: Octopako is an octopus fish-woman whom Hatchan tried to win over during his cover story , Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll .

name: Ochoku
description: Ochoku is a former member of the Rocks Pirates . Following his time with the crew he became the ruler of Hachinosu , before being overthrown by Blackbeard during the Rocky Port Incident .

name: Ohm
description: "Skybreeder" Ohm is one of four priests of the former God Enel and a high-ranking member of God's Army . Together with his giant dog steed Holy , he subjected God's enemies to the Ordeal of Iron on Upper Yard . Due to his affiliation and actions, he is a major antagonist in the Skypiea Arc .

name: Oimo
description: Oimo is a giant from Elbaph and a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates under Dorry and Brogy . He has a grandson attending the Walrus School on Elbaph; Olav .

name: Oiwa
description: Oiwa is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago.

name: Okame
description: Okame was a member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army .

name: Okome
description: Okome is the first mate and the only known member of the Hokahoka Pirates .

name: Olav
description: Olav is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . He is the grandson of Oimo .

name: Oli
description: Crone Oli is a pirate captain subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Oliva
description: Oliva is the former boss of Port Chibaralta Island , which was part of Whitebeard 's territory. However, he was deposed by Portgas D. Ace due to partaking in the slave trade.

name: Omasa
description: "Blood-Writing" Omasa is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Udon region in Wano Country . He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Onigumo
description: Vice Admiral Onigumo is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby . His name was revealed in the third databook .

name: Onimaru
devil_fruit: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Onyudo
description: Onimaru is a komagitsune who was once the companion of the late daimyo of Ringo , Shimotsuki Ushimaru .

name: Oran
description: Oran was the husband of Roji , the father of Mizuira , the younger brother of Nico Olvia , and the maternal uncle and foster parent of Nico Robin .

name: Orlumbus
role: Captain of the Seventh Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: "Massacre Ruler" Orlumbus is a former adventurer from the Standing Kingdom and the admiral of the Yonta Maria Grand Fleet . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . After the final battle against Donquixote Doflamingo , Orlumbus pledged his loyalty to Monkey D. Luffy and became a pirate and the captain of the seventh ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Ossamondo
description: Ossamondo is a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Otohime
description: Queen Otohime was a goldfish mermaid , the queen of the Ryugu Kingdom , the wife of king Neptune , and the mother of Fukaboshi , Ryuboshi , Manboshi , and Shirahoshi .

name: Ottoland
description: Ottoland is one of the Franky Family 's Kairiki Destroyers .

name: Outlook III
description: Outlook III is a noble of the Goa Kingdom . He is the husband of Didit , the biological father of Sabo , and the adoptive father of Sterry .

name: Pagaya
description: Pagaya is Conis ' father and a native to Skypiea who fixed the waver that Nami rides.

name: Page One
description: Page One is a former member of the Tobiroppo , the strongest Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates . He is the son of the former Warlord of the Sea Hanafuda and younger brother of fellow former Tobiroppo Ulti .

name: Palms
description: Palms is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Pandaman
description: Pandaman is a joke character created by Eiichiro Oda , and one of the most prominent easter eggs in One Piece .

name: Pandawomanmi
description: Pandawomanmi is the female version of Pandaman . She first appeared in the Amazon Lily Arc where Pandaman would not be allowed (as men are forbidden on Amazon Lily ).

name: Pandora
description: Pandora is a sun homie that was created by Carmel , who placed a portion of her soul into a fire on Elbaph with the power of the Soru Soru no Mi .

name: Pankuta Dakeyan
description: Pankuta Dakeyan is a prisoner in Impel Down .

name: Pansy
description: Pansy is a large overweight woman with round eyes, a double chin, and a big nose. She wears red lipstick, and has brownish-red hair, flowing in the back, and in two big curls in the front. Pansy wears a wiggly black and yellow stripped top that shows most of her breast and all of her stomach and is always barefoot.

name: Papaneel
description: Papaneel is a barracuda fish-man who lived on Fish-Man Island sixteen years ago.

name: Papas
description: Papas is an average-sized man with a pointy nose. He is seen wearing a sleeveless hoodie over his head that has vertical stripes on the front.

name: Pappag
description: Pappag is a starfish who is Camie 's pet and teacher. He is the creator of the Criminal fashion line and is mentoring Camie to be a fashion designer.

name: Part
description: Part is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom , having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since young adulthood.

name: Pascia
description: Pascia is a female dancer, who was to be sold at the Auction House .

name: Patty
description: Patty is one of the main cooks at the Baratie , currently serving as the restaurant's head pâtissier.

name: Paulie
description: Paulie is the current vice president of the Galley-La Company in Water 7 . Before being promoted, he was one of the five Dock One foremen, specializing in rigging, knots, and masts.

name: Pavlik
description: Pavlik is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Peachbeard
description: Peachbeard is the epithet of the captain of the Peachbeard Pirates , who are subordinates of the Emperor Blackbeard .

name: Pearl
role: Commander of the Krieg Pirates ' second unit
description: Pearl the Iron Wall is the commander of the Krieg Pirates ' second unit. Due to his actions, he can be considered the tertiary antagonist of the Baratie Arc .

name: Peepley Lulu
description: Peepley Lulu is one of the five foremen of the Galley-La Company 's Dock 1 in Water 7 . His specialties as a shipwright are pitch , block and tackle , and blacksmithing .

name: Pedro
description: Pedro of the Treetops was a jaguar mink and captain of the Guardians .

name: Pekkori
description: Pekkori is the village mayor of Harahettania , the Land of Poverty, situated on Namakura Island in Paradise . He directed the ritual in which he and his people "summoned" Brook , though they were trying to summon the devil.

name: Pekoms
description: Pekoms is a combatant of the Big Mom Pirates and a lion mink . He is partnered with Tamago , and both are responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom 's protection.

name: Pell
devil_fruit: Tweet-Tweet Fruit Falcon Type ( VIZ ); Tweet-Tweet Fruit ( 4Kids ); Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Falcon ( Funimation )
description: Pell the Falcon is one of the two head guards in the Arabasta Kingdom that serve under Igaram , the other being Chaka . He is said to be the strongest fighter in all of Arabasta.

name: Pellini
description: Pellini is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit .

name: Penguin
description: Penguin is a member of the Heart Pirates .

name: Peppoko
description: Peppoko is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Heppoko and Poppoko .

name: Perona
description: "Ghost Princess" Perona is a member of the Thriller Bark Pirates and the former commander of the Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies , prior to Thriller Bark 's collapse.

name: Peterman
description: Peterman is the head of a kidnapping gang called the Hound Pets , located in Sabaody Archipelago , and a minor antagonist of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc .

name: Petermoo
description: Petermoo was the gunner of the Roger Pirates .

name: Pica
description: Pica is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates . He occupies the Spade seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Pica Army subdivision. Due to his actions and role, he is one of the major antagonists in the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Pickles
description: Pickles , also known as the "Tackle Machine" , is a former combatant of the Groggy Monsters of the Foxy Pirates .

name: Pierre
description: Pierre is a Sky Dot Bird belonging to Gan Fall .

name: Piiman
description: Piiman is a former member of the Usopp Pirates , along with Ninjin and Tamanegi , from before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Pike
description: Pike is a member of the G-5 branch of the Marines .

name: Pinky
description: Monstrous Bird Pinky is a giant bird that appeared in the Orange Town Arc . He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Piper
description: Piper is a massive owl, about the size of its master's upper body. Its feathers alternate between dark and light, with swirling ones around its eyes.

name: Pisaro
description: Pisaro is the musician of the Arlong Pirates and an ocean sunfish fish-man . He was previously a member of the Sun Pirates .

name: Pluming
description: Pluming is a man with light hair styled in a bobcut and a traditional World Noble updo at the top. He has thick eyebrows and a long thin mustache. He has no upper teeth apart from two large buckteeth.

name: Poker
description: Poker is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Polo Gram
description: Polo Gram is the captain of the Polo Pirates .

name: Pomp
description: Pomp is a short man with a stocky build, a bulbous nose and sporting dark hair with a prominent bang to the left side of his face. His clothes consist of a spiky beret in military camo colors and a studded leather belt around his torso, along with studded cuffs and dark gloves. He wears dark eyeliner and lipstick.

name: Pomsky
description: Pomsky is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Poppoko
description: Poppoko is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Heppoko and Peppoko .

name: Poppy
description: Poppy has wavy black hair, that goes over her shoulders. She is thin, wears bandages on her arms, and is always barefoot. She wears a bluish-white top that shows her cleavage and stomach. She also wears a skirt of matching color in the front, but pink in the back, with a yellow string around it.

name: Porche
description: Porche is a combatant of the Foxy Pirates . She is considered an idol by the crew and is loved by all of the men.

name: Porchemy
description: Porchemy was a member of the Bluejam Pirates until he was killed by his captain Bluejam for losing to Ace and Sabo.

name: Poro
description: Poro is a bookstore owner from Orange Town .

name: Portgas D. Ace
devil_fruit: Flame-Flame Fruit ( VIZ , Funimation ); Flare-Flare Fruit ( 4Kids , Funimation subs)
description: Portgas D. Ace , born as Gol D. Ace and nicknamed "Fire Fist" Ace , was the captain of the Spade Pirates before being recruited into the Whitebeard Pirates and becoming its 2nd division commander . The biological son of the late Pirate King Gol D. Roger and Portgas D. Rouge , Ace was put in the care of Monkey D. Garp and Curly Dadan after Roger's death, which is where he became the sworn brother of Monkey D. Luffy and Sabo . Due to Roger's absence from his life, Ace disowned his father and took his mother's surname, ultimately declaring that his captain Whitebeard was his true father.

name: Portgas D. Rouge
description: Portgas D. Rouge was the mother of Portgas D. Ace and the lover of Gol D. Roger .

name: Potato
description: Potato is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom .

name: Potaufeu
description: Potaufeu is a king and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Potsun
description: Dr. Potsun is an Arabasta doctor who runs an isolated clinic in the desert. He managed to recuperate Pell after his near-fatal sacrifice at Alubarna .

name: Pound
description: Pound is Big Mom 's 25th ex-husband and the father of Charlotte Chiffon and Lola . He is also the grandfather of Capone Pez and father-in-law of Capone Bege and Gotti .

name: Prince Grus
description: Prince Grus is a Marine Rear Admiral stationed at Marine base G-14 and a member of SWORD . His fellow SWORD members also refer to Grus by the title of Prince ( 王子 , Ōji ) which differs from his surname.

name: Prometheus
description: Prometheus the Sun is a sun homie that Big Mom summons from her right hand. He is a special kind of homie, as he received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, and serves as one of her personal weapons alongside Napoleon and Hera , and formerly Zeus .

name: Pudding Pudding
description: Pudding Pudding was a Marine commodore in the 77th Branch of the Marines.

name: Pudos
description: Pudos is a Waiter in the Beasts Pirates who worked as a guard in the Prisoner Mine . He was injured by Kawamatsu after trying to attack Monkey D. Luffy .

name: Puppu
description: Puppu is the captain of a pirate crew who attempted to pillage Nanohana in Arabasta .

name: Pururu
description: "Trembling" Pururu is the " princess " of the Bourgeois Pirates , a pirate crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates .

name: Pacifista
description: The Pacifista are human weapons ( 人間兵器 , ningen-heiki ) developed by the former Marine head scientist, Dr. Vegapunk . The standard models are clones of the former Warlord Bartholomew Kuma , who were cybernetically enhanced into cyborgs. Kuma himself was the cyborg prototype for the project. As stated by Sentomaru , the funds required for the construction of just one Pacifista are roughly equal to that of a Marine-issued battleship.

name: Vegapunk/Pythagoras
description: Pythagoras , also designated as Punk-04 ( PUNK-04 , Panku-Fō ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "wisdom".

name: Queen
description: Queen the Plague is an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates as one of Kaidou 's three closest confidants . He was formerly the ruler of the Udon region in Wano Country . Born as Scien , he previously was also part of the rogue scientific research team MADS before joining Kaidou. Queen is also the absentee father of Franky of the Straw Hat Pirates , whom he abandoned 26 years ago during his time at MADS.

name: Queen Mama Chanter
description: Queen Mama Chanter is a ship homie belonging to the Big Mom Pirates , and the apparent flagship of their fleet.

name: Quincy
description: Quincy is a slender woman with curly hair and wearing an elaborate outfit consisting of a round, crown-like hat, a checkered jacket, a giant ribbon around her waist and a light-colored skirt.

name: Rabbitman
description: Rabbitman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Rabiyan
description: Rabiyan is a flying carpet homie that is often seen with Charlotte Pudding .

name: Raccoon
description: "Pretended Sleep" Raccoon is a Pirate Captain previously active in the West Blue , until he was defeated by the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Ragnir
description: Ragnir ("Iron Thunder") is a giant warhammer brought to life by the Risu Risu no Mi, Model: Ratatoskr . After having spent centuries serving as the guardian of Elbaph 's national Devil Fruit treasure, the Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Nidhöggr , Ragnir judged Prince Loki as worthy to eat it 14 years ago and subsequently became his personal weapon.

name: Raideen
description: Raideen is a former member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . Following the crew's disbandment, he returned to Elbaph , where he trained Hajrudin and remains to this day.

name: Raijin
description: Raijin is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Raizo
devil_fruit: Scrolling Jutsu (VIZ); Scroll-Scroll Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
description: Raizo of the Mist is a ninja from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden 's retainers. He was born 55 years ago, but traveled 20 years forward in time at the age of 35. Following Kouzuki Momonosuke 's ascent to shogun , he serves as the daimyo of Udon .

name: Raki
description: Raki is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel .

name: Rakuda
description: Rakuda is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country . He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima .

name: Rakushitemo Terusubehainaika
description: Dr. Rakushitemo Terusubehainaika is a scientist and a member of the Germ Pirates .

name: Rakuyo
description: Rakuyo is the former 7th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Ramba
description: Ramba is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Ramen
description: Ramen is the king of the Kano Country and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Rampo
description: Rampo is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit . He is one of the two vice-chiefs of the Tonta Corps along with Bomba , under Gancho and Leo .

name: Ran
description: Ran is an average-sized lady who has jet black hair parted on one side with an earring on each ear. She wears long black stockings with straps that reach her matching color panties. Around her waist is a decorative belt of rings that is attached to a small flap of blue cloth to cover her rear. Her top is a small orange flowered tank top with a window hole in the middle that seems almost too small for her size. She carries a quiver of arrows slung around her back with a snake that is usually accompanying her. She wears a overcoat, similar to a Marine, like a cape like many of her fellow crewmates.

name: Randolph
description: "Crane Rider" Randolph is a rabbit homie and a member of the Big Mom Pirates .

name: Rangram
description: Rangram was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Ratatoskr
description: Ratatoskr is a legendary ice squirrel ( 氷リス , kōri risu ) who was the companion of the " Warrior God " many centuries ago. It is said to live on in the Warrior God's hammer Ragnir , which can transform into a similar-looking creature thanks to it "consuming" the Risu Risu no Mi, Model: Ratatoskr .

name: Ratel
description: Ratel is a Marine captain who led an invasion of Sphinx during Marco 's absence.

name: Rebecca
description: Rebecca is the daughter of Scarlett and Kyros , the niece of Viola and the granddaughter of Riku Doldo III . She is the former crown princess of Dressrosa , who forfeited her title to live with her father and currently serves as a lady-in-waiting to her aunt, Viola.

name: Reck
description: Reck is a slim man with curly, parted hair and sporting eyeliner. He wears a leather jacket and knee-length pants.

name: Recycle-Wan
description: The Recycle-Wan is a mechanical dog-like creature that eats scraps and litter on Egghead .

name: Red King
description: Red King is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Redwolf
description: Redwolf is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Reforte
description: Reforte is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Renona Topakka
description: Renona Topakka was a pastel-green wrasse mermaid and the mother of Kawamatsu .

name: Reuven
description: Reuven was the king of Esperia seventy years ago. He was the husband of Queen Candelle and the adoptive father of Princess Shuri , who killed him 62 years ago after both were turned into demons .

name: Rhodes
description: The Giant Warrior Pirates is a pirate crew made up of giants from Elbaph lead by Dorry and Brogy . Before them, the crew's captains were Jarul and Jorul . They disbanded 102 years ago when Dorry and Brogy began their duel, but reunited once they returned to Elbaph. They are major allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Richie
description: Richie is Mohji 's pet lion, and a recurring member of the Buggy Pirates in all their various incarnations . He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Rika
description: Rika is a young girl from Shells Town , and the daughter of Ririka . She currently serves as a waitress at the 153rd Marine Branch .

name: Riku Doldo III
description: Riku Doldo III is the recrowned king of Dressrosa after the defeat of Donquixote Doflamingo , who dethroned him a decade ago. The current patriarch of the Riku Family , Doldo is the father of the late Scarlett and Viola and the grandfather of Rebecca . During the latest Levely , he was one of the leading figures in the vote for the abolishment of the Seven Warlords of the Sea .

name: Rimoshifu Killingham
description: Saint Rimoshifu Killingham is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God .

name: Rindo
description: Rindo is an average-height woman with skin bearing a slightly darker tan than the rest of the Kuja. Her black hair is cut short and tied back into a bun on top of her head. She also always has a cigarette dangling off the side of her mouth.

name: Rint
description: Rint was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Ripley
description: Ripley is a giant from the last generation of Elbaph 's warriors and a biology teacher at the Walrus School . She is also the mother of Colon and common-law wife of Scopper Gaban .

name: Ripper
description: Ripper is a Marine Commander who heads the 153rd Branch . Formerly a subordinate of Captain Morgan , he assumed control after Morgan was defeated by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Ririka
description: Ririka is a bartender who runs a local bar in Shells Town . She is Rika 's mother.

name: Risky Brothers (Zombies)
description: The Risky Brothers were a duo of Wild Zombie squirrels that served under Perona . They were animated from the shadows of two pirates by the same name .

name: Risky Brothers
description: The Risky Brothers are two male pirates working as members of the Rolling Pirates under their captain, Lola . They were members of the Thriller Bark Victim's Association , a group of Gecko Moria 's victims who banded together. During the time their shadows were stolen from them, they were placed in two squirrel zombies who were also named the Risky Brothers .

name: Rivers
description: Rivers was the gunner of the Bellamy Pirates .

name: Road
crew: Straw Hat Grand Fleet ( New Giant Warrior Pirates ), Land of Gods , Buggy's Delivery (former)
description: Road is a giant from Elbaph who is the navigator of the New Giant Warrior Pirates and was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery . In addition, he rules over a personal diorama full of entrapped humans and giant animals as its " Sun God ". He is the older brother of Bjorn .

name: Rob Lucci
devil_fruit: Cat-Cat Fruit Leopard Model (VIZ); Cat-Cat Fruit, Model: Leopard (VIZ, Funimation)
description: Rob Lucci , also known as "Massacre Weapon" , is a masked agent of CP0 .

name: Robson
description: Robson is Wapol 's pet , and personal transport . He is a White Walkie , also known as "Wooly Hippo".

name: Roche
description: Roche was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Roche Tomson
description: Impel Down , also known as the Underwater Prison ( 海底監獄 , Kaitei Kangoku ) and the Great Prison ( 大監獄 , Dai Kangoku ) , is a government-controlled stronghold in Paradise together with Marineford and Enies Lobby . It is the World Government 's maximum-security prison for the most dangerous criminals and pirates . It is located underwater in the middle of the Calm Belt and part of the Tarai Current .

name: Rock
description: The Yeti Cool Brothers are Rock ( ロック , Rokku ) and Scotch ( スコッチ , Sukotchi ) , a pair of giant assassins who were employed by Caesar Clown . They are members of a mysterious type of giant.

name: Rocks D. Xebec
description: Rocks D. Xebec , born Davy D. Xebec , was the captain of the legendary Rocks Pirates . Born on God Valley , he was a member of the Davy Family and the father of Marshall D. Teach , one of the current Four Emperors . His goal in life was to become King of the World ( 世界の王 , Sekai no Ō ) , a title he believed was held by his ancestor, the legendary pirate Davy D. Jones .

name: Rockstar
description: Rockstar is a member of the Red Hair Pirates , being relatively new in the crew two years ago.

name: Roddy
description: Roddy is a bull mink and a Guardian of the Whale Forest .

name: Roji
description: Roji was the wife of Oran , the mother of Mizuira , the sister-in-law of Nico Olvia , and the maternal aunt of Nico Robin .

name: Rokkaku
description: Lieutenant Junior Grade Rokkaku was one of Axe-Hand Morgan 's officers at the 153rd Marine Branch . He currently serves under Commander Ripper .

name: Rokki
description: Rokki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "six".

name: Rolling Logan
description: Rolling Logan is an army commander of the Majiatsuka Kingdom . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Ronja
description: Ronja is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Roronoa Arashi
description: Roronoa Arashi was the son of Shimotsuki Furiko and Roronoa Pinzoro making him a member of the Shimotsuki Family . He is the father of Roronoa Zoro and the husband of Tera .

name: Roronoa Pinzoro
description: Roronoa Pinzoro is a swordsman from a village in the East Blue . He is also the husband of Shimotsuki Furiko , the father of Roronoa Arashi , and the grandfather of Roronoa Zoro .

name: Roronoa Zoro
description: Roronoa Zoro , also known as "Pirate Hunter" Zoro , is the master swordsman ( 剣豪 , kengō ) and combatant of the Straw Hat Pirates , one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet , and is publicly recognized as the right-hand man and number two of his crew's captain, Monkey D. Luffy . Formerly a bounty hunter , he is the second member of Luffy's crew and the first to join it, doing so in the Romance Dawn Arc .

name: Roshio
description: "Executioner" Roshio is a pirate captain who has a bounty of 42,000,000.

name: Ross
description: Ross is a former combatant of the Bellamy Pirates .

name: Rosward Charlos
description: Saint Rosward Charlos is a World Noble , the son of Saint Rosward Rosward , and the older brother of Saint Shalria .

name: Rosward Rosward
description: Saint Rosward Rosward is a World Noble and member of the Rosward Family . He is the father of Charlos and Shalria .

name: Rosward Shalria
description: Saint Rosward Shalria is a World Noble , the daughter of Saint Rosward Rosward , and the younger sister of Saint Charlos .

name: Rowing
description: Rowing was the scholar ( 学者 , gakusha ) of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Roxanne
description: Roxanne is a Baratie regular who was friendly with Sanji .

name: Royder
description: Royder is a reporter who witnessed and reported on the events of the Summit War of Marineford from Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Run
description: Run the Machete is an ex-pirate and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He is a spider centaur .

name: Rush
description: Rush is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Russian
description: Russian was Senor Pink 's wife and the mother of Gimlet .

name: Ryuboshi
description: Ryuboshi is an oarfish merman and the second son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island .

name: Ryuma (Zombie)
description: Ryuma was a member of the General Zombies serving the Thriller Bark Pirates . His body came from the legendary Wano Country samurai Shimotsuki Ryuma , which was brought back to life after Gecko Moria infused it with Brook 's shadow .

name: Ryunosuke
description: Ryunosuke was a "Rising Dragon" ( 昇り竜 , Nobori Ryū ) created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi . It was created to aid Kurozumi Kanjuro , Kin'emon , Trafalgar Law , and the Straw Hat Pirates in scaling the leg of Zunesha to reach Zou , and received its name from the Straw Hats.

name: S-Bear
description: S-Bear is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Bartholomew Kuma .

name: S-Hawk
description: S-Hawk is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Dracule Mihawk .

name: S-Shark
description: S-Shark is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Jinbe .

name: S-Snake
description: S-Snake is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Boa Hancock .

name: Saber
description: Saber is a member of the Spade Pirates . Despite being commonly seen at Ace's side, he was allegedly not a commanding officer.

name: Sabo
devil_fruit: Flame-Flame Fruit ( VIZ , Funimation ); Flare-Flare Fruit ( 4Kids , Funimation subs)
role: Chief of Staff ( 参謀総長 , Sanbō Sōchō ) of the Revolutionary Army
description: "Flame Emperor" Sabo is the Revolutionary Army 's chief of staff , recognized as the No. 2 of the entire organization under Supreme Commander Monkey D. Dragon . He is also the sworn brother of the notorious pirates Monkey D. Luffy and the late Portgas D. Ace .

name: Sadi
role: Chief Guard ( 獄卒長 , Gokusotsu Chō )
description: Sadi is a chief guard of Impel Down . She always wants to be addressed as Little Sadi ( サディちゃん , Sadi-chan ) .

name: Sai
role: Captain of the Third Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet
description: Sai , also known as Don Sai , is a member of the Chinjao Family and the 13th leader of the Happo Navy , as well as the captain of the third ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is also a martial artist who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , where he met Monkey D. Luffy , whom he eventually pledged his loyalty to. He is now married to Baby 5 , a former officer of the Donquixote Pirates who defected due to falling in love with him. He is the brother of Boo and grandson of Chinjao .

name: Saikoro
description: Saikoro is a tanuki owned by Wakasa and Hiroshi that lives in Bakura Town in Wano Country .

name: Saitank
description: Saitank is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates ' Armored Division . After being tamed by Tama , he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Sakazuki
description: Sakazuki , formerly known by his admiral alias Akainu , is the current Fleet Admiral of the Marines , succeeding the previous Fleet Admiral, Sengoku . During the first half of the series, he was one of the three admirals , and was the last one out of the three to debut. Upon becoming the Fleet Admiral, one of Sakazuki's first decisions was to relocate Marine Headquarters into the New World in preparation for the New Pirate Age . Sakazuki is one of the most strident followers of Absolute Justice in the Marines, to the point where his extremism prompted his fellow admiral Aokiji to oppose his promotion to Fleet Admiral and resign from the Marines after this effort failed.

name: Saki
description: The following events are non-canon , and therefore not considered part of the canon story.

name: Saldeath
role: Chief Guard ( 牢番長 , Rōban Chō )
description: Saldeath is one of the Chief Guards of Impel Down . He is the commander of the Blue Gorillas .

name: Salome
description: Salome is Boa Hancock ’s personal Snake Weapon .

name: Sam
description: Sam-san is a drunk man from Cocoyasi Village . On many occasions, he wanders around unknowingly when he is drunk.

name: Samosa
description: Samosa is a king and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Samurai Batts
description: Samurai Batts is a visitor on Kyuka Island .

name: Sancrin
description: Sancrin the Thief is a member of the Longarm Tribe and Brook 's former manager.

name: Sandayu
description: Sandayu is a bodyguard who worked for the oiran Komurasaki.

name: Sanji
description: "Black Leg" Sanji is the cook of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is the fifth member of the crew and the fourth to join, doing so at the end of the Baratie Arc .

name: Sanjuan Wolf
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Seventh Ship)
description: Sanjuan Wolf is an enormous giant , known as "Colossal Battleship" for his size, and and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the seventh ship of the fleet . . He was one of the legendary criminals imprisoned within the sixth level of the great underwater prison Impel Down until he was freed and recruited by Marshall D. Teach .

name: Sapi
description: Sapi is a fish salesman from Loguetown who sold Sanji the blue-finned elephant tuna .

name: Sarahebi
description: Sarahebi is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria . She was also a school teacher in the Flower Capital .

name: Sarai
description: Sarai was a member of the Takotopus Pirates 30 years ago.

name: Sarfunkel
description: Sarfunkel is an inhabitant on the Island of Rare Animals . She is described as a barrel woman.

name: Sarie Nantokanette
description: Sarie Nantokanette is the queen of the Goa Kingdom and Sterry 's wife.

name: Sarquiss
description: "Big Knife" Sarquiss is the former first mate of the Bellamy Pirates , with a bounty of 38,000,000 on his head. His epithet originates from the large dagger he always wields, which bears a strong resemblance to a massive kukri .

name: Saru
description: Saru is the pet dog of two of the World Nobles , Saint Rosward and Saint Shalria .

name: Sarutobi
description: Sarutobi is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Sasaki
