description: "Overflowing" Sasaki is a bluespine unicornfish fish-man and one of the Tobiroppo , the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates. He also leads the crew's Armored Division. Before joining the Beasts Pirates, he captained his own crew called the Sasaki Pirates .

name: Satchels Maffey
description: Saint Satchels Maffey is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God 38 years ago. She took part in the God Valley Incident , and was responsible for Shanks and Shamrock splitting up. It is unknown if she is still working as a Knight of God in the current day.

name: Satori
description: Satori of the Forest is one of four former priests of Enel 's God's Army , operating the Ordeal of Balls to punish criminals during Enel's reign. He is also the oldest triplet brother of Hotori and Kotori .

name: Sauce
description: Sauce is the king of the Jambalaya Kingdom ( ジャンバラヤ王国 , Janbaraya Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Scales
description: Scales is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon .

name: Scarlett
description: Scarlett was the first daughter of the Riku Family and the former crown princess of Dressrosa until falsifying her own death. She was Viola 's elder sister, Kyros ' wife, and Rebecca 's mother. She was killed by Diamante when the Donquixote Pirates took over Dressrosa ten years ago.

name: Schollzo
description: Schollzo is a member of the Franky Family .

name: Scimitarta
description: Scimitarta is a member of the Endurance Curry Pirates .

name: Scopper Gaban
description: Scopper Gaban , also known as the "Mountain-Eater" , is a legendary retired pirate and former navigator of the Roger Pirates . His fame is said to rival that of his crewmates Gol D. Roger and Silvers Rayleigh , being known as the "Left Hand of the Pirate King" . After the disbandment of the Roger Pirates and the execution of Roger, Gaban has come to live out his retirement on Elbaph , alongside his partner Ripley and their son Colon , being known to the giant locals as Ya-san .

name: Scorpionlady
description: Scorpionlady is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates and a member of the crew's Armored Division. After being tamed by Tama , she became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Yeti Cool Brothers
description: The Yeti Cool Brothers are Rock ( ロック , Rokku ) and Scotch ( スコッチ , Sukotchi ) , a pair of giant assassins who were employed by Caesar Clown . They are members of a mysterious type of giant.

name: Scotch
description: "Iron Boy" Scotch is a member of the Beasts Pirates working as the guardian of one of the former Emperor Kaidou 's favorite islands.

name: Scratchmen Apoo
description: Scratchmen Apoo , also known as "Roar of the Sea" , is the captain of the On Air Pirates and was formerly an informant for the Beasts Pirates , led by Kaidou of the Four Emperors .

name: Sea Boar
description: The Sea Boar is a sea creature that debuted in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll .

name: Seagull Guns Nozdon
description: Seagull Guns Nozdon is a former member of the Roger Pirates .

name: Seamars
description: Captain Seamars is the captain of the Space Pirates who appears in Enel 's cover story.

name: Seira
description: Seira is a bluestriped angelfish mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Seki
description: Seki is the deposed king of Lulusia Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . He is the father of Princess Komane .

name: Sengoku
description: Sengoku the Buddha is a former Fleet Admiral of the Marines , succeeding Kong and preceding Sakazuki . He retired from his leadership position after the Summit War of Marineford , but remained in the Marines as an Inspector General .

name: Sennorikyuru
description: Sennorikyuru is the master of tea ceremonies and is considered the best cook of Wano Country .

name: Senor Pink
description: Senor Pink is an assassin and officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army. He was also the husband of Russian and the father of Gimlet .

name: Sentomaru
description: Sentomaru is a former Marine Officer and the former captain ( 隊長 , taichō ) of the Marines' Science Unit , as well as Dr. Vegapunk 's former bodyguard. He turned against the World Government and the Marines by siding with Vegapunk and the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Incident .

name: Serizawa
description: Serizawa is a dyer and instructor who taught Bellamy in the cover page serial The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Seto
description: Seto was one of the Shandia who lived on Jaya four hundred years ago. He was the husband of Kalgara 's daughter Mousse , making him an ancestor to Wyper .

name: Shachi
description: Shachi is a member of the Heart Pirates .

name: Vegapunk/Shaka
description: Shaka , also designated as Punk-01 ( PUNK-01 , Panku-Wan ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "good".

name: Shakuyaku
description: Shakuyaku , most commonly known by her nickname Shakky , is the bartender of Shakky's Rip-off Bar on the Sabaody Archipelago (formerly on Hachinosu over 40 years ago). She lives with her husband Silvers Rayleigh .

name: Sham
description: Sham is an officer of the Black Cat Pirates . Along with his partner Buchi , he is also the protector of the crew's ship, the Bezan Black , and together they are known as the Nyaban Brothers ( ニャーバン・ 兄弟 , Nyāban Burazāzu ) .

name: Shanba
description: Shanba is an inhabitant of Torino Kingdom . He was first seen at the time of Chopper 's arrival.

name: Shandia Chief
description: The Shandia chief is the leader of the Shandia tribe.

name: Shanks
description: "Red-Haired" Shanks , commonly known as just "Red Hair" , is the chief of the Red Hair Pirates and one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World .

name: Sharinguru
description: Captain Sharinguru is a Marine captain who helped in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby .

name: Sheepshead
role: Shinuchi of the Gifters ( ギフターズ真打ち , Gifutāzu Shin'uchi )
description: Sheepshead is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who was in charge of the Gifters on Zou.

name: Shelly
description: Shelly is Tonjit 's hooorse and an animal of Long Ring Long Land .

name: Shepherd Ju Peter
description: Saint Shepherd Ju Peter is a World Noble of the Shepherd Family and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , holding the title of Warrior God of Agriculture .

name: Shepherd Sommers
description: Saint Shepherd Sommers is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God .

name: Shiki
description: Shiki the Golden Lion , also known as the "Flying Pirate" , is the admiral and helmsman of the Golden Lion Pirates . He is also a former member of the Rocks Pirates and the first known prisoner to have ever escaped from Impel Down .

name: Shikon Kettai
description: Shikon Kettai is a member of the Germ Pirates .

name: Shimotsuki Furiko
description: Shimotsuki Furiko is a member of the Shimotsuki Family , a direct descendant of the legendary samurai Shimotsuki Ryuma and the older sister of Shimotsuki Ushimaru . She is also the wife of Roronoa Pinzoro , the mother of Roronoa Arashi , and the grandmother of Roronoa Zoro .

name: Shimotsuki Koushirou
description: Shimotsuki Koushirou is a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a master swordsman , he was both the teacher of as well as the distant relative of Roronoa Zoro . He is also the father of the late Shimotsuki Kuina and son of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou . He is the master of Isshin Dojo in Shimotsuki Village .

name: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou
description: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a swordsmith who crafted the Great Grade Blades , Wado Ichimonji and Enma . He was born in Wano Country , but illegally departed from there 55 years ago and eventually settled down in what became Shimotsuki Village in the East Blue . There, he fathered a son named Koushirou , making him the grandfather of Koushirou's daughter Kuina .

name: Shimotsuki Kuina
description: Shimotsuki Kuina was a childhood friend, relative and rival of Roronoa Zoro . She was the daughter of Shimotsuki Koushirou and the granddaughter of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou making her a descendant of Wano Country 's famed Shimotsuki Family . Her death at the age of eleven drove much of Zoro's ambitions as a swordsman , including his development of the Three Sword Style .

name: Shimotsuki Ryuma
description: Shimotsuki Ryuma was a legendary, world-famous samurai hailing from the Shimotsuki Family of Wano Country , who lived during Wano's "Country of Gold" era around 400 years ago. He was revered for his mastery of swordsmanship that earned him the title Sword God , as well as his feat of slaying a dragon. He is the direct ancestor of Shimotsuki Ushimaru and Roronoa Zoro .

name: Shimotsuki Ushimaru
description: Shimotsuki Ushimaru was a member of the Shimotsuki Family , and the last daimyo of Ringo in Wano Country before the takeover of Kurozumi Orochi as shogun 20 years ago. He was a direct descendant of the legendary samurai Shimotsuki Ryuma and the great-uncle of Roronoa Zoro through his older sister Furiko .

name: Shimotsuki Yasuie
description: Shimotsuki Yasuie , also known as " Yasu the Hedgehog ", Tonoyasu , or just Yasu ( ヤス , Yasu ) , was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a taikomochi who lived in Ebisu Town near the capital of Wano Country . He was the adoptive father of Toko .

name: Shin Detamaruka
description: Shin Detamaruka is a citizen of Dressrosa and a former dancer. She is the grandmother of Shin Jaiya .

name: Shin Jaiya
description: Shin Jaiya is a citizen of Dressrosa . She is the granddaughter of Shin Detamaruka .

name: Shine
description: Shine is a Marine Chief Petty Officer who works under the command of Hina .

name: Shinobu
devil_fruit: Ripe-Ripe Enticement Jutsu (VIZ and Funimation); Ripe-Ripe Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
description: Shinobu is a kunoichi from Wano Country and a retainer of the Kouzuki Family , having once served in the Oniwabanshu of the Kouzuki Shogunate and trained under Kin'emon as his protégée. She is also the younger sister of Shinosuke .

name: Shinosuke
description: Shinosuke is a ninja who serves the Kouzuki Family . He is Shinobu 's older brother.

name: Shion
description: Shion is a member of the Kuja . She is never seen but her name appears on the match-ups of the arena battle board.

name: Shioyaki
description: Shioyaki is a salmon fish-man who was a member of the Arlong Pirates and the head of banquets.

name: Shirahoshi
description: Princess Shirahoshi , famous in the world as the Mermaid Princess ( 人魚姫 , Ningyo Hime ) , is a giant smelt-whiting mermaid and the princess of the Ryugu Kingdom , as the youngest of King Neptune 's children and the only daughter in the Neptune royal family .

name: Shiryu
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Second Ship)
description: Shiryu of the Rain is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the second ship of the fleet .

name: Shishilian
description: "Full Power" Shishilian is a lion mink and the captain of the Inuarashi Musketeer Squad , as well as one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad.

name: Shoujou
description: "Sonar King" Shoujou is the big boss ( 大園長 , ō bosu ) of the Shoujou Pirates , the head of underwater sonar operations around Jaya 's coast, the sworn brother of Masira , and a follower of Mont Blanc Cricket , as part of the Saruyama Alliance . He and Masira were both fans of Liar Noland , the fairy tale concerning Cricket's ancestor, Mont Blanc Noland .

name: Shu
description: Captain Shu was one of the Marine captains that helped in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby .

name: Shura
description: "Sky Rider" Shura is one of the four former priests of the Upper Yard , who punished criminals with the Ordeal of String during Enel 's reign. He rode a giant flying bird named Fuza . He is a major antagonist during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Shyarly
description: Madam Shyarly is a shortfin mako shark mermaid living on Fish-Man Island . She is the proprietor of the Mermaid Cafe and Arlong 's younger half-sister. She used to be a fortune teller until she decided to discard her crystal ball.

name: Sicily
description: Sicily is a man with a thin black mustache, brown colored hair and beard, and a scar below his left eye. He wears a classical Marine officer uniform, with the hat provided with plume.

name: Sig
description: Sig is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc .

name: Silvers Rayleigh
description: Silvers Rayleigh , also known as the "Dark King" , is a legendary retired pirate who formerly served as the first mate of the Roger Pirates , being known as the "Right Hand of the Pirate King" . He is one of the major figures from the time when Gol D. Roger , the "Pirate King", was still alive.

name: Sind
description: Sind is a child who was held captive in the Biscuits Room on Punk Hazard . He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Skaldi
description: Skaldi is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph .

name: Skull
description: Skull is a member of the Spade Pirates and, subsequently, the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Sleepy
description: Sleepy is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . He has yet to make an appearance in the manga or anime

name: Smiley
role: Pet , Bio-Chemical weapon of mass destruction
description: Smiley , more commonly known as Slime ( スライム , Suraimu ) , was a pet of Caesar Clown . It was created by gathering and compressing the poisonous H2S gas that had spread throughout Punk Hazard and using Vegapunk 's process of Zoan Devil Fruit animation to bring it to life. It was kept in the Burning Lands before being released.

name: Smoker
devil_fruit: Smoke-Smoke Fruit (4Kids); Plume-Plume Fruit (VIZ, Funimation); Steam-Steam Fruit ( Grand Adventure )
description: Smoker the White Hunter is a Marine vice-admiral and the commander of G-5 Branch's Unit 01, as well as the overall Base Commander of the G-5 Marine base .

name: Smooge
description: "Rebar" Smooge is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen.

name: Snakeman (Gifter)
description: Snakeman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates .

name: Sodom
description: Sodom is one of the two gigantic King Bulls (sea horse in the most literal sense) owned by the Franky Family , the other being Gomorrah .

name: Solitaire
description: Solitaire is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country .

name: Some
description: O-Some is a geisha who works in Wano Country 's Flower Capital .

name: Sonieh
description: Sonieh was the leader of 50-men mechanic team in the Foxy Pirates . He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip .

name: Sora
description: Sora is a coris mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Sora (fictional)
description: Sora is a fictional character and the main protagonist of the comic Sora, Warrior of the Sea . The character's exploits are based on the actions of Marine heroes, in order to serve as Marine propaganda.

name: Soro
description: Soro was Helmeppo 's pet wolf and the main reason that Roronoa Zoro was arrested by the Marines at Shells Town . He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Spacey
description: First Lieutenant Spacey is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Tsukimi .

name: Spandam
description: Spandam is the former chief of CP9 and CP5 . He is the son of Spandine , who was also his predecessor as the chief of CP9. He currently serves under CP0 .

name: Spandine
description: Spandine is the father of Spandam and was CP9 's chief 22 years ago during the Ohara Incident . He led the "investigation" in Ohara and was responsible for summoning the Buster Call . Presently, his political power within the World Government is weakening due to an unknown disease he has been stricken with. At some point later, his sickness led to him losing all of his authority within the government.

name: Spartan
description: Spartan is a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum who was going to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , before being defeated by Luffy .

name: Spector
description: Spector is the owner of the Tropical Hotel .

name: Speed
description: Speed is a former Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates stationed in Bakura Town . She has since become a subordinate to Kurozumi Tama due to the latter's Devil Fruit powers and became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . She has been dubbed Umami ( ウマ美 , Umami , English version: "Horselina") by Tama and Monkey D. Luffy .

name: Speed Jiru
description: Speed Jiru is the former 14th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Spencer
description: Spencer was a member of the Roger Pirates and their intelligence officer ( 諜報部員 , chōhō buin ) until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Sphinx
description: The Sphinx is a giant sphinx that serves as the boss of Impel Down 's Level 2, Beast Hell.

name: Splash and Splatter
description: Splash and Splatter are two newkama pirate twins. They both willingly donated blood to Sanji when he was dying of severe blood loss.

name: Spoil
role: Chairman of Thriller Bark Victim's Association
description: Spoil is the chairman of the Thriller Bark Victim's Association .

name: Squard
description: "Maelstrom Spider" Squard is an infamous New World pirate and the captain of the Maelstrom Spider Pirates . Squard and his crew were allies of the Whitebeard Pirates and participated in the Summit War of Marineford .

name: Stainless
description: Vice Admiral Stainless is a Marine officer who participated in the Summit War of Marineford . In the anime, he was initially named Kaizeruhige ( カイゼルヒゲ , Kaizeruhige , Bandai : "Kaiser Mustache") .

name: Stalker
description: Lieutenant Junior Grade Stalker is a Marine on Vice Admiral Momonga 's ship.

name: Stansen
description: Stansen is a giant from Elbaph and shipwright . A childhood friend of Hajrudin 's, they sailed together in their youth.

name: Stealth Black
description: Stealth Black is a fictional member of Germa 66 portrayed in the comic strip Sora, Warrior of the Sea . His character was based on a Raid Suit created by the Vinsmoke Family that was later given to their estranged third son, Sanji .

name: Stefan
description: Stefan is Whitebeard 's dog. It is a character invented by Oda when a fan asked him in an SBS if Whitebeard's mustache could be used as a boomerang. Oda answered that Whitebeard probably did whenever he took his dog, Stefan, for a walk.

name: Sterry
description: Sterry is the king of the Goa Kingdom and the husband of the queen , Sarie Nantokanette .

name: Stevie
description: Stevie is one of the two sea train organizers in Water 7 , along with Bushon .

name: Stomp
description: Stomp is a member of the Arabasta Kingdom 's Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Strawberry
description: Vice Admiral Strawberry is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call assault on Enies Lobby .

name: Streusen
description: "Gourmet Knight" Streusen is the executive chef of the Big Mom Pirates , and is also the co-founder of the crew alongside Big Mom herself.

name: Stroganoff
description: Stroganoff is the king of the Beef Kingdom ( ビーフ王国 , Bīfu Ōkoku ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Stronger
description: Stronger is the horse that Doc Q rides on. Because Doc Q is seemingly always sick, he rides on Stronger all the time, since the doctor tends to collapse if left unsupported for some time; however, Stronger is just as sick as he is. He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly".

name: Stussy
description: Stussy is MADS ' first-ever successful clone , having been modeled after Miss Buckingham Stussy . She is a masked agent of CP0 , although she is actually a spy employed by Dr. Vegapunk and spent years working deeply undercover in the World Government until she was forced to discard her cover, during which she was allegedly killed by another agent . Additionally, while acting as an agent, she operated as an emperor of the Underworld under the epithet " Queen of the Pleasure District ".

name: Su
description: Su is solid white (pale purple in the anime) with squinted eyes and average-sized ears. Her mouth somewhat resembles a snout and has never been shown open. Her tail is long compared to her body, and is lighter at the end.

name: Sugamichi and Warazane
description: Sugamichi and Warazane are two land-dwelling catfish ridden by Fujin and Raijin , respectively.

name: Sugar
description: Sugar is a special officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Trebol Army. She was one of the most integral components of Doflamingo 's plan in keeping Dressrosa in line, as any dissenters were turned into toys by her Hobi Hobi no Mi powers. She is also the younger sister of Monet . Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Sukare Karehosui
description: Sukare Karehosui is a member of the Germ Pirates and the younger sister of Sukare Tainen .

name: Sukare Tainen
description: Sukare Tainen is the captain of the Germ Pirates and the older brother of Sukare Karehosui .

name: Suke
description: Suke is a gangster who is a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country .

name: Sukoshiba Kanishitoru
description: Sukoshiba Kanishitoru is a guard working in Impel Down .

name: Sukune
description: Sukune is a yokozuna -ranked sumo wrestler from Wano Country . He is the older brother of Urashima .

name: Suleiman
description: Suleiman the Beheader is a war criminal who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . He eventually joined the Beautiful Pirates , serving under Cavendish . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Sunbell
description: Sunbell is a fish-man and former member of the Roger Pirates .

name: Surume
description: Surume is a kraken and famous giant creature which dwells in the deepest parts of the ocean . He was enslaved by the New Fish-Man Pirates , but later became the pet of Monkey D. Luffy , who was the one who gave Surume his name.

name: Suzume
description: Suzume is a rooster living in the Tower of Justice .

name: Sweet Pea
description: Sweet Pea is a member of the Kuja tribe living on the island Amazon Lily . During the timeskip, she became a member of the Kuja Pirates .

name: T Bone
description: "Ship Cutter" T Bone was a Marine Vice Admiral . As a Marine Captain two years ago, he was a minor antagonist during the Water 7 Arc and confronted the Straw Hat Pirates on the Sea Train route to Enies Lobby . Prior to joining the Marines , he was a royal knight.

name: Taka
description: O-Taka was the wife of Hyougoro . She was killed by Kurozumi Orochi 's forces 20 years ago.

name: Tamikebao
description: Tamikebao is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family and a checkpoint guard at the dock between the Flower Capital and Kuri regions of Wano Country .

name: Tabuhachiro
description: Tabuhachiro is a samurai and an ally of the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Tacos
description: Tacos is the king of the Shishano Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Takao
description: Takao , also known as O-Taka ( お高 ) , is a kamuro living in the Flower Capital of Wano Country who attended to the oiran Komurasaki alongside Toko .

name: Take
description: Take is a carp fish-man and is a member of the Arlong Pirates . He is the commander of parties .

name: Tama (Sphinx)
description: Tama is a friendly pet sphinx from Whitebeard 's home island Sphinx . It is owned by Oide .

name: Tamachibi
description: Tamachibi is a child Dr. Kureha healed while she was in Cocoa Weed . He lives with his father, who is the owner of Stool , a restaurant in town.

name: Tamago
description: Baron Tamago (also known as Viscount Hiyoko and Count Niwatori in his second and third form respectively) is a knight-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates , who originates from the Longleg Tribe . He and his partner Pekoms were responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom 's protection.

name: Tamagon
description: Tamagon is a ship dismantler from Water 7 . Initially part of the Franky Family , he is now working for the Galley-La Company as part of the Zambai's Company Union.

name: Tamanegi
description: Tamanegi is a former member of the Usopp Pirates , along with Ninjin and Piiman , before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Tank Lepanto
description: Tank Lepanto is the commander of Dressrosa 's Self-Defense Army. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi .

name: Tansui
description: Tansui is a member of the Macro Pirates and a former member of the Sun Pirates . He is an arowana fish-man .

name: Tarara
description: Tarara is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom .

name: Tararan
description: Tararan was a General Zombie and the Commander of the Spider Mice on Thriller Bark . He was the one that had caught the Thousand Sunny in his webs, forcing the Straw Hat Pirates to enter the island.

name: Taro
description: Taro was a member of the Roger Pirates .

name: Taroimo
description: Taroimo is a cyborg dog from Karakuri Island .

name: Tashigi
description: Captain Tashigi is a Marine officer serving under Vice Admiral Smoker in the base of G-5 , as well as a member and Captain of G-5 Branch's Unit 01.

name: Tate
description: Tate is a nurse who worked for the Whitebeard Pirates as part of the crew's medical division.

name: Tea IV
description: Tea IV is the king of the Eigis Kingdom on the Grand Line and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely .

name: Tegata Ringana
description: Tegata Ringana is a doctor on Dressrosa .

name: Tenjo-Sagari
description: Tenjo-Sagari is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria .

name: Tensei
role: Director of the Marine Bureau of Investigation
description: Tensei , also known by his Marine alias Kurouma , is the director of the Marine Bureau of Investigation .

name: Terracotta
description: Terracotta is Igaram 's wife and the royal head chef who appeared very late in the Arabasta Arc . She is also the royal seamstress. Her friend and helper is Maidy .

name: Terry
description: Terry is a bartender at a pub in Mock Town . He is not named in the manga , but his name was given in the databooks.

name: Terry Gilteo
description: Terry Gilteo is an intelligence controller ( 情報管制官 , Jōhō kansei-kan ) of the Revolutionary Army and was stationed at their headquarters on Baltigo .

name: Tera
description: Tera was the daughter of a bandit from the East Blue . She is the mother of Roronoa Zoro , as well as the wife of Roronoa Arashi .

name: Teru
description: Mr. Teru is a carpenter who lives in Cocoyasi Village .

name: Thalassa Lucas
description: Thalassa Lucas is the former king of the Ilisia Kingdom , a country in West Blue .

name: Thatch
description: Thatch was the 4th division commander , as well as the head chef of the Whitebeard Pirates . He was murdered by Marshall D. Teach for his Devil Fruit .

name: Thormann
description: Thormann is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc , and, after being converted into a demon , a minor antagonist during the Elbaph Arc .

name: Tibany
description: Tibany is an okama from Momoiro Island . He and the other okama chased after Sanji and attempted to convert him into an okama. In the anime, he was called Elizabeth ( エリザベス , Erizabesu ) .

name: Tilestone
description: Tilestone is one of the five foremen of Dock One of the Galley-La Company in Water 7 . Tilestone is the last of the foremen to be formally introduced in the story, although he is present from the first scene Galley-La is shown in. His specialties are cabinetry, caulking, and flag making.

name: Togare
description: Togare is a Fish-Man that lives in Coral Hill . In the manga, he was an unnamed background character, but he was given a name and his role was expanded slightly in the anime.

name: Tokijiro
description: Tokijiro is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country . He once possessed the blueprints to Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima .

name: Tokikake
description: Tokikake , better known by his alias Chaton , is a Marine vice admiral .

name: Toko
description: Toko is a girl who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country and is under the care of Kouzuki Hiyori . She is the adopted daughter of the late former daimyo of Hakumai , Shimotsuki Yasuie , and thus a member of the Shimotsuki Family . She worked as a kamuro for Hiyori, who was living as the courtesan "Komurasaki", until Toko angered Shogun Kurozumi Orochi and was driven out of the Flower Capital. After the Beasts Pirates ' fall from power and Orochi's death, she returned to live in the Flower Capital with Hiyori.

name: Tom
description: Tom was a long-horned cowfish fish-man known as the greatest shipwright in the world, particularly for building the Roger Pirates ' ship, the Oro Jackson . He was also the older brother of Den , a fellow fish-man shipwright.

name: Tomatito
description: Tomatito is a musician who lives in Dressrosa .

name: Tomato Gang
description: Tomato Gang is a debt collector who is after Pandaman . The two often show up in panels together, as Pandaman is constantly on the run from him. He later hires Pandaman's rival, Unforgivable Mask to help track him down. He carries something that looks like a gun, but there are rumors that it is actually a piece of konbu-maki (コンブ巻き, a type of food consisting of fish wrapped in seaweed and boiled).

name: Tomozo
description: Tomozo is a shopkeeper in the Wano Country 's Flower Capital who operated 41 years ago.

name: Tonjil
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
description: Tonjil is Tonjit 's grandson and Tonsfer 's brother.

name: Tonjit
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
description: Tonjit is an elderly nomad belonging to a tribe that lives on Long Ring Long Land .

name: Tonsfer
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
description: Tonsfer is Tonjit 's granddaughter and Tonjil 's sister.

name: Tony Tony Chopper
description: Tony Tony Chopper , also known as "Cotton Candy Lover" Chopper , is the doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is the sixth member of the crew and the fifth to join, doing so at the end of the Drum Island Arc . He was temporarily forced to join the Foxy Pirates during the Long Ring Long Land Arc but was quickly returned to Luffy 's crew.

name: Topknot
description: Topknot is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon .

name: Topman Warcury
description: Saint Topman Warcury is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , holding the title of Warrior God of Justice .

name: Torasaburo
description: Torasaburo was a tiger created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi . It was created to aid him, Kin'emon , and Bariete scale Zunesha 's leg to reach Zou , fading away after it achieved its goal.

name: Tori
description: Tori is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Tosa
description: Tosa is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Toto
description: Toto is Koza 's father and Goro 's older brother, who lives in Yuba .

name: Totts
description: Totts is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom , having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since childhood.

name: Toyama Tsujigiro
description: Toyama Tsujigiro is a Wano Country government official who lives in the Flower Capital . He is also a serial killer who attacked strangers at night.

name: Trafalgar D. Water Law
description: Trafalgar D. Water Law , more commonly known as just Trafalgar Law ( トラファルガー・ロー , Torafarugā Rō ) and by his epithet as the "Surgeon of Death" , is a pirate from the North Blue and the captain and doctor of the Heart Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". He became one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea during the timeskip, but his position was revoked for allying with the Straw Hat Pirates . Like many other pirates, Law has dreams of finding the One Piece , while also desiring to know the purpose of the Will of D.

name: Trafalgar Lami
description: Trafalgar Lami was Trafalgar D. Water Law 's younger sister from the town of Flevance .

name: Trebol
description: Trebol is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates , acting as a Staff Officer. He occupies the Club seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Trebol Army subdivision.

name: Tristan
description: Tristan is a squirrel mink and one of Inuarashi 's subjects, until Carrot took the throne of Mokomo Dukedom .

name: Tritobu
description: Tritobu is the prince of the Nagagutsu Kingdom . He accompanied his father Furrari to the Levely .

name: Tritoma
description: Tritoma is a former empress of the Kuja tribe, succeeding Shakuyaku and preceding Boa Hancock . She died years ago, as a victim of Love Sickness .

name: Tsugaru Umi
description: Tsugaru Umi is a woman who trained Nico Robin to perform as a geisha. She lives in the Flower Capital of the Wano Country .

name: Tsukimi
description: Dr. Tsukimi was an old man who appeared in Enel 's cover story .

name: Tsumonsieur Kamaya
description: Tsumonsieur Kamaya is a former CP9 agent.

name: Tsunagoro
description: "Broken Hat" Tsunagoro is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Hakumai region in Wano Country . He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Tsunokkov
description: Tsunokkov is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. He is one of Emporio Ivankov 's dancers.

name: Tsuru
description: Tsuru , known as the "Great Staff Officer" , is a renowned Marine Vice Admiral , as well as the grandmother of Kujaku .

name: Tsurube
description: "Careless" Tsurube was a retainer of the Kurozumi Family who burned to death after accidentally falling into the boiling oil prepared for Kouzuki Oden 's execution .

name: Tsurue Monnosuke
description: Tsurue Monnosuke is the machi-bugyō of the Flower Capital .

name: Tsurujo
description: Tsurujo , commonly known as O-Tsuru ( お鶴 , VIZ: "Otsuru") , is a tea house owner from the Wano Country , as well as the wife of Kin'emon .

name: Turco
description: Turco is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Franky . When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Turco impersonated Wire .

name: Tyrannosaurus
description: Tyrannosaurus is a small, white mouse, with a long hairless tail, red eyes, and a cheerful look.

name: Ubau
description: Ubau was the God of Skypiea roughly 400 years ago. His desire to live on the Vearth the Shandia had called home initiated a war between the Skypieans and Shandia that would last over 400 years.

name: Ucy
description: "Brutal Bull" Ucy is a fighting bull ( 闘牛 , Tōgyū ) that regularly competed as a gladiator in Dressrosa 's Corrida Colosseum , where he was befriended (and named) by Monkey D. Luffy .

name: Uhho
description: Uhho is a gorilla who was trapped on Dressrosa as a toy .

name: Uholisia
description: Uholisia is the daughter of Chichilisia , the leader of the Niho Navy . She is the wife of 25 men and Sai 's former fiancée.

name: UK
description: UK is a tall man with a prominent gut, while also sporting a mohawk that is combed back, long, thin sideburns and black lipstick. He wears a ragged dark shirt decorated with smiley faces over a fishnet one, as well as a pearl necklace.

name: Ukkari
description: Seaman Recruit Ukkari is a Marine who serves at the Shells Town Marine base .

name: Ukon
description: Ukon is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima .

name: Ulti
description: Ulti is a former member of the Tobiroppo , the six strongest Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates . She is the elder sister of fellow former Tobiroppo Page One , and the daughter of a former Warlord of the Sea , Hanafuda .

name: Ultraking
description: Ultraking was the assistant-manager of Rain Dinners in Rainbase during the Arabasta Arc .

name: Umit
role: Shipping Magnate ( 海運王 , Kaiun-ō , Viz: "Shipping King")
description: "Deep-Sea Currents" Umit is a magnate who presides Umit Shipping and one of the emperors of the Underworld .

name: Underbite
description: Underbite is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon .

name: Unforgivable Mask
description: Unforgivable Mask is a hidden One Piece character, much like Pandaman . He is, in fact, Pandaman's rival.

name: Uni
description: Uni is a tall man with puffy light hair (dark brown in the anime). It is unclear whether his eyes show to have irises or pupils, as he has appeared both ways. He wears a gray bandana with vertical black stripes on his face, which covers his entire face and goes all the way down to his upper chest. Like most members of the Heart Pirates, he wears a white boiler suit with the Heart Pirates' Jolly Roger on the left breast.

name: Unigaro
description: Unigaro was a Wild Zombie who lived on Thriller Bark .

name: Urban
description: Urban is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident .

name: Urbain
description: Urbain is a giant that Kouzuki Oden encountered in his travels.

name: Urouge
description: Urouge , nicknamed the Mad Monk , is a pirate hailing from a sky island and high priest of the Fallen Monk Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates referred to as the " Worst Generation ", and prior to the two-year timeskip had a bounty of 108,000,000.

name: Usagihebi
crew: Animals of the Island of Rare Animals
description: Usagihebi is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals . Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon .

name: Usakkov
role: Dancer, Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
description: Usakkov is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. He is one of Emporio Ivankov 's dancers.

name: Ushiano
description: Ushiano is a cattle mink , the deputy commander of the Revolutionary Army 's West Army, and the assistant of Morley .

name: Usunoro
description: Usunoro is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki .

name: Usopp
description: "God" Usopp is the sniper of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . He is the fourth member of the crew and the third to join, doing so at the end of the Syrup Village Arc . Although he left the crew during the Water 7 Arc , he rejoined at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Uta
description: Uta is a world -famous diva ( 歌姫 , Utahime ) and the adopted daughter of the Emperor Red-Haired Shanks , being a musician in his crew . In the filler Uta's Past Arc , she met and befriended Monkey D. Luffy in Foosha Village when they were both children.

name: Uwattsura
description: Uwattsura is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a chief guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Uzu
description: Uzu is a child who was held captive in Punk Hazard 's Biscuits Room . He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Uzuki Namida
description: Uzuki Namida is a samurai and a member of the Uzuki Family who was formerly imprisoned in the Udon Prisoner Mine .

name: Uzuki Tempura
description: Uzuki Tempura was a samurai who, as a member of the Uzuki Family , served as the daimyo of the Udon region until he was imprisoned and killed by Kaidou 20 years ago.

name: Van Augur
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Third Ship)
description: Van Augur , nicknamed "The Supersonic" , is the sniper , and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the third ship of the fleet .

name: Vander Decken
description: Vander Decken was the first captain of the Flying Dutchman .

name: Vander Decken IX
description: Vander Decken IX is a Japanese bullhead shark fish-man , the eighth descendant of the legendary Vander Decken , and the captain of the Flying Pirates .

name: Vasco Shot
role: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Eighth Ship)
description: Vasco Shot , monikered "Heavy Drinker" , is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the eighth ship of the fleet . He was originally one of several legendary criminals given a life sentence on Impel Down 's Level 6, before being freed by Marshall D. Teach and joining him.

name: Vegapants
description: Vegapants is a joke character invented by a fan in the SBS and jokingly accepted by Oda . Vegapants is the cousin of Vegapunk (being the son of his father's younger brother) who resides on the island of Pants Hazard .

name: Vegapunk
description: Dr. Vegapunk was the leading scientist of the SSG in the employment of the Marines . His work included discovering the secrets and uses of seastone , the secrets of how Devil Fruit powers work, the co-discovery of the Lineage Factor and its applications, the creation of the Pacifista and Seraphim , and various other scientific achievements that are said to be at least 500 years ahead of current technology . He hailed from the technologically advanced Karakuri Island and resided on Egghead , where his laboratory is located.

name: Vergo
description: "Demon Bamboo" Vergo was one of the four elite officers and the first to occupy the Heart seat of the Donquixote Pirates under the codename Corazon .

name: Very Good
description: Very Good is a Marine Captain and one of the Marines who helped to attack the Straw Hat Pirates during the Buster Call at Enies Lobby .

name: Victoria Cindry
description: Victoria Cindry was once a famous stage actress who died after falling off the stage twelve years ago. Having been infatuated with her, Dr. Hogback stole her corpse in order to make her his own personal zombie servant with the aid of Gecko Moria 's powers .

name: Victoria Shiruton Doruyanaika
description: Victoria Shiruton Doruyanaika was a girl from Eustass Kid 's and Killer 's childhood and their first crush.

name: Vincent
description: Vincent is the prince of the Sankan Kingdom ( サンカン王国 , Sankan Ōkoku ) .

name: Vinsmoke Ichiji
description: Vinsmoke Ichiji , also known as "Sparking Red" , is the eldest son and second child of the Vinsmoke Family . He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military arm, Germa 66 .

name: Vinsmoke Judge
description: Vinsmoke Judge , also known as Garuda , is the king of the Germa Kingdom , the supreme commander of the Germa 66 , and the patriarch of the Vinsmoke Family , being Sanji 's biological father.

name: Vinsmoke Niji
description: Vinsmoke Niji , also known as "Dengeki Blue" , is the second son and third child of the Vinsmoke Family . He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military army, Germa 66 .

name: Vinsmoke Reiju
description: Vinsmoke Reiju , also known as "Poison Pink" , is the eldest child and only daughter of the Vinsmoke Family . She is the princess of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military army, Germa 66 .

name: Vinsmoke Sora
description: Vinsmoke Sora was the queen of the Germa Kingdom , the wife of Vinsmoke Judge and the mother of Vinsmoke Reiju , Vinsmoke Ichiji , Vinsmoke Niji , Sanji and Vinsmoke Yonji who died sometime during Sanji's childhood.

name: Vinsmoke Yonji
description: Vinsmoke Yonji , also known as "Winch Green" , is the fourth son and youngest child of the Vinsmoke Family . He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military arm, Germa 66 .

name: Viola
description: Viola is the second daughter of the Riku Family and the current crown princess of Dressrosa after her niece Rebecca abdicated her position. She is the younger sister of the late Scarlett .

name: Vista
description: "Vista of the Flower Swords" is the former 5th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . He is one of the most prominent members of his crew.

name: Vitan
description: Vitan is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Vito
description: "Monster Gun" Vito is the advisor of the Fire Tank Pirates .

name: Wadatsumi
description: "Large Monk" Wadatsumi is a giant tiger blowfish fish-man and a member of the Sun Pirates . He was formerly a member of the Flying Pirates under captain Vander Decken IX before they were defeated. He was a minor antagonist during the Fish-Man Island Arc but became an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Wakasa
description: Wakasa is a resident of Bakura Town in Wano Country who runs a restaurant alongside Hiroshi; the two of them own a tanuki named Saikoro which the sumo wrestler Urashima forced to be cooked and served to him.

name: Wallace
description: Wallace is a weedy stingfish fish-man and a member of the Spade Pirates .

name: Wallem
description: Wallem is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Wanda
description: Wanda is a canine mink of the Inuarashi Musketeer Squad , previously also acting as a Kingsbird to both Inuarashi and Nekomamushi .

name: Wany
description: Wany resembles a giant hybrid of a crocodile and a boar. It has a huge body compared to its legs and tail, the latter being curled up at the end of its body, with a short snout and big fangs popping out of its mouth from both the upper and lower jaw, the biggest fangs being located at the corners of its mouth. It has small eyes fixed in an angry look and a saddle strapped around its belly for its owner, Wanda , to ride on.

name: Wanyudo
description: Wanyudo is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates , serving as Black Maria 's weapon.

name: Wanze
description: Wanze is an agent of CP7 and a cook , specializing in making ramen noodles.

name: Wapol
role: King of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom
description: "Tin-Plate" Wapol is the king of the South Blue 's Evil Black Drum Kingdom and president of Wapol Konzern, an international toy conglomerate.

name: Warashi
description: Warashi is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel .

name: Waruno Furishiro
description: Waruno Furishiro is a man who manages weapon production orders on behalf of Kurozumi Orochi in the Flower Capital of Wano Country .

name: Wellington
description: Wellington is a North Blue pirate from around fourteen to sixteen years ago.

name: Wheel
description: Wheel is the prince of the South Fire Kingdom. He accompanied his father Jeep to the Levely .

name: Whitey Bay
description: "Ice Witch" Whitey Bay is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates before forming her own crew subordinate to Whitebeard .

name: Who's-Who
description: Who's-Who , also known as Who of the Droplets , is a pirate who acted as one of the Tobiroppo , the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates , prior to Kaidou 's fall from power after the Raid on Onigashima .

name: Wicca
description: Wicca is a female dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom beneath Green Bit . She, along with other members of her kind often pose as Dressrosa 's fairies and take their "offerings". She is a member of the Tontatta Pirates , the 5th Division of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Willie Gallon
description: A scientist is an individual who uses their knowledge and expertise to help engineer new creations, either to serve the world or themselves.

name: Wire
description: Wire is among the tallest members of the crew, standing about one meter taller than Kid and Killer . He wears a dark brown cloak, a wire shirt, black shorts, and black fishnet stockings. The looped, golden belt on his shorts matches Heat's . He has the crew's secondary Jolly Roger over his chest and a necklace with small axe blades on it. He has droopy eyes, regardless of his expression.

name: Wolf (Elbaph)
description: Wolf is a giant from Elbaph who works as the gym teacher at the Walrus School .

name: Woop Slap
description: Woop Slap is the mayor of Monkey D. Luffy 's hometown, Foosha Village .

name: Wyper
description: "Berserker" Wyper is the former leader of the Shandia warriors that fought to take Upper Yard back from Enel . He is the direct descendant of Kalgara . After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards and became their leader.

name: X Drake
description: "Red Flag" X Drake (pronounced as "Diez Drake") is the captain of the Marine Secret Special Unit SWORD . In order to go undercover as a pirate , he publicly defected from his position as rear admiral and founded the Drake Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates referred to as the " Worst Generation ", and before the two-year timeskip had a bounty of 222,000,000.

name: Yama
description: Yama is a Birkan and the commander of the Divine Soldiers under Enel . He is a supporting antagonist during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Yamakaji
description: Vice Admiral Yamakaji is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby .

name: Yamanba
description: Yamanba is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria .

name: Yamato
description: Yamato is the son of Kaidou . Born as Kaidou's daughter and groomed from a young age to be his heir, Yamato instead developed a profound admiration for the legendary samurai Kouzuki Oden . After Oden's death, Yamato decided to become like him, impersonating him and adopting his mannerisms. As a result of this desire to emulate Oden, Yamato decided to become a man and identify as Kaidou's son, with his father and the Beasts Pirates referring to him as such as well.

name: Yame
description: O-Yame is a woman who lives in Okobore Town of Kuri with her two sons, Kinbo and an unnamed infant.

name: Yamenahare
description: Yamenahare is a citizen of Pucci and the manservant to Marumieta , the daughter of Pucci's mayor, Bimine .

name: Yamon
description: Yamon was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Yarisugi
description: Yarisugi is a Marine Commodore of G-5 Unit 06.

name: Yasopp
description: Yasopp , known as "Chaser" , is one of the Senior Officers and the sniper of the Red Hair Pirates . He is also the father of Usopp and the widower of Banchina .

name: Yatappe
description: "Snake-Eyes" Yatappe is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Kibi region in Wano Country . He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Yazaemon
description: Yazaemon is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi .

name: Ylva
description: Ylva is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . She is the great-great-granddaughter of Jarul .

name: Yokan
description: Yokan is a doctor assigned to treat the injured at sumo matches in Bakura Town.

name: Yokozuna
description: Yokozuna is a Sumo Frog that Tom's Workers kept as a pet , friend and mascot up until Tom 's execution.

name: Yomo
description: Pastor Yomo is a sheep mink and one of Inuarashi 's Musketeers .

name: Vegapunk/York
description: York , also designated as Punk-06 ( PUNK-06 , Panku-Shikkusu ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "greed".

name: Yorki
description: "Calico" Yorki was the captain of the Rumbar Pirates .

name: Yosaku
description: Yosaku along with Johnny are old friends and former bounty hunting partners of Roronoa Zoro .

name: Yoshimoto
description: Mr. Yoshimoto is the owner of the restaurant Spice Bean .

name: Yotsubane
description: Yotsubane is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel .

name: Yu
description: Yu is a little girl who accidentally bumped into Smoker and got ice cream on his uniform.

name: Yui
description: Yui was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Yuki
description: Yuki was a young girl over 100 years ago. She was responsible for starting the century-long duel between Dorry and Brogy .

name: Yurikah
description: Yurikah is the captain of the Tulip Pirates that attacked Mirrorball Island in Jango 's cover story .

name: Zabo
description: Zabo was a man that illegally trespassed into Upper Yard and was subsequently punished by Enel during his escape.

name: Zadie
description: Zadie was one of the archaeologists of Ohara .

name: Zala
description: "Poison Spider" Zala , better known by her alias Miss Doublefinger , was the second highest ranking female officer agent in the secret organization known as Baroque Works . As an officer agent, she was partnered with Mr. 1 . She also used the alias of Paula while she acted as the owner of Spiders Cafe in Arabasta .

name: Zambai
description: Zambai is a ship dismantler from Water 7 , who was a member of the Franky Family and Franky 's right hand man. After the timeskip, he, Kiev , and Tamagon have joined the Galley-La Company as Zambai's Company Union.

name: Zangirimaru
description: Zangirimaru is a former prisoner of Udon 's prisoner mines. In the anime credits and closed captions, he was named Jo ( ジョー , Jō ) .

name: Zanki
description: Zanki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "three".

name: Zaza
description: Zaza is a mythical God of Rain who is feared by the World Nobles living in Mary Geoise .

name: Zeff
role: Head Chef of Baratie , Pirate Captain (former)
description: Zeff is the head chef and owner of the Baratie , as well as the adoptive father and mentor of Sanji .

name: Zeo
description: Zeo is a Japanese wobbegong fish-man and the self-proclaimed " Noble of the Fish-Man District ". He was an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment.

name: Zepo
description: Zepo was a polar bear mink , Bepo 's older brother, and a member of the Nox Pirates . He was killed by Big Mom in Totto Land five years ago after he spun her Soul Pocus Roulette .

name: Zeus
description: Zeus the Thundercloud is a homie that is fused with Nami 's Sorcery Clima-Tact . Before merging with the Clima-Tact, he was owned by Big Mom , who would summon him from her left hand. Due to being made from a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, he is more powerful than most homies.

name: Zodia
description: Zodia is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Zotto
description: Zotto is a Marine Lieutenant and a subordinate of Vice Admiral Momonga .

name: Zucca
description: Zucca is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard .

name: Zunesha
description: Zunesha is a Naitamie-Norida elephant that was affiliated with Joy Boy 800 years ago . It now wanders through the New World and carries the island of Zou on its back as punishment for an unspecified crime it committed in the past.

name: Zururin
description: Zururin is a catfish fish-man who encountered Queen Otohime as a child 16 years ago.

name: Acrobatic Fuwas
description: The Buggy Pirates are a band of pirates led by Buggy , a former Roger Pirates apprentice .

name: Admiral
description: Admiral is the second highest rank in the hierarchy of the Marines , senior to a Vice Admiral and junior to the Fleet Admiral . There are only three Admirals serving at a given time, and in light of their status as the strongest Marine officers, they count among the most powerful people in the World Government 's service.

name: Five Elders
role: Highest Authorities of the World Government (Publicly)
description: The Five Elders are a council of the five highest-ranking Celestial Dragons collectively titled the " Highest Authorities of the World Government " ( 世界政府最高権力 , Sekai Seifu Saikō Kenryoku ) . Publicly claimed to oversee and wield the greatest authority over the entire world at large, they are secretly subordinate to the government's shadow ruler Nerona Imu , the true King of the World and occupant of the Empty Throne . They are almost always found residing in the Room of Authority in Pangaea Castle .

name: Four Emperors
description: The Four Emperors are four pirates considered to be the most notorious and powerful captains in the world . Currently, these four are recognized as Shanks , Marshall D. Teach , Monkey D. Luffy , and Buggy , with known predecessors being Edward Newgate , Charlotte Linlin , and Kaidou .

name: Guilty Jury
role: Jury members of the Enies Lobby court, Pirates (former)
description: The Guilty Jury , comprising of "Eleven Righteous Jurors" ( 公正なる「11人の陪審員」 , Kōsei-naru Jūichinin no Baishin'in ) , are the strongest and most fearsome of the troops at Enies Lobby under Baskerville 's command. They are eleven men each wielding a large ball on a chain. They wear masks and they have the word "Guilty" ( 有罪 , Yūzai ) tattooed on their left arm.

name: Inuarashi Musketeer Squad
description: The Inuarashi Musketeer Squad is the main diurnal combat force of the Mokomo Dukedom that formerly operated under the command of Duke Inuarashi and now serve Carrot after she took the throne. It is the daytime counterpart of the Guardians Among them are three minks known as "The Three Musketeers of Inuarashi" ( イヌアラシの三銃士 , Inuarashi no Sanjūshi ) , who possess the authority to command the other Musketeers and are themselves led by Shishilian .

name: Isshi-100
description: The Isshi-100 are the medical corps of Drum Island 's Sakura Kingdom , comprising one hundred professional doctors led by Kureha .

name: Kairiki Destroyers
description: The Kairiki Destroyers are the three largest members of the Franky Family . They are considered by the rest of their gang as some of the strongest members.

name: Koala Mercenaries
description: The Koala Mercenaries are a trio of bodyguards who watch over Rain Dinners .

name: Kyoshiro Family
description: The Kyoshiro Family is a yakuza group in Wano Country formerly led by the high-ranking money changer in service to the Kurozumi Family , Kyoshiro (who was Denjiro in disguise). After Denjiro revealed his identity as a member of the Nine Red Scabbards , they became enemies of Kurozumi Orochi and the Beasts Pirates during the Fire Festival and pledged themselves to the Kouzuki Family and the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance .

name: Mansion's Guards
description: The Mansion's Guards are employees of the Tessle Company ( テッスルカンパニー , Tessuru Kanpanī ) , hired by Klahadore to act as security guards to keep Kaya 's mansion safe.

name: Mimawarigumi
description: The Mimawarigumi was a squad of samurai who once served under Kurozumi Orochi , the former shogun of Wano Country . After the seeming death of Orochi by Kaidou 's hands, the members of the Mimawarigumi swore loyalty to Kaidou, effectively becoming part of the Beasts Pirates .

name: Nine Red Scabbards
description: The Nine Red Scabbards are a squad of nine warriors of Wano that serve as retainers of the Kouzuki Family who served Kouzuki Oden and now serve his son Momonosuke . They are led by their captain, Kin'emon .

name: Numbers
description: The Numbers are a group within the Beasts Pirates made up of artificially produced ancient giants . Originally created on Punk Hazard , they were deemed to be unsuccessful and were eventually bought by Kaidou . They later resided on Onigashima and served as combatants for the crew.

name: Orochi Oniwabanshu
description: Operating in secret, the Orochi Oniwabanshu defended Orochi from any potential threats. Being noted by Shinobu as a group of extremely capable ninja, they were masters of Ninjutsu , capable of moving around in secret to catch intruders by surprise, including the extremely sharp-witted Nico Robin . Despite this, aside from Fukurokuju, the members were not loyal to Orochi nor the samurai code of honor, as they immediately switched allegiance to Kaidou , the one who betrayed their master, when given the option.

name: Operation Utopia
description: Operation Utopia was the name of the project designed by Crocodile to dispose of King Nefertari Cobra to take over the throne of the Arabasta Kingdom and acquire the ancient weapon Pluton which is supposedly hidden somewhere in Arabasta, achieving the purpose of creating a "utopia" capable of competing with the World Government . The members of Crocodile's crime syndicate Baroque Works were mobilized for this operation.

name: Royal Guards
description: Royal Guards are warriors in personal service to a royal family . Every country has a unique set of guards with their own structure, many times overlapping in some capacity with the nation's military.

name: Superhuman Domingos
description: The Buggy Pirates are a band of pirates led by Buggy , a former Roger Pirates apprentice .

name: Tightrope Walking Funan Bros
description: The Tightrope Walking Funan Bros are a trio of pirates within the Buggy Pirates .

name: Vinsmoke Family
description: The Vinsmoke Family is a royal bloodline that rules the Germa Kingdom , as well as the former dynastic conquerors and rulers of the North Blue . They are also a powerful and infamous family of Underworld mercenaries , and the family from which Sanji originally hails. As an adjunct to their rule over the Germa Kingdom, they are the commanders of the Kingdom's Underworld army, Germa 66 .

name: WCI 31
description: The WCI 31 is a group of Whole Cake Island 's most renowned head chefs.
